title: Ads Graphic Designer & Marketer (Meta Ads)
description:
We are a fast-growing performance advertising startup based in Canada. We’re looking for a skilled Graphic Designer to join our team on a monthly long term retainer contingent on probation and ongoing performance. You will support our creative and executive team everyday in creating ads for our clients. 



We want designs that make our clients' ads stand out; not the typical templates or social media posts. You will be creating ads for the health/beauty service industry (not e-commerce).





What You’ll Do:

-Design ads for Instagram/Facebook for various different businesses

-Create social media posts

-Occasional branding work

-Collaborate with our creative team on direction and vibe





What We’re Looking For:

-Excellent English communication skills. You will be required to reference our internal technical documentation and guidelines on designing for ads.

-Experience designing ads (preferred)

-Bonus if you've designed ads for med spa, beauty and related service based industries (not e-commerce)

-Available during Eastern Standard Time (EST - Toronto Time), with prompt communication via
/Slack

-This will preferably be your only full time job, allowing you to take ownership of the tasks (no sub-contracts)

-Strong eye for layout, typography, and colour

-Skilled with Canva, Adobe Suite, or Figma (any combo works)

-Reliable, takes feedback like a pro, and meets deadlines

-Background in a creative field like graphic design, marketing, or advertising (education or self-taught)

-Expect to average 30 deliverables/month





This is perfect for someone who:

-Wants real-world experience with design for performance advertising

-Thrives in a fast-paced, high pressure startup environment

-Is looking for a long term growth opportunity

-Wants exposure to a diverse client base with a fresh challenge everyday

-Is looking to learn new skills





To apply, send us:

-What do you think makes a high performing
/Instagram ad? What kind of ads would work on you?

-How does your experience make you stand out? Try to be specific and provide examples. 

-Availability (EST timezone)

-Salary expectations ($CAD)

-Portfolio



Answer the pre-screening questions above and we'll be in touch.



If selected for an interview, you will be asked to complete a technical assessment first.



We're looking for someone to grow with us. The right person will be provided growth and leadership opportunities in our organization and competitive wages.

title: Financial Associate Virtual Assistant
description:
Position: Financial Associate Virtual Assistant



We are seeking a driven, detail-oriented, and proactive Virtual Assistant to join our team as a Financial Associate. This role is ideal for someone who wants to grow with a company long term and play an important part in both commercial loan brokerage and real estate acquisition efforts.



This is more than just a support role. We are looking for someone who can help us generate opportunities, stay organized, and assist in moving both loan and acquisition files forward efficiently.



About the Role:

As our Financial Associate Virtual Assistant, you will assist with identifying and generating commercial loan leads, finding real estate acquisition opportunities that match our company’s strategy, helping prepare Letters of Intent, and supporting the processing and organization of client loan files. You will work closely with leadership and become part of a growing business with long-term potential.



Responsibilities:



Research and identify potential commercial loan clients and financing opportunities

Search for real estate acquisition opportunities that fit the company’s buying strategy

Assist with preparing Letters of Intent for targeted property opportunities

Help organize, manage, and process commercial loan files

Maintain accurate records, notes, and updates in company systems and spreadsheets

Assist with online research, data entry, follow-up tasks, and file management

Communicate clearly and professionally with tea
mbers and prospects as needed

Support the company in building efficient lead generation and processing workflows



Preferred Candidate:



Has experience in lead generation, research, virtual assistance, loan processing, real estate support, or administrative support

Is highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

Can follow instructions carefully and complete tasks accurately

Is comfortable learning new systems and processes

Has strong written and verbal English communication skills

Is proactive and resourceful

Is interested in long-term growth with the company



Application Details:

We are looking for someone who is serious about joining a team and helping build something meaningful over time. In your application, please tell us about your relevant experience, your communication preference, and your availability to start if selected. Please also explain why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role.



Compensation:

This is a full-time position starting at $300 USD per month for a 40-hour workweek, paid bi-weekly.



Equivalent pay structure:



$150 USD bi-weekly

Approximately 8,634.91 PHP bi-weekly

Approximately 17,269.82 PHP monthly



There will be an opportunity for advancement and increased compensation based on performance, reliability, and growth within the company.



If you are looking for a long-term opportunity where you can contribute, grow, and be part of building something substantial, we would love to hear from you.

title: Outbound call specialist
description:
We’re looking for a confident, results-driven Outbound Call Specialist to connect with new leads. In this role, you’ll make high-volume outbound calls, as well as inbound calls, share information about our products or services, qualify leads, and schedule next steps for the sales team. Strong communication skills, a positive attitude, and comfort on the phone are key to success.

You should also have clear, confident English pronunciation and strong verbal communication skills. 

Because this role is phone-based, applicants are required to submit a short video or voice recording in English when applying so we can evaluate speaking clarity and professionalism.

title: STR Property Manager available to start ASAP
description:
Looking for associate property managers at my rapidly growing short-term rental management company!



We manage around 50 properties, and are growing. As the company is not currently large enough to have dedicated departments for each task, I'm looking for people who are good at juggling priorities, task switching, and going with the flow. We are NOT looking for a regular VA who just wants to punch the clock and get paid. We want someone who is looking for a long-term career and is willing to grow with us!



Tasks will include support via phone, text,
, Hospitable, and Slack, as well as various research projects and tasks according to the daily needs of the company. Once you're through training, you will be primarily handling either communications or maintenance, but you will be trained in everything. You will serve as the primary liaison between 4 groups of people: guests, homeowner clients, maintenance people, and cleaners. I'll be honest, it's a tough job and I have high standards. But I also work really hard to take care of my team and create a great work environment :)



This is a FULL-TIME position - 4 day work week, 9.5 hours per day. We pay on a tiered scale. Tier 1 agents will earn between $
USD per month, depending on job performance. Tier 2 or Tier 3 agents earn between $
or $1400 to $1900, respectively. You will also be able to pick up additional on-call shifts for overnight (EST) management. We also offer several weeks of paid time off and sick leave, as well as various other company perks.



NOTE: I will be hiring for Tier 1 roles initially, with the opportunity to be promoted to Tier 2 within a few months, and eventually to Tier 3 if you desire. Please note that I always hire at Tier 1 level originally and then promote internally. If you are hoping to be hired at the Tier 2 or 3 level, please do not apply.



Specific hours will be determined based on the current teams' needs. Possible shifts are Sunday-Wednesday 7:30 am - 5 pm EST or 2 pm to 11:30 pm EST, or those same times Wednesday through Saturday. The most likely permanent shift will be Wednesday to Saturday, 7:30 am to 5 pm. While in training, you will have a 5-day work week.



TO APPLY:

- Please note any schedule limitations you have when you apply.

- Excellent English skills are a must.

- Due to the large number of applicants, previous experience in STR management is strongly preferred.

- Please include a recording of you speaking in English in your application, as well as your resume.

- I will not respond back to applicants that don't include BOTH of the above required application items.

- Include the word "banana" in your application.

title: Personal Assistant & Mental Health Program Designer
description:
About the Role: We’re seeking a unique individual to split their time between two distinct, but equally important, roles. For half of your time, you’ll operate as a traditional personal assistant: handling research, administrative support, and logistical planning, particularly in the world of stock market research, new business opportunities, calendar management, travel booking, and generally making life run smoother for your employer. You don’t need to be an expert in these areas—training, guidance, and direct supervision will be provided.

For the other half of your time, we want you to switch gears and take the lead. You’ll design and run a mental health management program for your employer, utilizing modalities such as meditation, breathwork, grounding exercises, gratitude practices, and any additional techniques you find effective. This is your chance to be creative and impactful, crafting a routine that genuinely improves well-being.



Key Responsibilities: Administrative & Research Support (Approx. 50%):

Conduct research related to stock market trends, potential investments, and new business ideas

Manage calendars, schedule appointments, and coordinate meetings

Book travel and handle related logistics

Take on additional day-to-day tasks as needed to support the employer’s work and personal life

Receive training, direction, and feedback from the employer for all tasks in this area



Mental Health & Wellness Program (Approx. 50%): 

Design, implement, and lead a personalized mental health management program

Incorporate meditation, breathwork, grounding, gratitude, and other holistic practices

Research and propose new wellness strategies, adapting the program as needed

Track progress and make adjustments based on feedback



What We’re Looking For: Highly organized, proactive, and adaptable

Comfortable with both following direction and working independently

Passionate about mental health and wellness, with experience in (or a strong interest in learning) meditation, breathwork, and related practices

Able to communicate clearly via video, phone, and text

Tech-savvy and resourcefulAble to maintain confidentiality and discretion



Work Environment: Remote position with required video conferencing during work hours

Balance of collaborative and independent work



If you’re someone who thrives on variety, cares deeply about mental health, and loves making things run smoothly, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Appointment Setter (Medspa Niche) EST
description:
We are a fast-growing performance advertising startup based in Canada. We’re looking for a skilled Appointment Setter to join our team on a monthly long-term retainer, contingent on probation and ongoing performance. You will support our clients by calling and converting leads into booked appointments for our clients.



We want Setters who act as true consultants, not just script-readers. You will be handling leads for the health/beauty service industry (Medspas, Laser Clinics, Estheticians).



What You’ll Do:

-Call and qualify warm leads within 5 minutes of receiving them in our CRM.

-Manage and organize the CRM (scheduling, notes, and pipeline management).

-Follow up with potential patients via SMS and
 to maximize booking rates.

-Handle objections professionally and educate leads on treatments (e.g., Botox, PRP, Laser Hair Removal, etc).

-Collaborate with our team to improve script and lead quality feedback.

-Attend daily/weekly check-in meetings



What We’re Looking For:

-Flawless English communication skills (Spoken & Written). You must sound confident, clear, and friendly on the phone with minimal/no accent.

-Experience in Sales or Appointment Setting.

-Prior experience working with Medspas or selling high-ticket beauty services.

-Tech Savvy: Familiarity with CRMs (GoHighLevel/GHL experience).

-Availability: Must work during Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours.

-Focus: This will preferably be your main focus (no sub-contracts/agencies). You will work very closely with our team.

-Reliability: Fast response times via Slack/Email and a quiet working environment with reliable internet connection.



This is perfect for someone who:

-Thrives in a fast-paced, high-pressure startup environment.

-Is not afraid of the phone and can handle rejection with resilience.

-Is looking for a long-term growth opportunity with a diverse client base.





To apply, please send us:

-Your availability (EST timezone)

title: Freight dispatcher
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Dispatcher to join our team. The ideal candidate will have strong communication skills and the ability to coordinate transportation activities efficiently.



MUST HAVE MINIMUM OF 3 YEARS VERIFIABLE DISPATCHING EXPERIENCE IN transportation/ logistics. You will be in charge of dedicated lanes and monitoring drivers from pickup to delivery. If you’re watching the transportation market you’ll know it’s at it’s all time low. Thus, we’re looking for someone who we can add/contribute their knowledge and experience in a dispatch position. Depending on your level of experience you could also be part of assigning loads and booking loads from shippers. The monitoring of drivers on loads in transit and communicating with shippers if they call for ETA’s to delivery is expected as well.



Sham is seeing growth in these hard times and we are looking forward to adding LONG TERM partners into our company. Give us a call and let’s talk about how we can bring you into our operation.



Duties

- Coordinate and schedule transportation activities

- Communicate with drivers, customers, and internal teams to ensure timely deliveries

- Utilize transportation management systems such as Ditat for dispatching

- Plan and optimize freight movements

- Monitor shipping and receiving activities

- Work closely with third-party logistics providers (3PL) for efficient operations



Qualifications

- Proficient in logistics and transportation planning

- Excellent phone etiquette and communication skills

- Experience in dispatching and freight management

- Familiarity with shipping and receiving processes

- Knowledge of Ditat or similar transportation management systems (Training available)



-Familiarity with Hours of service regulations



-How to navigate on a Load boards

title: Technical Support (TS) Specialist (SaaS)
description:
Job Description - Technical Support (TS) Specialist



Role Summary



The Technical Support Specialist is responsible for resolving complex client issues that require deeper technical investigation and cross-functional coordination. This role sits at the intersection of Customer Success, Product, and Engineering, ensuring issues are diagnosed accurately, resolved efficiently, and communicated clearly to internal and external stakeholders.



Key Responsibilities



- Own and resolve client-raised technical issues, ensuring timely resolution and minimal service disruption.

- Perform in-depth troubleshooting and investigation to identify root causes and execute viable resolution paths.

- Reproduce reported issues reliably and document findings with clear evidence and context.

- Prepare complete and structured escalation materials for Engineering, including reproduction steps, logs, impact assessment, and scope.

- Coordinate closely with Engineering and DevOps teams during bug fixes, i
 response, and system stabilisation.

- Drive resolution discipline by actively managing investigation queues and ensuring timely ticket closure.

- Apply strong product and system knowledge to support clients effectively and consistently.

- Identify recurring issues, patterns, or gaps, and contribute insights to improve product stability and support workflows.

- Collaborate with Customer Success, Product, and other internal teams to ensure aligned client outcomes.

- Support continuous improvement initiatives, including documentation, playbooks, and process optimisation.

- Perform additional related duties as reasonably required to support client outcomes and operational objectives.



Objectives and Success Measures



- Maintain high standards of technical resolution quality and accuracy.

- Reduce investigation backlog and ageing tickets through effective prioritisation and follow-through.

- Improve client experience through clear communication and reliable issue resolution.

- Support customer retention by resolving technical blockers that impact usage and trust.

- Enable smoother handoffs and faster fixes through high-quality escalation and documentation.

- Contribute to scalable, repeatable support processes and knowledge assets.

- Provide actionable insights to internal teams based on observed client and system behaviour.



Key Skills and Attributes



- Strong technical troubleshooting and analytical skills.

 or high-severity issues.

Advantage (not required):

/Instagram)

How to Apply:

title: Remote Kitchen Designer & Estimator
description:
We’re a fast-growing residential renovation and design company based in New York and Connecticut, USA. Our projects include high-end kitchen and bath remodels, decks, outdoor kitchens, and full-house renovations. We don’t do cookie-cutter work, we tailor every job to the client’s needs, and we need someone who can keep up.



We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-focused Kitchen Designer & Estimator who can own the job from site intake to job completion — remotely.



You’ll receive project intake details, photos, and site measurements via CompanyCam, then build out full estimates, create 3D renderings, help manage material orders, coordinate schedules with our US team, and keep the project moving. This is not just a design role, you will play a key part in operations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Review job requests and photos from the field using CompanyCam



- Build out labor and materials estimates in Jobber



- Prepare clear, accurate customer quotes with proper markup



- Create change orders as needed when scope changes



- Order materials online and coordinate deliveries



- Coordinate with our dispatcher (Ray) to schedule jobs based on crew availability and material delivery



- Track job progress through CompanyCam and communicate with our field supervisor (Rich)



- Notify the team when it’s time for progress payments and final invoicing



- Create 3D renderings for kitchen, bath, basement, and exterior projects (preferred software: 2020 Design, SketchUp, or similar)



Requirements:

- 3+ years experience in residential estimating and construction design



- Solid understanding of US construction methods and materials



- Strong English communication skills (written and spoken)



Experience with:



- Jobber (or similar field service CRM)



- CompanyCam (or similar photo/project tracking tools)



- 2020 Design, SketchUp, Chief Architect, or similar design software



- Microsoft Teams, Outlook, Excel



- Ability to work full-time, 100% remote, during US Eastern hours



- Comfortable taking initiative, solving problems, and owning your role



Why Work With Us?

- Long-term, stable opportunity with room for growth



- Weekly pay via Wise



- Clear systems, organized workflow, and supportive team



- You’ll make a real impact, not just push paper



To Apply Send us:



- A quick video introducing yourself and explaining your experience (2–3 minutes)



- Examples of kitchen or bath renderings you’ve created



- A sample estimate or cost breakdown you’ve done (real or mock)



- Your resume and OnlineJobs.ph profile link





Best,

Chris Kendall

GH Group

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
About Our Company



—Premier Path Property Group is a U.S.-based real estate investment company that specializes in buying off-market properties directly from homeowners. Our team focuses on finding motivated sellers and helping them sell their properties quickly for cash.



We are looking for a motivated and reliable Cold Caller to reach out to homeowners, start conversations, and identify people interested in selling their property.



Job Responsibilities

—Your primary responsibility will be calling property owners from a provided list and identifying motivated sellers.



Daily tasks include:

 • Making outbound cold calls to homeowners using our dialer

 • Following a simple script to start conversations

 • Asking qualifying questions about the property and the seller’s situation

 • Identifying motivated sellers interested in selling

 • Setting appointments or passing qualified leads to our acquisitions team

 • Updating call results and notes in our CRM

 • Meeting daily and weekly call targets



Requirements

—We are looking for someone who is:

 • Fluent in English with a neutral accent

 • Comfortable making 100–300+ calls per day

 • Experienced in cold calling or telemarketing

 • Reliable with a strong internet connection

 • Familiar with real estate or wholesaling (preferred but not required)

 • Confident talking to homeowners and handling objections



Experience with these tools is a plus:

 • CRM systems

 • Auto dialers

 • Real estate lead generation



Compensation

—We offer competitive pay and incentives.



Base Pay: Hourly

Bonuses: Paid for qualified leads and/or closed deals.



Top performers can earn significant bonuses each month.





What Success Looks Like



A successful cold caller will:

 • Generate consistent motivated seller leads

 • Maintain a positive attitude on calls

 • Be reliable and consistent with call volume

 • Communicate clearly with our acquisitions team



How to Apply

—Please include the following in your application:

 1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

 2. Your previous cold calling experience

 3. Your internet speed test

 4. Your availability in EST



We look forward to working with you!

title: Closing Coordinator (Personal Injury)
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and detail-driven Closing Coordinator to manage the final stage of personal injury cases from settlement through disbursement. This role is critical to ensuring accurate, timely, and compliant case closures while delivering an exceptional client experience at one of the most important 
nts in the case lifecycle.



Key Responsibilities

Settlement & Closing Management

Oversee all aspects of case closing from settlement to final disbursement

Review settlement statements for accuracy, including attorney fees, liens, expenses, and client net recovery

Coordinate with attorneys to confirm final settlement terms and approvals



Lien & Reduction Coordination

Identify, verify, and track all medical liens, subrogation claims, and balances

Negotiate lien reductions when applicable or coordinate with lien resolution vendors

Ensure all liens are properly resolved prior to disbursement



Client Communication

Serve as the primary point of contact for clients during the closing phase

Clearly explain settlement breakdowns and disbursement timelines

Maintain a high-touch, concierge-level client experience



Disbursement Processing

Prepare and finalize settlement statements and disbursement sheets

Coordinate with accounting/bookkeeping for check issuance and wire transfers

Ensure all required documents are signed prior to releasing funds



Documentation & Compliance

Ensure all closing documents are complete, signed, and properly stored

Maintain compliance with firm policies and state bar/trust accounting rules

Keep accurate and organized records of all closing activity



Cross-Department Coordination

Work closely with case managers, attorneys, and accounting to ensure smooth transitions into closing

Communicate status updates and escalate delays or discrepancies



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Average time from settlement to disbursement

Accuracy of settlement statements (minimal revisions/errors)

Lien resolution turnaround time

Client satisfaction at closing (reviews, feedback, referrals)

Number of cases closed per month

Zero trust accounting or compliance errors



Qualifications

2+ years of personal injury case management or closing experience

Strong understanding of settlement statements, liens, and disbursement processes

Familiarity with PI case management software (e.g., Filevine, Clio, SmartAdvocate)

Excellent communication and client service skills

High attention to detail and ability to manage multiple files simultaneously



Preferred Skills

Experience negotiating medical liens and reductions

Knowledge of trust accounting and settlement compliance

Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

Strong problem-solving and organizational skills



Compensation & Benefits

Competitive salary + potential performance-based bonuses

Health, dental, and vision benefits (if applicable)

Paid time off and holidays (if applicable)

Growth opportunities within a scaling firm

title: Digital Marketing & Content Specialist
description:
Please apply through the below link: 
=



Compensation: $1,300 – $1,800 / month USD 



Contractual | California business hours | Compensation is based on experience, depth of B2B SEO/content expertise, and demonstrated results. There is strong potential for compensation growth based on performance and impact within the first 3–6 months. 



ABOUT CDMS 



CDMS is a B2B Environmental, Health & Safety (EHS) services company. We work directly with manufacturing and industrial clients, helping them stay compliant, safe, and operationally sound. 



We have strong technical expertise and a clear brand. This role is about turning that expertise into a consistent, credible, and results-driven digital presence. 



THE ROLE 



This is a senior contractual role, not a management position, but one that requires you to operate independently and with sound judgment. You will own our digital marketing output end-to-end: SEO strategy and implementation, content creation, LinkedIn presence, and brand collateral. You will deeply learn our voice, our clients, and our industry, and use that knowledge to build a presence that earns trust in a technical, compliance-driven space. 



You will work closely with our leadership team, who will brief you directly from client conversations and field intelligence. Your job is to transform that raw material into polished, on-brand content that sounds like us: credible, clear, and grounded in real EHS work. 



If you have ever built a B2B content engine from a standing start and you understand what it takes to earn authority in a niche technical industry, this role was written for you. 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (3–6 MONTHS) 



Grow LinkedIn presence by 50%–100%, with a focus on relevant, industry-aligned followers 

Increase qualified inbound leads by 30%–70%, supported by consistent content and targeted outreach 

Improve organic website traffic by 20%–40% through SEO optimization and new content 

Establish a consistent, high-quality content cadence across blog, LinkedIn, and newsletters 

Build an initial pipeline of case studies and thought leadership content based on real client work 

Deliver clear monthly reporting with actionable recommendations - not just data 



Note: These targets are supported by timely input from leadership, tool access (Ahrefs, etc.), and shared alignment on priorities. We treat this as a two-way commitment. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO 



SEO 



Conduct and maintain a full SEO audit using Ahrefs; implement and track on-page optimizations 



Perform ongoing keyword research and monitor rankings across target terms 



Identify content gaps and build a topic roadmap based on search demand and competitive analysis 



Own SEO reporting — surface insights to leadership in plain language with clear action items 



Content & Ghostwriting 



Write blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and newsletters in the voice of our leadership team 



Turn client conversations and project outcomes (fed to you by our team) into compelling case studies 



Curate RSS feeds from EHS, manufacturing, and safety industry sources; develop timely, opinionated content based on those topics 



Maintain a consistent editorial calendar across all channels 



Develop and refine our brand voice guide over time — so the standard is documented, not just in your head 



LinkedIn Management 



Manage our leadership team's LinkedIn presence — posting, commenting, and connecting on their behalf 



Engage daily with content from existing clients and prospects in the EHS and manufacturing space 



Grow our LinkedIn network through targeted, strategic outreach 



Track follower growth, engagement rate, and lead signals — report monthly with clear takeaways 



Collateral & Internal Branding 



Apply our existing brand guidelines to materials provided by our technical team — one pagers, site posters, and laminated sheets for client locations 



Coordinate with our onsite admin assistant for printing and lamination, and with the EHS team for client delivery 



Keep all materials current and on-brand 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 



4+ years of B2B content marketing or digital marketing experience 



Expert-level SEO with demonstrated ranking results — Ahrefs is your daily driver 



Proven ghostwriting for C-suite or senior executives in B2B industries 



Experience managing full editorial calendars independently, with minimal direction 



Strong track record growing LinkedIn presence for a company or executive 



Excellent written English — you catch errors others miss and you have range 



Canva or basic design skills to adapt brand templates 



Proficient in WordPress or equivalent CMS 



Comfortable with AI writing tools to accelerate output — without sacrificing voice or accuracy 



Self-directed: you manage your own priorities and deadlines without hand-holding 



NICE TO HAVE 



Familiarity with EHS, safety, manufacturing, or industrial compliance industries 



Experience with newsletter platforms (ActiveCampaign or similar) 



Background in managing or mentoring junior content contributors 



WORK SETUP 



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor 



Schedule: California business hours (PST/PDT) 



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred 



Equipment: You provide your own setup; stable internet required 



Tools: Ahrefs, WordPress, Canva, LinkedIn — we provide access on hire 



Next Step: To move forward in the hiring process, please complete the assessment below. Once finished, you’ll receive a second assessment. Completion of both is required for consideration.

title: Customer Experience Member
description:
Company: Blessinger Legal PLLC

Department: Customer Experience

Reports to: CSE Supervisor



Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $6 – $7 per hour

Employment Type: Full-Time



Position Purpose

The Customer Experience Representative serves as the first point of contact for clients seeking assistance with the company’s services. This role is responsible for managing inquiries across multiple channels, maintaining accurate client records, and ensuring a high level of client satisfaction through professional and timely support.

The ideal candidate will have strong customer service experience triaging calls of various types and on a complexity of issues with a respectful and sympathetic tone. They will be able to document client calls, forward them, and follow up with clients in a proactive manner. 



Primary Responsibilities

Manage client inquiries via phone,
, chat, SMS, and social media

Experience handling inbound and outbound calls

title: AI Video Editor & Creator
description:
Hey there!



I am looking for an AI Video Editor & Creator who can create short-form videos using modern AI tools, based on references — but also bring in their own ideas and creativity.



This is a part-time role (around 20 hours per week).



Here are examples of the type of videos we are looking for:



Video Examples:





Please let me know your favorite animal at the beginning of your proposal and why.



Your main task will be:

Creating videos in a similar style using AI tools — but also developing new ideas, scripts, and variations based on those references.



You do NOT need to be a traditional video editor.

This role is much more about thinking, creating, and executing with AI tools.



You should be able to:



* understand a topic and quickly get into it

* come up with video ideas and concepts

* help write or improve simple scripts

* recreate existing videos based on references

* create new variations and original videos

* use AI tools to generate visuals, voice, and content

* edit videos so they are clean, engaging, and ready to use



Today, tools like AI video generators, ChatGPT, Gemini and other tools can help create videos much faster.



Experience with tools like MakeUGC, Arcads AI, or similar AI video and automation tools is a big plus.

If you have worked with any AI tools, please mention which ones in your application.



What matters to us is not which tools you use, but that the final result works and matches the style.



Important:

We are not looking for a traditional video editor.

We are looking for someone who can think, create, and execute using AI.



The videos should feel similar in:



* style

* pacing

* structure

* overall quality



But we also want you to bring your own ideas and improve the content.



Please share your recent work:



* videos you have created or edited

* if you don’t have client work, you can also share personal or practice projects



Payment per month: 300 USD

Weekly you will spend around 20 hours per week



Additional question (important):

Pick one of the example videos and briefly explain (3–6 sentences):



* how you would recreate it

* and how you would improve it or create a variation



Test task:

If your application is a good fit, I will send you a test task in the next step.



Important:

The test task will not be paid.

It is used to evaluate your ability to match our style, think creatively, and work with AI tools.



We are looking for someone reliable and long-term.



Looking forward to your application!



Eugen

title: Website editor and SEO
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant (Squarespace + Local SEO Specialist)



Company: Quick & Clean Pressure Washing  

Location: Remote  

Hours: 20–30 hours per week  

Pay: $5-$7/hour  

Project Length: 1–2 months (with potential for ongoing work)



---



### About the Project

We are a growing pressure washing company based in Georgia looking to improve our Google rankings and generate more organic leads.



This project focuses on optimizing our existing website and building out new pages to rank in multiple cities we service.



---



### Responsibilities

- Edit and update website pages using Squarespace  

- Implement on-page SEO (titles, meta descriptions, headers, internal linking)  

- Create and format location-based pages (city + service pages)  

- Optimize images (file names, alt text, compression)  

- Improve website structure for SEO and user experience  

- Add and organize internal links between pages  

- Follow SEO guidelines provided by the owner  



---



### Requirements

- Experience working with Squarespace websites  

- Basic to intermediate knowledge of SEO (on-page SEO required)  

- Ability to follow instructions and execute quickly  

- Strong attention to detail  

- Good written English  



---



### Preferred (Not Required)

- Experience with local SEO  

- Familiarity with Google Search Console or Google Analytics  

- Experience building location/service pages  



---



### Project Goal

- Improve rankings for keywords like:

  - Pressure washing + city  

  - Driveway cleaning + city  

- Help the website begin ranking in multiple service areas  

- Increase organic traffic and inbound leads  



---



### To Apply

Please include:

1. Examples of Squarespace websites you’ve worked on  

2. Any SEO work you’ve done (before/after results if available)  

3. A brief explanation of how you would improve rankings for a local service business  



---



This is a fast-moving project. We are looking for someone who can start immediately and execute efficiently.

title: Business Operations Manager / Integrator
description:
JOB OVERVIEW:

We are seeking a highly proactive Business Operations Manager to bring structure, ownership, and execution into our fast-growing international company operating across e-commerce, beauty, and digital businesses.



This is not a traditional Virtual Assistant role.

We are looking for someone who can act as a true operational partner to the founders, translating ideas into structured workflows, building scalable systems, and ensuring that projects move forward efficiently across the organization.



The Business Operations Manager will play a critical role in optimizing our operational infrastructure, connecting tools and processes, and creating clarity in a fast-moving environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Build, optimize, and manage operational systems (Notion, Slack, Google Drive, integrations, workflows).

- Translate discussions, ideas, and strategic decisions into clear tasks, projects, and timelines.

- Assign ownership across the team and drive accountability to ensure deadlines are met.

- Identify operational inefficiencies and proactively implement improved processes.

- Lead project coordination and maintain visibility across all active initiatives.

- Create structured workflows that allow the company to scale without operational bottlenecks.

- Ensure documentation is organized, accessible, and continuously improved.

- Support founders by reducing operational load and protecting their focus.

- Establish reporting structures that provide clear insights into project progress.

- Bring clarity and organization to a dynamic, high-growth environment.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Proven experience in Business Operations, Project Management, or a similar high-responsibility role.

- Strong systems thinker with the ability to structure complex workflows.

- Advanced experience with tools such as Notion, Slack, and Google Workspace.

- Demonstrated success in building or improving operational processes.

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).

- Highly proactive with strong ownership mentality, you do not wait for instructions.

- Comfortable working directly with founders in a fast-paced environment.

- Exceptional organizational and execution skills.

- Strong problem-solving ability with a focus on efficiency and scalability.



WORKING HOURS & COMPENSATION:

- Competitive salary of $1,100 USD/month.

- Full-time position (40 hours/week).

- Some overlap with European business hours is preferred.

- Long-term opportunity with potential for role growth as the company scales.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit the following:



1. A comprehensive resume highlighting your operations or project management experience.

2. A short Loom video (3–5 minutes) where you:

- Introduce yourself

- Walk us through the most advanced operational system you have built or managed

- Explain how you approach structure, accountability, and execution

3. If available: Screenshots or examples of workspaces you structured (Notion, ClickUp, Airtable, Asana, etc.).



! Applications without a Loom video will not be considered!

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Waiterix | Harmonia Enterprises LLC



About Waiterix



Waiterix is an AI-powered hospitality platform designed to help restaurants operate more efficiently, increase revenue, and deliver better customer experiences. Our solution includes:



•An AI receptionist that answers calls and manages reservations

•An AI waiter integrated into a digital menu for seamless ordering and payment

•A business insights dashboard that enables data-driven decision-making



Waiterix addresses critical operational challenges in the restaurant industry, including missed calls, staff shortages, slow service, and limited visibility into performance. This is a mission-critical solution, not a discretionary tool.



 Role Overview



We are expanding across the United States and are seeking a Sales Development Representative (SDR) based in the Philippines to support our growth.



This is a remote, performance-driven role focused on:



•Cold calling restaurant owners and decision-makers in the U.S.

•Delivering product demonstrations

•Closing new business

•Managing client relationships to ensure retention



You will play a key role in introducing Waiterix to prospective clients and maintaining long-term relationships that generate recurring revenue.



Key Responsibilities



•Conduct outbound cold calls to restaurants across the U.S.

•Engage directly with owners and managers

•Present Waiterix in a clear, concise, and value-driven manner

•Identify operational challenges and position appropriate solutions

•Deliver product demonstrations

•Close new client accounts

•Onboard new customers and ensure successful activation

•Maintain ongoing client relationships to support retention and recurring revenue



 Compensation



•Base Pay: $3 USD per hour

•Commission: 5% recurring monthly commission on each closed and retained client ($3,000 per month)

•Earning Potential: Performance-based, with scalable recurring income tied to client retention



Candidate Profile



We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:



•Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral or American-accented tone

•Confidence in cold calling and sales conversations

•Ability to communicate value clearly and persuasively

•Comfort with technology and ability to learn SaaS products quickly

•Self-motivation and the ability to work independently

•Resilience and professionalism in handling objections





Preferred:



•Prior experience in sales, customer service, or call center environments

•Experience with SaaS or technology products





What You’ll Gain



•Experience in a high-growth AI and SaaS company

•Exposure to the U.S. business and hospitality market

•Opportunity to build recurring commission-based income

•Flexible, remote work environment with autonomy

•Direct contribution to scaling an innovative technology product



Why Join Waiterix



Waiterix is at a critical growth stage, building a global end-to-end AI platform for the hospitality industry. This role offers the opportunity to be part of that expansion while developing valuable skills in technology sales and client management.

title: Inventory Accountant / eCommerce Inventory Analyst
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a highly analytical and detail-oriented professional with a strong accounting background and hands-on experience in inventory management, product costing, and eCommerce operations.

This role is responsible for maintaining accurate inventory, forecasting demand, analyzing profitability, and ensuring smooth operations across Odoo and multiple eCommerce platforms.



Responsibilities

Inventory Planning & Management

• Ensure optimal stock levels to support sales and operations

• Monitor inventory and set reorder points to prevent stockouts and overstock

• Plan and execute timely purchasing and replenishment

• Schedule inbound shipments and coordinate with the US operations team

• Negotiate with suppliers and resolve supply issues

Forecasting & Data Analysis

• Analyze sales trends, historical data, and demand projections

• Forecast inventory needs and anticipate seasonal demand

• Use data analytics to predict customer buying behavior

• Identify risks and proactively solve inventory challenges

Profitability & Product Costing

• Track daily SKU profitability and generate profit reports

• Maintain accurate margins by updating landed costs

• Ensure accurate financial reporting related to inventory

Accounts Payable & Financial Tasks

• Process and reconcile invoices in Odoo

• Manage vendor payments and records

• Ensure accuracy between vendor statements and accounting records

eCommerce & System Operations

• Extract and analyze reports from Amazon (Seller Central & repository data)

• Maintain inventory accuracy between Odoo and all eCommerce platforms

• Support order creation, tracking, and reconciliation

Reporting & Weekly Performance Tracking

• Prepare and submit a weekly inventory and financial report

• Track KPIs such as SKU performance, margins, stock levels, and risks

• Build reports and dashboards using Excel

• Provide insights and recommendations based on data

Requirements

• Degree in Accounting, Finance, Supply Chain, or related field

title: Sales Copywriter
description:
About Genflow



Genflow is a creator-led growth business that builds and scales consumer brands in partnership with the world's most influential talent. We combine content, commerce, and performance marketing to build culturally relevant brands with genuine global reach.



We move fast, operate at the intersection of culture and commerce, and everything we build is designed to convert.



About the Role



We're hiring a Sales Copywriter who lives at the intersection of brand and performance, someone who can write copy that doesn't just sound good, but actually sells.



This isn't a brand awareness role. You'll be writing copy that drives action, from the first hook to the final CTA. You'll work across our brand portfolio, producing direct response copy, sales pages,
 sequences, ad scripts, and launch assets that are built to convert.



If you understand consumer psychology, know how to move someone from curious to committed, and can switch between brand voice and sales urgency without missing a beat, this role was made for you.



Your job is direct: take a raw brief and within 24-48 hours it becomes:



A high-converting sales page or landing page

A full
 sequence - welcome, launch, abandoned cart

Multiple ad scripts for Meta and TikTok

Hook variants tested and ready to run

Philosophy



You believe:



80% of wins come from deep understanding of angles and how to persuade, not clever wordplay

Sales page copy MUST follow frameworks

Consumer psychology dictates all work created



You have a swipe file. You have receipts.

You write in voice. You write for conversion. You know the difference between the two, and you never sacrifice one without knowing why.



Outcomes in First 90 Days



You will:



Ship conversion copy across sales pages,
 sequences, ad scripts, and launch assets

Improve conversion rates on 2 core product offers with data to back it

Build a reusable hook library, angle bank, and swipe file across the brand portfolio

Write multiple A/B variants per asset - not one and done

Hit 24–48 hour turnaround on scoped briefs

Establish consistent copy standards across every customer touchpoint

Close gaps in messaging consistency and get brands to full conversion speed



Responsibilities

1. Sales Pages & Landing Pages

- Write high-converting long-form sales pages, VSL scripts, and product launch pages

- Above-the-fold hooks that stop the scroll. Offers that land. CTAs that close

- Collaborate with designers to ensure copy and layout reinforce each other

- No broken logic. No weak transitions. No lazy CTAs



2. Ad Copy & Scripts

- Write direct response ad copy for Meta and TikTok - hooks, body, CTA

- Script face-to-camera and UGC-style video ads for creators and talent

- Develop multiple hook variants per concept for creative testing

- Understand what stops the scroll and what drives clicks, and write to both



3.
 Sequences

- Build full
 flows: welcome, nurture, launch, abandoned cart, post-purchase

- Optimise subject lines and preview text for open rates

- Write sequences that move people from curious to committed

- Understand list segmentation and write accordingly



4. Campaign & Launch Assets

- Support product and brand launches end-to-end: pre-launch tease through post-launch nurture

- Write offer-led copy that communicates value clearly and creates urgency without feeling forced

- Deliver full copy suites on time, to brief, at pace



5. Brand Voice Within a Sales Framework

- Write in each creator's brand voice without losing commercial edge

- Translate brand positioning and creator identity into copy that converts

- Maintain consistency across all touchpoints without sacrificing performance



6. Testing & Iteration

- Write multiple copy variants for A/B testing across ads,
s, and landing pages

- Analyse performance data alongside the media buying team

- Use findings to inform future angles, hooks, and offer framing

- Maintain a live swipe file, angle bank, and copy library across brands



7. Collaboration

- Work closely with creative strategists, designers, and media buyers

- Brief and collaborate with UGC creators on scripted content

- Build copy SOPs to systemise workflows as the team scales



What We're Looking For:

Proof. Send links, screenshots, specific numbers, funnel stats.



We want:

“Rewrote the VSL hook - conversion rate went from 2.1% to 3.8%.”



Not:

“Helped communicate brand values across digital channels.”



You:



- Have proven experience writing direct response or sales copy, with results to show

- Understand consumer psychology, persuasion, and what makes people buy

- Can write in a brand voice without losing commercial edge

- Are comfortable across formats:
, ads, landing pages, scripts, social

- Are a fast, prolific writer who produces quality copy at pace

- Are data-literate, you read performance metrics and respond, not rationalise

- Thrive in a fast-moving environment and don’t need hand-holding to ship



Traits:

Uses initiative

Excellent communication and brief interpretation

Fast writer, strong editor, ruthless on weak hooks

Calm during launches

Able to incorporate strict brand guidelines with copy best practices

Flawless attention to detail (no typos, all work sent for approval is client-ready)



Nice to Have:

- Experience in consumer, lifestyle, or creator-led brands

- Background in performance marketing

- Knowledge of
 platforms: Klaviyo or similar

- Familiarity with low-ticket lead gen and ascension models

- An existing swipe file or portfolio of high-performing campaigns

- Performance Is Tied To

- Conversion rate improvements across owned assets

-
 open and click-through rates

- Ad creative performance and CPL movement

- Copy turnaround speed and brief adherence

- Revenue contribution tracked to copy decisions



To apply please fill out the form:

title: SEO Account Specialist
description:
Who We Are

We're a fast-growing startup with one primary goal: to become the most-efficient marketing agency in the world. We work hard, we swear a bit, and we have a great time doing it. If you're looking for a laid-back, punch-the-clock gig — this isn't it. We set big goals, we chase them relentlessly, and if you're with us, you'll be climbing the ladder fast. No politics, no BS.



Core Values

Relentless Drive — We don't shy away from challenges. Whether it's tough work or difficult conversations, we power through with grit and determination. We demand excellence from our team.

World-Class Accountability — Every tea
mber is held to a high standard. We're chasing greatness, and that requires world-class effort and attention to detail from everyone.

Radical Transparency — We're an open book. If there's an issue that's our fault, speak up. We handle things like professionals — no drama, just real solutions.



About the Role

The SEO Account Specialist plays a vital role on our team, owning the day-to-day execution of client SEO campaigns from start to finish. You'll work across a roster of clients in the home services space and be responsible for driving real, measurable results — not just activity metrics.



Here's what autonomy actually looks like at our company: you won't have someone breathing down your neck every hour. We trust the people we hire to get the job done. What you WILL have is a regular, structured meeting cadence with the owner to align on project timelines, flag any blockers, and set priorities for the week ahead. We believe in giving our people space to do their best work — but we move fast, communicate clearly, and expect you to do the same.



As we continue to grow, this role has a clear path toward a management position where you'll oversee other specialists, influence operations, and help shape the future of the team.



What You'll Own

On-Page SEO

Optimize headings (H1–H4), meta titles, and meta descriptions across client websites

Write and update body copy aligned with target keywords and conversion goals

Identify structural issues, keyword gaps, and content opportunities on client sites



Google Business Profile (GBP) Optimization

Manage and optimize GBP categories, services, and products for each client

Maintain a consistent posting cadence: 2 photo posts per week per client, 1 Update per week per client

Spot opportunities for profile improvements that drive map pack visibility



Analytics & Tracking

Set up and maintain Google Analytics 4 (GA4) — you must be an expert here, not just familiar

Build out Google Tag Manager (GTM) configurations including triggers, tags, and conversion tracking

Ensure clean data flows across all client accounts — if the tracking is wrong, the decisions are wrong



Reporting & Client Management

Own and update SEO Master Sheets for each client, keeping data current and accurate

Proactively identify opportunities for improvement across client websites, GBPs, and overall SEO health

Flag blockers, risks, or delays early — never go radio silent on an issue



AI-Assisted Execution

Leverage AI platforms (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) to improve output quality and workflow efficiency

Craft effective prompts that produce accurate, assumption-free responses — vague prompts produce garbage; we expect precision

Use AI as a force multiplier, not a crutch — your judgment still drives the work



The Non-Negotiables

This section is here for a reason. We've worked with people who were talented but unreliable, communicative but dishonest, and hardworking but incompetent. We're done with all of it. The person who fills this role will embody the following — without exception.



Highly Competent

You don't just know Local SEO — you've done the work and have case studies. You can look at a client's GBP, website, or analytics setup and immediately know what's broken, what's missing, and what will move the needle. You don't need your hand held on the fundamentals, and you don't guess when you don't know — you find the answer.



Radically Reliable

If you say you'll do something, it gets done. Deadlines aren't suggestions. Client deliverables aren't afterthoughts. You're the kind of person your teammates and your boss can count on without having to check in. Reliability at this company isn't a bonus trait — it's table stakes.



Completely Honest

We don't want yes-people. If something's going wrong, we want to know immediately — not after it's blown up. If you made a mistake, own it fast and come with a fix. If a client's expectations are unrealistic, speak up. Dishonesty and spin have no place here, and neither does silence when you know something's off.



Highly Communicative

This is a remote role. That means communication is your lifeline. You will have regular check-ins with the owner to discuss what's in progress, what's blocked, and what's coming next. Outside of those meetings, you're expected to be proactively communicative — not waiting to be asked. Quick Slack message when something's done. A heads-up when you're behind. A question before you go down a rabbit hole. Silence is not professionalism here; it's a red flag.



What We're Looking For

Minimum 5 years in an SEO role within a digital agency setting

Deep expertise in Local SEO fundamentals: on-page, off-page, and GBP optimization

Expert-level Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager skills — must be verifiable

Proven experience with AI platforms (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) and effective prompt engineering

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills — you can explain complex things clearly

High attention to detail with strong organizational skills across multiple client accounts

Self-motivated and growth-oriented — you want to be great, not just good enough



Why Join Us

We're not just another agency grinding through the motions. We're building something real, and we're doing it fast. Here's what that means for you:



Uncapped Career Growth — This job WILL have the ability to potentially become a Lead SEO. Do great work, move up fast. Management opportunities are real and close.

No Micromanagement — We hire adults. You'll have clear expectations, regular owner check-ins to keep projects moving, and then the autonomy to execute. We don't babysit.

Collaborative Culture — Small team, big goals, zero politics. We celebrate wins together and solve problems directly.

Professional Development — We invest in people who invest in themselves. Continuous learning is expected and supported.



One Last Thing

We work extremely hard. If you're not prepared to bring your best every single day alongside a passionate, highly motivated team, this role isn't for you — and that's okay.... BUT if you're ready to own your work, communicate without being asked, deliver without being chased, and grow faster than you would anywhere else — we want to hear from you.



Include "88" in your job submission subject line so we know you've read this whole description



Include your Resume & Portfolio in your application for the team's review, thanks!

title: Part-Time Real Estate VA for Database Management, Graphic Design & Follow-Up

I work across more than one system, so I need someone who is organized, careful, and comfortable following clear processes and instructions.

Main Responsibilities:

- Help track follow-up and make sure contacts do not get missed

What I’m Looking For:

- Excellent written English

- Organized and dependable

- Good communication and responsiveness

- Willing to learn my systems and processes

- Real estate experience is a plus, but not required

To Apply:

title: LONG-TERM Product Research / Data Entry E-Commerce Virtual Assistant VA
description:
We are looking for a full-time Product Researcher to join our e-commerce business. We run a few Shopify stores and we're looking for someone to help find the next big products and set up the stores.



In this role, your primary focus (80-90% of your time) will be finding new products and trends inside the
 Ad Library, keeping track of competitors, and organizing data. The rest of your time will involve building and updating product pages. We will provide full training/SOPs. 



I started a year ago, and the business has been growing steadily ever since. We are currently a small team, so by joining us now, you won't just be an employee—you'll be one of the founding members of our team, helping us build the foundation as we continue to scale. We're looking for a RELIABLE, HARD-WORKING, and GENUINE person who can follow instructions carefully and grow with the business LONG-TERM. 



Your Responsibilities:

- Product research

- Trend analysis

- Competitor analysis

- Record and organize data

- Shopify page building

- Collaborate and communicate with tea
mbers



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong attention to detail; organized and reliable.

- Good communication skills.

- Learns quickly from SOPs and training.

- Proactive! Someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do.

- Someone who thinks ahead and takes ownership of their work.



Tools you might use:

- Slack

- Asana

- Notion

- Research tools



Other Information:

- Working hours: Daytime Philippines time.

- Monthly and annual performance bonuses available.

- We aim for a healthy, long-term relationship



TO APPLY:

- Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link.

- Your resume/portfolio.

- Laptop specs / Internet speed screenshots

- Your desired wage/salary and hours.

- Use the subject line: Meticulous Product Researcher - [Your Full name]

- A short video recording answering these 6 questions (I know everyone’s time is precious, but a recording helps me get to know you better as a person! It’s okay to have some bullet points listed out, but please do not read off a script. Treat it as a small chat!):



- Are you currently working? Why did you leave your last job?

- How do you ensure the quality and quantity of your work when doing repetitive tasks?

- If it’s Thursday and you haven’t found enough validated products yet for the week’s KPI, what would you do?

- Why would you like this position, and why are you a good fit?

- Where do you see yourself in 5 years?

- What's your favorite hobby, and what do you usually do outside of work?

(You can use a Loom link, Google Drive, YouTube unlisted video, etc. Also, feel free to include anything else you’d like to say!)

title: Full-time STR property manager
description:
Looking for associate property managers at my rapidly growing short-term rental management company!



We manage around 50 properties, and are growing. As the company is not currently large enough to have dedicated departments for each task, I'm looking for people who are good at juggling priorities, task switching, and going with the flow. We are NOT looking for a regular VA who just wants to punch the clock and get paid. We want someone who is looking for a long-term career and is willing to grow with us!



Tasks will include support via phone, text,
, Hospitable, and Slack, as well as various research projects and tasks according to the daily needs of the company. Once you're through training, you will be primarily handling either communications or maintenance, but you will be trained in everything. You will serve as the primary liaison between 4 groups of people: guests, homeowner clients, maintenance people, and cleaners. I'll be honest, it's a tough job and I have high standards. But I also work really hard to take care of my team and create a great work environment :)



This is a FULL-TIME position - 4 day work week, 9.5 hours per day. We pay on a tiered scale. Tier 1 agents will earn between $
USD per month, depending on job performance. Tier 2 or Tier 3 agents earn between $
or $1400 to $1900, respectively. You will also be able to pick up additional on-call shifts for overnight (EST) management. We also offer several weeks of paid time off and sick leave, as well as various other company perks.



NOTE: I will be hiring for Tier 1 roles initially, with the opportunity to be promoted to Tier 2 within a few months, and eventually to Tier 3 if you desire. Please note that I always hire at Tier 1 level originally and then promote internally. If you are hoping to be hired at the Tier 2 or 3 level please do not apply.



Specific hours will be determined based on the current teams' needs. Possible shifts are Sunday-Wednesday 7:30 am - 5 pm EST or 2 pm to 11:30 pm EST, or those same times Wednesday through Saturday. The most likely permanent shift will be Wednesday to Saturday, 7:30 am to 5 pm. While in training, you will have a 5 day work week.



TO APPLY:

- Please note any schedule limitations you have when you apply.

- Excellent English skills are a must.

- Due to the large number of applicants, previous experience in STR management is strongly preferred.

- Please include a recording of you speaking in English in your application, as well as your resume.

- I will not respond back to applicants that don't include BOTH of the above required application items.

title: ???? Senior Full Stack Developer (iOS + Node.js)
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer with deep expertise in iOS (SwiftUI) and Node.js (TypeScript) who thrives in fast-moving, AI-driven environments.



This role is for someone who doesn’t just write code—but builds complete, scalable products, understands architecture deeply, and can operate at a high level using modern “vibe coding” workflows (AI-assisted development, rapid iteration, and system-level thinking).

  • Design, build, and maintain complex, production-grade applications across iOS and backend systems

  • Develop high-performance mobile apps using SwiftUI

  • Build scalable APIs and services using Node.js + TypeScript

  • Architect systems end-to-end (frontend, backend, infra awareness)

  • Use AI-assisted development tools to accelerate delivery (“vibe coding”)

  • Implement and maintain advanced Git workflows (Gitflow, branching strategies, CI/CD integration)

  • Collaborate on product direction, not just execution

7–10 years of professional software development experience



 Strong expertise in:

Deep understanding of:

  • DevOps exposure (Docker, CI/CD pipelines, cloud environments)

  • Experience leading or mentoring developers



???? What We Value

  • Builders > coders

  • Speed + quality balance

  • Ownership mindset

  • Strong product intuition

  • Ability to operate independently

title: Expert Wedding Culler + Lightroom Color Corrector (Smart Previews)
description:
Expert Wedding Culler + Lightroom Color Corrector (Smart Previews)



You must be comfortable working with **Lightroom Smart Previews ** and able to move quickly while keeping everything clean, consistent, and natural.



**What you’ll be doing:**

• Culling full wedding galleries

• Removing duplicates, missed focus, blinks, test shots, weak expressions

• Selecting the strongest images while preserving the story of the day

• Color correcting full galleries in Lightroom

• Matching exposure, white balance, and color across the entire set

• Keeping skin tones natural and consistent

• Delivering a clean, cohesive final gallery



**Requirements:**

• Advanced in Adobe Lightroom Classic

• Must understand and be comfortable with Smart Previews

• Strong experience with wedding culling

• Strong eye for natural color and consistency

• Able to handle large galleries efficiently

• Fast turnaround: typically **48–72 hours**

• Reliable communication



**What I care about most:**

I’m looking for someone who **pays attention, catches mistakes, and solves problems on their own**.



I don’t want to explain every small thing.

You should be able to look at a gallery and know what works and what doesn’t.



---



**Bonus (not required but helpful):**

• Headshot editing

• Photoshop

• Evoto

• Experience working with high-volume wedding photographers



---



**Important:**

Applications **without samples will not be reviewed**.



---



**To apply, send:**



1. Short intro about your experience

2. **Wedding culling samples** (before/after or full gallery selections if possible)

3. **Before and after wedding color correction samples (Lightroom)**

4. Headshot samples (if available)

5. Your software list

6. Your computer specs + internet speed

7. Your rate (per wedding, per image, or hourly)



Start your message with: **Smart Preview**

title: Property Portfolio Operations, Lettings and Compliance Manager
description:
Job Title: Property Portfolio Operations, Lettings and Compliance Manager



Location: Remote (Philippines-based) 

Salary: £550 - £600 GBP/month (Depending on Experience) 

Hours: Full-Time (40 hours/week) | 8 AM - 5 PM UK Time (with one hour for lunch)



About the Role



We are a rapidly scaling UK property investment company specializing in the Buy-Renovate-Refinance (BRR) strategy in Leeds. We are seeking a highly reliable and meticulous Property Portfolio Operations, Lettings and Compliance Manager to take full ownership of our management operations and drive our acquisition pipeline.



This is a critical, high-accountability role. You will be the engine ensuring zero administrative errors, protecting our compliance, and ensuring positive communication across all stakeholders. Your success directly enables the Managing Director (CEO) to focus on high-value acquisition and strategic growth.



Core Responsibilities: Property Management (Approx. 30-50% Time)

Your primary objective is to manage the portfolio to a standard where compliance is always met, cash flow is protected, voids are minimised and the CEO is never required to chase an administrative task.



Tenant Find Management (Critical Focus):



Own the high volume of daily tenant enquiries across all listing platforms like Openrent, Hello Neighbour,
 Marketplace and 
.



Marketing and Advertising: Listing, marketing, and advertising the properties across all relevant portals.



Efficiently triage and filter leads, scheduling viewings with our local, on-demand viewing agent in Leeds.



Maintain a warm, professional, and solutions-focused communication style.



Tenancy Onboarding & Compliance:



Coordinate the full tenancy setup process (including reference checks) and draft all Tenancy Agreements and other company agreement following detailed SOPs.



Ensure all necessary compliance documents are served correctly and on time.



Managing the deposit protection process, including the timely registration of the tenant's deposit with a compliant scheme.



Tenancy Changeover: Notifying utility providers and council tax departments of new/departing tenant details.



Maintenance & Repair Coordination:



Log, triage, and schedule maintenance and repair tasks for properties.



Manage and follow up on all requests until completion.



Financial & Administrative:



Perform rent checks, review payments, and conduct reconciliation.



Manage and process invoices for maintenance/contractors.



Secondary Core Responsibilities: Property Acquisition Support (Approx. 50-70% Time)



You will use your remaining time to support the CEO's goal of securing 10-12 BRR properties this year.



Market Research & Analysis: Efficiently screen property listings against our specific BRR criteria and perform initial property analyses/calculations using our proprietary tools and AI platforms.



Data Entry & Pipeline: Accurately input potential property data, maintaining an up-to-date pipeline of leads.



Viewing Logistics: Scheduling property viewings with local estate agents and coordinating the Managing Director's diary for optimal efficiency.



Offer Documentation Support: Preparing all documentation required for final offer submission and refinancing.



The Non-Negotiable Requirements (Skill & Temperament)



Impeccable Reliability & Ownership: Must have a proven track record of taking 100% ownership of tasks and deliverables. You must be able to work independently without requiring follow-up or chasing from the MD.



Exceptional People Skills and Polish: You must be naturally positive, polite, and warm in all professional interactions. An argumentative or defensive approach is not suitable for our team dynamic.



Resilience to Feedback: Must be able to handle direct and critical feedback gracefully and professionally.



Meticulous Attention to Detail: A high degree of accuracy is non-negotiable for compliance, legal documentation, and financial data entry.



UK Real Estate Experience: Familiarity with UK lettings, compliance, and tenancy documentation is highly advantageous.



Ability to Learn Fast



MANDATORY ONBOARDING & TRAINING REQUIREMENT



All successful candidates who receive a formal offer must undergo a structured training program developed by the CEO, regardless of prior experience.



This mandatory training period (including recorded modules (6 hours) and SOPs) and the final compliance test will be completed on the candidate's own time and is unpaid. Passing the final test (score of 90% or higher) is a non-negotiable condition of the final employment offer.



How to Apply (MANDATORY ATTENTION-TO-DETAIL TEST & DAILY REPORTING)

We require candidates who can follow instructions precisely from the very first step.



Daily Reporting: You will be required to send a detailed summary report to the CEO every day by 5:15 PM UK Time, summarizing key metrics (e.g., calls made, viewings attended, maintenance progress, and any stuck points).



To apply, please
 your resume and cover letter to 
 your
 subject line, you MUST include this exact phrase: "Property Manager: Highly Reliable."



Applications that do not include this exact phrase in the subject line will be automatically rejected.

title: Inside Sales Rep
description:
About Us

We are looking for a driven, resilient, and highly motivated Inside Sales Representative based in the Philippines to join our remote team. If you love the thrill of the hunt, thrive on the phone, and want to build a long-term career with a company that respects and rewards performance, this is the role for you.



About the Role

This is not a customer service role. This is a high-activity, outbound and inbound sales position. You will be the tip of the spear for our sales team—making cold calls to generate new interest, following up with warm leads who have engaged with our marketing, and booking qualified appointments for our Account Executives. You will work directly with US-based prospects during US business hours.



What You'll Do

Conduct 60-100+ outbound cold calls per day to targeted prospect lists.

Follow up rapidly with warm inbound leads via phone,
, and LinkedIn.

Qualify prospects using our established criteria to ensure they are a good fit.

Book qualified appointments and product demos directly onto our Account Executives' calendars.

Accurately log all call activity, notes, and outcomes in our CRM ([Insert CRM, e.g., HubSpot/Salesforce]).

Handle objections confidently and professionally.

Collaborate with the sales team to refine scripts and improve conversion rates.



What You Need to Succeed

Experience: At least 1-3 years of B2B cold calling or inside sales experience targeting US clients.

Communication: Flawless, highly proficient English with a neutral accent. You must sound confident on the phone.

Resilience: You don't take 'no' personally. You are comfortable with high-volume dialing and rejection.

Tech-Savvy: Experience using modern CRMs and dialers.

Schedule: Must be available to work full-time during US business hours ([Insert Time Zone, e.g., 8 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday]).



Your Tech Setup

A dedicated, quiet home office space free from background noise (dogs, roosters, traffic).

Primary high-speed internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps download/upload).

A reliable backup internet connection (e.g., mobile hotspot) in case of outages.

A high-quality, noise-canceling USB headset.

A modern computer/laptop with at least 8GB RAM.



Compensation & Benefits

We believe in rewarding hard work. This role offers a competitive base salary plus an uncapped commission structure designed for high performers.

Base Pay: $5.00 – $7.00 USD per hour (depending on experience), paid weekly/bi-weekly.

Commission: $15 USD for every qualified meeting you book that shows up.

Revenue Share: 2% of the closed-won revenue generated from the meetings you booked.

Earning Potential: A strong performer booking 20+ meetings a month can easily earn $1,000 - $1,500+ USD monthly.

Paid Time Off: 10 days of PTO per year, accruing after your first 90 days.



How to Apply

If you are ready to hustle and grow with us, please apply by sending your resume and a brief cover letter. To prove you have the attention to detail required for this role, please start your application message with the exact phrase: 'READY TO DIAL'. 

Applications without this phrase will be ignored.



We look forward to meeting you!
