title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Cold Calling + Lead Management) – Long-Term Opportunity
description:
Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Cold Calling and Lead Management) – Long Term Opportunity



We are a growing U.S.-based real estate investment company looking for a high-quality Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our team long term.



This is not just a task-based role. We are looking for someone who can grow with us, take ownership, and eventually help oversee other tea
mbers.



What you’ll be doing:



You will be making outbound follow-up calls to both warm and cold leads, handling incoming calls, and managing leads inside our CRM. You will also be responsible for setting appointments for our acquisitions team, making initial offers to sellers (we will train you), and consistently following up with leads.



Over time, you may also help monitor and assist other VAs, so organization and leadership potential are important. Keeping detailed notes and staying on top of tasks will be a key part of your day-to-day work.



What we’re looking for:



You must have excellent spoken English with a neutral or American-sounding accent and be very comfortable on the phone, as this is a major part of the role. 



Experience in U.S. real estate is preferred. Experience with REI Sift CRM is a big plus, but experience with any CRM system is valuable.



You should be reliable, organized, and strong with follow-up. We are looking for someone who is coachable, proactive, and wants to grow with a company long term. A stable internet connection and a quiet work environment are required.



You should be able to work U.S. business hours, ideally CST.



Bonus if you have experience with real estate investing, cold calling, sales, or managing other VAs.



Compensation:



Starting pay is $4 per hour, with flexibility based on experience. There is opportunity for raises, bonuses, and long-term growth as you prove yourself.



Why join us:



This is a long-term role with a growing company. There is opportunity to move into a leadership position over time. We value reliability, performance, and people who take ownership of their work.



How to apply:



Please include a short voice recording introducing yourself, along with your experience in real estate or CRMs and any background in cold calling or sales.



Also include the word OPAL in your application so we know you read this.

title: Join the Team at The Hire Advantage - We're Hiring an Applicant Screener!
description:
READ THE JOB POST CAREFULLY! Applicants who do not follow instructions will not be entertained or considered.



Are you a strong communicator with a clear and natural-sounding English accent? Do you enjoy helping people and paying attention to the details? If so, we’d love to meet you.



We’re The Hire Advantage, a fast-growing consulting agency that supports high-growth home services companies—think solar, roofing, HVAC—by helping them build high-performing Door-to-Door Sales Teams with speed and precision.



We’re currently on the lookout for a Virtual Assistant Applicant Screener who will serve as the first point of contact for incoming sales applicants from platforms like Indeed and other U.S.-based job boards.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Reviewing and organizing new job applications as they come in

- Using our screening scripts and tools to vet potential candidates

- Communicating with applicants via
, chat, or brief calls

- Tagging, updating, and managing applicant records in our system

- Providing detailed, accurate notes for hiring managers



Work Schedule:

- Night shift (to align with U.S. Central Time Zone)

- Typical hours: 2:00 PM to 8:00 PM CST

- Includes Saturday shifts depending on client needs



Compensation:

- Starting rate: $5/hour (depending on experience)

- Performance bonuses for each successful hire

- Rate increases available as you grow and advance through performance levels



What We’re Looking For:

- Excellent spoken and written English

- A natural, American-sounding accent

- Friendly and professional tone when speaking or writing

- Strong attention to detail and follow-through

- Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, CRMs, or ATS platforms (a bonus, not required)

s for quality, brand fit, and compliance.

/SMS for DTC Brands)

 engineers) is ready. You’re the strategic driver who ensures we hit revenue targets, retention goals, and marketing excellence for every client.

title: Human Resources Manager / Talent & People Operations
description:
Location: Remote (U.S. Hours Required)

Reports To: CEO / Leadership Team



Company Overview

We are a growth-focused organization operating across real estate development, distribution, and commercial operations. As we continue to scale, we are building out a strong internal team and are seeking a dedicated Human Resources Manager to lead hiring, employee management, and HR operations.



Position Summary

The Human Resources Manager will be responsible for full-cycle recruiting, employee lifecycle management, and HR operations across the organization.

This role will play a critical part in building the company’s team by leading talent acquisition, developing HR processes, and supporting employee growth and performance.



Key Responsibilities



Talent Acquisition & Recruiting

- Lead full-cycle recruitment, including sourcing, screening, and hiring

- Conduct headhunting and proactive candidate outreach

- Create and manage job postings across recruiting platforms

- Develop, review, and update job descriptions

- Set up and manage company accounts on recruiting platforms

- Monitor applications and maintain candidate pipelines

- Screen candidates and assist in shortlisting

- Coordinate with hiring managers and schedule interviews

- Develop standardized interview formats and evaluation criteria

- Draft and communicate offer letters



Employee Onboarding & Experience

- Manage onboarding process for new hires

- Conduct employee orientation

- Prepare onboarding materials and documentation

- Communicate company policies and expectations



HR Operations & Administration

- Develop and maintain HR policies and procedures

- Ensure compliance with labor laws and regulations

- Maintain employee records and documentation



Compensation, Payroll & Benefits

- Assist in compensation management

- Oversee payroll coordination, deductions, and taxes

- Ensure timely payroll processing

- Support benefits administration



Performance Management & Development

- Coordinate performance reviews

- Work with leadership on evaluations

- Track employee performance and development goals



Training & Development

- Coordinate training programs

- Identify skill-building and development opportunities

- Support continuing education initiatives



Employee Relations & Communication

- Serve as point of contact for employee concerns

- Draft and distribute company communications and memos

- Promote a positive workplace environment



Qualifications

- 5+ years of HR or recruiting experience

- Strong communication and organizational skills

- Ability to multitask and manage priorities

- High attention to detail and professionalism



What We Offer

- Competitive compensation

- Remote work environment (U.S. hours required)

- Opportunity to build HR systems and processes

- Direct collaboration with leadership

- Growth opportunities



Application Instructions

Please include a brief voice or video introduction with your application.

title: Video Editor (Premiere Pro) - YT Videos and Reels
description:
About Us: We are growing a creative production department supporting ongoing video content across YouTube and Social Media platforms. We’re building a team and looking for an editor who is reliable, fast, and creative. This will be an ongoing part-time role, but the hours may vary each month.

* Work with creative briefs and revisions

*Portfolio or links to past work 

*Have experience with long-form YouTube content, tutorials or documentaries

*Comfortable with Adobe Premiere Pro and AfterEffects

*Experience with storytelling editing

*Good communication in English



Nice to Have:

*Sound design experience



Apply With:

1. Portfolio links

2. Detail your editing experience

3. Are you proficient in Premiere Pro? 

4. Are you available to take the paid test asap?

5. How many hours/week can you dedicate to this role?



APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT ADDRESS THESE REQUIREMENTS WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.

title: Pre Press Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for the next qualified member for our Printing Pre - Press /Graphic Design Team



?THE COMPANY?



We manufacture, manage and design digital assets destined for print of all types. Our client base includes a range of corporate, hospitality, event, commercial and architectural products allowing us the opportunity to challenge ourselves with a variety of projects across many different industries.



?YOUR ROLE (FULL TIME)



As a full time tea
mber, you will be required to work with one on one with our sales professionals and with clients in which you will be responsible for PRE-PRESS, LAYOUT, DESIGN of client deliverables across a wide variety of industries.



You meet the following requirements:



Have a minimum of 1 year pre-press



Have a minimum of 3 years graphic design and pre - press.



Fluent in English (written and spoken) with excellent communication skills.



VERY strong organization & administrative skills



Detail oriented.



Ability to follow client brand standards, company procedures and deliver on-time , in a deadline driven environment.



Desire to assist and execute with existing clients and new client work that will be designed and made ready for print



Capable of juggling multiple projects / tasks.



Proficient in Adobe products.



Understanding of MS office and Excel.



Knowledge Webflow, MIS and CRM’s is a bonus



PLEASE NOTE



This is not specifically graphic design position, Its a combination of Pre-Press and Graphic Design, Layout, pre and post preflighting and making print ready files. 







WHAT NEXT?



Interested in joining the Team? We want to get to know you. Please reach out with your resume and portfolio.



Only qualified candidates will be contacted.



Job Type: Full-time



Monday to Friday

title: Ecomm Site and web page developer
description:
Overview:

We are looking for a skilled and detail-oriented developer to design, build, and launch a fully functional e-commerce website featuring a small catalog of 5 products. The ideal candidate will be able to handle both the visual design and technical implementation, delivering a clean, user-friendly, and conversion-focused online store.



Responsibilities:



Design the overall look and feel of the website (UI/UX)

Build and develop a responsive e-commerce site from scratch or using a platform

Set up all essential pages, including:

Homepage

Product pages (5 products)

About page

Contact page

Cart and checkout pages

Policies (Privacy Policy, Terms, Returns, etc.)

Configure payment gateways and ensure secure checkout functionality

Set up shipping options and tax configurations

Ensure mobile responsiveness and cross-browser compatibility

Test the full user journey (browse ? add to cart ? checkout ? confirmation)

Provide basic guidance or documentation for site management after launch



Requirements:



Proven experience building e-commerce websites

Strong design skills with attention to user experience

Proficiency with e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar)

Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript (and relevant frameworks/tools)

Experience integrating payment systems (Stripe, PayPal, etc.)

Ability to deliver a fully functional and polished site independently

Good communication and ability to meet deadlines



Nice to Have:



Experience with branding or logo design

SEO best practices for e-commerce

Experience with analytics setup (Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, etc.)



Deliverables:



Fully functional e-commerce website with 5 products

All pages designed and implemented

Working checkout and payment system

Mobile-optimized and tested site

Handover documentation or walkthrough



How to Apply:

Please include:



Portfolio or examples of past e-commerce projects

Brief description of your process and preferred platform





We’re looking for someone who can take ownership of the project and deliver a seamless, professional online shopping experience.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About Us

We are a newly established travel agency specializing in curated slow travel experiences and wellness retreats in Tuscany. Our mission is to help travelers reconnect—with nature, culture, and themselves—through immersive, mindful journeys. We focus on authenticity, sustainability, and high-quality, personalized experiences.



Role Overview

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Social Media Manager to build and grow our presence on Instagram and
. This role is ideal for a self-starter who thrives in a startup environment and understands how to turn engaging content into meaningful customer conversions.



Key Responsibilities

- Develop and execute a social media strategy aligned with brand values and business goals

- Create, curate, and publish high-quality content (posts, reels, stories) focused on slow travel and wellness experiences

- Manage day-to-day activity on Instagram and
, including scheduling, posting, and community engagement

title: E-Commerce Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote, $1,000/Month Potential)
description:
E-Commerce Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote, $1,000/Month Potential)



$4.00/hour + Commission (top performers earn $1,000+/month)



————————————————————————



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are The Trade Table (
), a growing home improvement e-commerce company selling premium brands like Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, and more. We are looking for a driven, sales-focused operations manager to help us scale to $30K–$50K+ in monthly revenue.



This is not a virtual assistant role. This is a sales-first operations role where your #1 job is converting leads into orders. We generate high-quality inbound leads through Google Ads — your job is to follow up, build relationships, and close deals on high-ticket home improvement products ($500–$6,000+ per order, $17K being the highest all time).



We have the leads. We have the brands. We have the ad engine. We need someone who can close.



————————————————————————



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:



- You have real e-commerce experience (Shopify preferred)

- You are confident on the phone and can close sales

- You thrive under pressure and want to earn based on performance

- You want to grow with a company, not just fill a seat



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You prefer quiet backend work over sales calls

- You need hand-holding and constant direction

- You shy away from targets and accountability

- You see this as "just a VA job"



————————————————————————



WHAT YOU'LL DO (In Priority Order)



Your #1 job is SALES. Everything else is secondary.



1. Order Processing (Highest Priority) — When an order comes in, you process it immediately. Submit to distributor, confirm with manufacturer, verify lead time, update customer. Orders are revenue. Nothing delays this.



2. Lead Follow-Up — Every open lead gets worked until they buy, decline, or are disqualified. Phone, text,
. Leads never sit idle. You follow up relentlessly.



3. Cold Outreach — Minimum 20 business-to-business calls per day. The goal is conversations that generate new sales opportunities.



4. Brand Outreach — Minimum 5 brand/dealer calls per day. We are constantly adding new brands to our catalog. Find the brand, call them, secure dealer access.



5. Secondary (only after sales work is done) — Shipping and order tracking, YouTube channel management, supplier research for future product lines, hiring support.



What you will NOT do: Product uploads, catalog management, collection work. We have a separate tea
mber for that.



————————————————————————



COMPENSATION



Base Pay: $4.00/hour USD



Commission (per order — this is where it gets exciting):



We want you to earn well. Our commission structure rewards closers, especially on big orders.



Each order gets a $100 Google Ads cost allocation. Your commission is based on Real Profit (Revenue minus Product Cost minus Shipping minus Fees minus $100). The more profitable the order, the more you earn ($100 minimum profit):



Under $100 Real Profit = $5 flat

$100 – $300 Real Profit = 7% of Real Profit

Over $300 Real Profit = 10% of Real Profit



Important: The company keeps a minimum of $100 profit on every order. If the commission would bring profit below $100, it gets capped. This only affects mid-range orders — on big orders you always get the full percentage.



Real examples from our order history:



$839 Range Hood — Real Profit $77 — Your Commission: $5.00

$1,424 Range Hood — Real Profit $129 — Your Commission: $9.01

$2,199 Range Hood — Real Profit $214 — Your Commission: $14.95

$2,919 Sauna Stove — Real Profit $235 — Your Commission: $16.46

$5,473 Sauna/Heater — Real Profit $742 — Your Commission: $74.22

$6,140 Hot Tub — Real Profit $867 — Your Commission: $86.72



One big order can pay $75–$90+ in commission. We get these opportunities regularly — we need someone who can close them.



Weekly Performance Bonus (weekly revenue target: $7,500):



Hit $7,500+ = +$10

Every $1,000 over $7,500 = +$10 more

$5,000 – $7,500 = No deduction

$2,500 – $5,000 = -$2.50

Under $2,500 = -$5.00



What your total monthly earnings look like:



$15,000 in monthly revenue = ~$835/month total pay

$20,000 in monthly revenue = ~$886/month total pay

$25,000 in monthly revenue = ~$928/month total pay

$30,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,010/month total pay

$35,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,052/month total pay

$50,000 in monthly revenue = ~$1,192/month total pay



At $30K+ in monthly revenue, you are earning $5.75+/hour effective rate with room to grow as the business scales. Our goal is $50K–$100K+/month, and your earnings grow with us.



————————————————————————



REQUIREMENTS



Must have:



- E-commerce experience (Shopify strongly preferred)

- Sales experience — you have closed deals before, not just processed orders

- Strong English communication (written and verbal — you will be on the phone with US customers)

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace for phone calls

- Available 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central US Time (CST), Monday – Friday

- Self-motivated — you will be the only person on sales daily



Strongly preferred:



- Experience with home improvement, appliance, or high-ticket product sales

- Familiarity with Google Ads lead funnels

- Experience with CRM or lead tracking systems

- Comfortable making outbound cold calls



————————————————————————



ABOUT US



The Trade Table is a home improvement e-commerce company with dealer relationships with 100+ brands. We have been in business for 4 years, generated $334K+ in lifetime revenue, and are growing fast — revenue was up 65% year-to-date.



We run highly efficient Google Ads campaigns (25x+ ROAS) that generate a strong pipeline of inbound leads. Our biggest gap is converting those leads into closed orders. That is exactly what this role is built to solve.



We are a small, fast-moving team. You will work directly with the owner and have a real impact on the company's growth. This is not a corporate job — this is a ground-floor opportunity with a company that is scaling.



Our brands include: Victory, Sauna Life, Kamado Joe, Masterbuilt, ILVE, Capital, Sandia, HUUM, Hooga, Sports Attack, and many more.



————————————————————————



HOW TO APPLY



 
 with subject line "$100K/month Ecom Closer"



1. A brief message about your e-commerce and sales experience

2. Resume

3. Your IQ test result from: 
/take-the-test/ (free version is
ed to you)

4. voice recording



Bonus: If you have examples of sales results you've driven (revenue numbers, conversion rates, etc.), include them. We value results over resumes.



————————————————————————



INTERVIEW PROCESS



1. Application review

2. Initial interview (video call)

3. Final interview (video call)

4. Trial period (paid)



We move fast. If you're the right fit, you could be starting within days.

title: Freelance Video Editor and Coloristv
description:
Job Title: Freelance Video Editor (High-Volume) – Color Grading, Storytelling & S-Log3 Expertise



Location: Remote / Work from Anywhere 



Compensation: Commission-based (percentage per project, per video, or per batch – scalable with volume, quality, and speed). High earning potential for consistent, high-output performers handling large workloads. Earnings tied directly to results and client satisfaction— fixed salary applicable where met. 



About the Role

We are building a reliable team of skilled freelance video editors capable of thriving in a fast-paced, high-volume environment. You’ll transform raw footage into engaging, polished videos for social media, real estate tours, weddings, corporate promos, lifestyle content, and more. This is ideal for hardworking editors who love grinding through batches while delivering cinematic quality every time.



Key Responsibilities

•  Edit high-volume video projects efficiently (e.g., multiple shorts/reels per day or long-form batches under tight deadlines)

•  Assemble raw footage into compelling narratives with strong storytelling and visual pacing

•  Perform professional color grading and correction to achieve cinematic looks

•  Handle S-Log3 (Sony Log) footage expertly: exposure recovery, dynamic range management, LUT application, and creative grading

•  Create clean, accurate subtitles, captions, and on-screen text (timed, styled, and optimized for platforms like YouTube, Instagram, TikTok)

•  Use industry-standard tools for cutting, transitions, effects, audio syncing/mixing, and final exports

•  Collaborate closely with creators/photographers/directors to match vision, incorporate feedback quickly, and iterate

•  Maintain organized workflows, backups, and file delivery standards



Requirements

•  Proven experience in high-volume video editing (e.g., daily/weekly output of shorts, reels, or batch projects without sacrificing quality)

•  Strong proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (especially Premiere Pro, After Effects) and DaVinci Resolve (must be comfortable in both for editing and advanced grading)

•  Expert-level color grading skills, with demonstrated ability to elevate footage creatively and technically

•  Solid experience in storytelling and visual capture—crafting emotional flow, rhythm, and engagement that hooks viewers

•  Hands-on experience working with S-Log3 footage (Sony’s log profile for high dynamic range—recovery, normalization, and cinematic grading required)

•  Proficient in creating subtitles and captions (manual timing, styling, accessibility, and platform optimization)

•  Extremely hardworking and dedicated—self-motivated, reliable under pressure, and committed to fast turnarounds and quality

•  Portfolio required: Show before/after examples, especially with S-Log3 graded work, high-volume projects, color-graded pieces, and captioned videos



What We Offer

•  Fully remote, flexible freelance work—choose your volume and schedule (but expect consistent projects for top performers)

•  Commission structure that rewards speed, quality, and reliability (higher rates/% for proven high-output editors)

•  Steady stream of ongoing work across genres (real estate, weddings, corporate, social content, etc.)

•  Opportunity to grow earnings through performance and build long-term partnerships

•  Direct feedback to help refine your craft and increase your take-home



How to Apply

 your:

•  Resume or brief bio highlighting high-volume experience

•  Portfolio link (Vimeo, YouTube, Google Drive, etc.) with before/after clips, S-Log3 graded examples, captioned videos, and storytelling pieces



We review applications rolling and may request a quick test edit (e.g., grading a short S-Log3 clip or adding captions to a sample). If you’re a dedicated editor who thrives on volume and delivers cinematic results, we want to hear from you!

title: Sales Operations Analyst
description:
About the Company

We’re CatchCo, makers of Mystery Tackle Box — the original fishing subscription box since 2012. Our mission is to Rescue Humanity From the Indoors. Today, we help millions get outside with products sold at Walmart, Dick’s Sporting Goods, Amazon, and our website. We’ve moved past the venture-backed hype and are now under new ownership, building a lean, profitable, and lasting business. If you believe in getting people outdoors and doing work that matters, you’ll fit right in.



Position Overview

Mystery Tackle Box (MTB) is seeking a detail-oriented and analytically driven Sales Operations Analyst to support our Retail & Marketplaces Team. This role is the operational backbone of our retail sales and marketplace business, owning data, reporting, customer service and process infrastructure that enables our sales team to manage accounts effectively, hit revenue targets, and scale our retail partnerships. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, loves digging into numbers, and takes pride in optimizing processes for efficiency.



Core Responsibilities



Reporting & Business Intelligence

Build, maintain, and distribute recurring reports on retail and marketplace sales performance, sell-through rates, inventory levels, and key account metrics for the VP of Retail & Marketplaces and Retail Account Manager.

Develop dashboards that surface real-time visibility into account health, shipment trends, and revenue vs. plan.

Analyze sell-through data by SKU, retailer, and season to identify risks and opportunities; proactively flag anomalies and recommend corrective actions.

Prepare ad hoc analyses and materials for retailer line reviews, buyer meetings, and internal business reviews.



Inventory & Demand Planning Support

Partner with the inventory controller and sales team to track item-level inventory positions across MTB warehouse and retailer networks.

Maintain demand forecasts and replenishment models to align supply with sell-through and turnover goals, avoiding both stockouts and overstock situations.

Monitor marketplace and retail account inventory regularly, flagging items at risk of out-of-stock or excess inventory ahead of peak seasons.

Assist in managing purchase order workflows and tracking inbound shipment timelines in coordination with the operations team.



Sales Operations & Account Support

Maintain CRM data hygiene for retail accounts and vendor accounts, ensuring account information, contact records, activity logs, and pipeline data are accurate and up to date.

Support order management processes, including tracking open orders, coordinating with the operations team on logistics issues, and flagging delivery discrepancies.

Assist the sales team with preparation of line review materials, seasonal proposals, innovation pipeline presentations, and tradeshow preparation.

Track and reconcile promotional programs, co-op funding, and retail media investments against plan; report on ROI and flag discrepancies.

Maintain organized records of retailer agreements, pricing files, program terms, and promotional calendars.



Cross-Functional Collaboration

Act as a connective tissue between sales, marketing, merchandising, and operations—ensuring data and insights flow efficiently across teams.

Support product development and merchandising teams by synthesizing retail account feedback and sell-through data into actionable input for assortment and innovation decisions.

Assist the sales team with business development pipeline tracking for prospective retail partners.



Requirements

Experience

2+ years of experience in sales operations, retail analytics, account management support, or a related role.

Experience in a consumer products, e-commerce, or retail environment is strongly preferred.



Skills

Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and/or Google Sheets; comfort working with large datasets and building models from scratch.

Experience with CRM platforms (e.g. HubSpot) and data/reporting tools (e.g. Looker) preferred.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail.

Solid understanding of retail fundamentals: sell-through, turns, margin, promotional requirements, and basic supply chain concepts.

Clear, concise communicator—able to translate data into simple narratives for sales and leadership audiences.

Highly organized and self-directed; capable of managing multiple workstreams and deadlines simultaneously.

Collaborative mindset with a proactive, service-oriented approach to supporting internal partners.



How to Apply:

To apply, Please use the subject line: 'Sales Operations Analyst – CatchCo – [Your Name]'.

title: Operations Director & Integrator (Property Group)
description:
Job Title: Operations Director / Business Integrator (Property Group)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)



Salary: $1,250 – $1,500 USD/month starting base (Guaranteed increase to $2,000 - $2,500+ after 90-day successful integration)



Hours: Full-Time (40 hours/week) | Shift: Must overlap with UK Business Hours (9 AM – 5 PM UK)



About the Role

We are a high-performing UK Property Group (BRR model in Leeds) operating 4 distinct brands across Lettings, Sourcing, Refurbishment, and Personal Branding.



We are seeking a high-level Operations Director to serve as the Integrator for the business. You will be the right-hand to the CEO, taking full accountability for the "Engine Room." You will oversee 7 key departments to ensure the business scales efficiently without the CEO's involvement in daily operations.



The 7 Departments You Will Lead:

You will be responsible for the results and execution within these 7 functions:



Administrative / HR (Dept 1): Building and maintaining the company’s "structure"—managing SOPs, recruitment, and onboarding as we scale.



Marketing & Sales (Dept 2): Driving organic visibility and lead flow for our 4 brands. Ensuring the message is clear and leads are being captured.



Finance (Dept 3): Managing cash flow, refurbishment budgets, invoice processing, and preparing documentation for property refinances.



Production / Services (Dept 4): This is our "Core Business"—managing the end-to-end Property Management lifecycle, tenant finds, and refurbishment coordination.



Quality Control (Dept 5): Ensuring every task meets our "High Standard." Reviewing compliance (GSC, EICR) and ensuring zero errors in documentation.



Public Relations (Dept 6): Enhancing the reputation of our 4 brands and the CEO’s personal brand. Handling community management and external relations.



Executive / Management (Dept 7): Working directly with the CEO to track KPIs, set weekly targets, and manage the overall direction of the company.



Who You Are (The 3 Crucial Qualities)

Extreme Ownership: You don't bring problems; you bring solutions. You own the results of all 7 departments.



Systems Architect: You love organized folders, clear checklists, and refining SOPs to make them faster and better.



Professional Resilience: You are a high-EQ communicator who can handle direct, efficient feedback from a busy CEO and command respect from rough local contractors.



Requirements:

Proven experience in high-level Operations Management or as a Business Integrator.



Expertise in Project Management software (ClickUp/Asana) and Google Workspace.



Exceptional English (written and verbal).



Ability to toggle between 4 distinct brands without losing focus or accuracy.



Quantity Surveying or UK Property experience is a massive bonus.



MANDATORY APPLICATION TEST

title: Virtual Front Desk Representative
description:
At Moxie, we empower entrepreneurs to launch, run, and grow their own aesthetics businesses with a combination of software and services. In less than 2 years, we have grown from an idea to a team of 50, with a business that is in the top-decile in terms of growth, and a remote-first team that has been self-described as high-trust, low ego, high output.



The Role



Many of our nurses are first-time business owners, and some are still working other jobs. Managing their own calendar, engaging with new client leads, and being available for calls and text messages with questions can be overwhelming. Our Virtual Front Desk ensures that every client interaction is handled with care and professionalism, giving our Nurses more time to focus on what they do best - taking care of their patients. Having already onboarded a stellar tea
mber, we are looking to expand our roster for the Advanced offering. 



As a Virtual Front Desk, you will support a portfolio of 4-5 MedSpas as their virtual front desk



-Answer incoming phone calls and messages, 

-Appointment setting: Close inbound leads by calling and texting with them via our CRM,

-Manage appointments including rescheduling, 

-Answers basic questions (e.g. about the location, opening hours, etc.)

-Escalate any questions you can't answer to the MedSpa owner.



We’re looking for:

-Experience in a customer service-oriented role, preferably as a Virtual Assistant, Front Desk Operator, or in a similar capacity.

-Background in the healthcare industry, with an understanding of its unique challenges and requirements.

-Experience in sales, with a knack for converting leads into valuable client engagements.

-Availability to work during US hours and follow US holidays 

-Exceptional proficiency in both written and verbal English, with a neutral accent for clear communication.

-A confident and independent problem-solver who can navigate the complexities of the role with minimal supervision.



To apply, please click on the link below:





Thank you and good luck!

title: ROCKSTAR ACCOUNTANT
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training, generous Christmas bonus

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive

- Competitive Advantages (Preferred)

- Industry background in HVAC, solar, generators, roofing, foundations, or electrical

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

- Experience using any of the following: Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Sera, Jobber, Service Trade, Acculynx, etc

- Experience using Keeper.app



Who Should Apply

- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply

- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?



Apply Here: 
reers/bookkeeping-role

Pivotl - Where exceptional professionals build exceptional careers.

title: Senior Short Sale Processor – Real Estate
description:
We are looking for a tenacious, high-energy Senior Short Sale Processor to take full ownership of our short sale files. This is a remote, part-time role (20 hours/week) designed for someone who knows how to navigate the complexities of lender portals and bank negotiations. We need someone persistent, assertive, and driven to get approvals across the finish line.



You will work US Business Hours (EST) with flexibility, ensuring that banks, realtors, buyers, and sellers are consistently updated.



Top Responsibilities:

Lender Liaison: Communicate and follow up aggressively with banks, realtors, sellers, and title companies to move files toward closing.

Document Management: Collect, review, and organize complex "hardship packages" (financials, tax returns, bank statements, etc.) to ensure they are audit-ready.

Package Submission: Prepare and submit complete short sale packages via lender portals and respond immediately to any "missing doc" requests.

Foreclosure Tracking: Monitor foreclosure timelines and coordinate critical steps like BPOs/appraisals, payoff statements, and postponement requests.

Case Logging: Maintain meticulous digital notes and follow-up history for every file.



Requirements:

Must-Have: Proven experience in short sale processing with a track record of successfully obtaining short sale approvals.

Must-Have: Fluent and excellent verbal and written English skills (you will be negotiating on the phone daily).

Must-Have: A "hustler" personality—you are persistent, a self-starter, and don't take "no" for an answer from bank representatives.

Technical: Proficiency with standard office/PDF software and experience using VoIP phone systems.



Perks & Pay:

Hourly Rate: $
/month (depending on experience).

13th-Month Pay: Included.

Incentives of $50 per completed deal

Holidays: Paid holidays provided.

Flexibility: While you must be available during US business hours, we offer flexibility in how you structure your 20 hours.



About Us:

We are a fast-paced Title company operating in multiple U.S States. We specialize in distressed assets and pride ourselves on efficiency and speed. We value tea
mbers who work independently and take initiative without needing to be micromanaged.



Application Instructions:

Please follow these instructions exactly as applications that do not follow this format exactly will be ignored.

Change the subject line to: “I’m a hard worker [Insert the name of the CEO of Freddie Mac”

(Label this answer 1.) Why are you interested in this position? (2–3 sentences max)

(Label this answer 2.) What specific experience do you have with short sale processing and lender portals? (3–5 sentences)

(Label this answer 3.) Can you work EST business hours Monday–Friday?

(Label this answer 4.) Repeat your answer to question #2 to demonstrate you read this posting thoroughly.



Applications must follow this exact format to be considered. Your application will not be considered if you do not follow instructions exactly. Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a video interview to discuss experience, learning style, and cultural fit with our team.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Short-Form Ads / Ecommerce / Sports Brand)



We are hiring a full-time video editor to help our creative team produce more short-form video ads and organic content.



We run a fast-growing ecommerce brand in the sports space, and this role is about taking ideas, scripts, and raw footage and turning them into strong, fast-paced edits that are built to hold attention and drive performance.



This is not a “basic editor” role. We want someone with good taste, strong English understanding, attention to detail, and the ability to work quickly and independently.



What you’ll be doing

Editing short-form video ads for paid social

Editing organic social content for Instagram, TikTok and other platforms

Turning scripts and creative briefs into finished video edits

Working from raw footage provided by our team

Sourcing extra clips from TikTok or other online sources when needed

Adding captions, pacing, hooks, sound, graphics and structure to improve retention

Creating multiple variations of winning edits when required

Working closely with our creative team to improve outputs over time

What we’re looking for

Strong video editing ability

Good English comprehension

Great attention to detail

Fast turnaround speed

Strong judgment on pacing, hooks and what keeps content engaging

Ability to follow a brief properly without needing constant hand-holding

Comfortable working independently and showing initiative

Experience editing short-form content for ecommerce, direct response, or performance marketing is a big plus

Software / skills



You should be confident using editing software such as:



Adobe Premiere Pro

CapCut

Final Cut Pro

or similar tools

Important



This role is about execution, not owning overall creative strategy.



Our team will often provide:



the script

the angle

the concept

the footage



Your job is to turn that into a high-quality edit quickly and well.



Application process



We will filter applicants in 3 stages:



1. Initial application

Please send:



your CV

portfolio / examples of work

a short message explaining your experience with short-form editing



2. TestGorilla assessment

Shortlisted candidates will complete:



English test

Attention to Detail test



3. Practical editing task

Final shortlisted candidates will complete a paid editing task.



You will be:



given a script created by our creative team

given access to a Google Drive folder of raw clips

allowed to source extra clips from TikTok or elsewhere if it improves the outcome

given 1 hour to complete the task

required to record your screen and process on Loom



We are judging:



quality of final output

speed

decision-making

initiative

ability to work independently

how well you follow the brief

To apply



Please start your application with the words:

“I read the full brief.”



Applications that do not include this will not be considered.

title: Short Form Content Operator | Video Editing + Content Execution
description:
We are hiring a Short Form Content Operator to help keep our marketing active, organized, and consistent.



Your job is to take raw footage, photos, ideas, and content direction and turn them into clean, on brand assets that are edited, organized, and ready to post on time.



This is not a creative director role.

This is not a strategy only role.

This is an execution role.



We need someone who moves fast, stays organized, follows through, and communicates clearly without being chased down.



If you need repeated reminders, miss deadlines, or wait around for heavy hand holding, this is not the role for you.



Primary Objective



Keep content from going silent by making sure video and photo assets are consistently edited, organized, and prepared for posting across platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Edit raw video into short form content built for retention and engagement



Repurpose one piece of content into multiple usable assets



Edit and format photos for posts, covers, thumbnails, carousels, and promo content



Add captions, text overlays, simple branding, and clean formatting



Organize raw footage, finished assets, folders, and content libraries properly



Follow a content calendar and prepare content on time



Prepare content for posting and scheduling across platforms



Communicate clearly when something is missing, delayed, or unclear



Deliver work without needing repeated follow up



What We Need From You



Strong video editing ability



Basic photo editing and content design ability



A clean eye for formatting and presentation



Strong organization and file management



Ability to follow direction and still make smart execution decisions



Reliable communication



Respect for deadlines



Speed and consistency



Preferred Experience



Experience editing short form content for social media



Experience with CapCut, Premiere, Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools



Experience supporting a brand or business with ongoing content production



Experience preparing or scheduling content for posting



Who This Role Is Best For



This role is best for someone who enjoys production and execution more than brainstorming and talking.



You do not need to be the mastermind behind the brand.

You do need to be someone who can take direction, move fast, stay organized, and help content get out consistently.



Creativity matters.

Execution, speed, and follow through matter more.



Performance Expectations



Content is delivered on time



Edits are clean and need minimal revisions



Files stay organized



Communication is clear and timely



Content stays moving instead of going quiet



Work Details



Remote

Part time

Around 25 hours per week to start

Flexible schedule, but deadlines must be respected

Starting at $5 per hour

Room to grow for the right person



Application Instructions



To apply, send:



A short message introducing yourself



Links to your best 3 to 5 relevant samples



The tools you use for video editing and photo editing



Any experience you have with scheduling or posting content



In the first line of your application, write the word consistent, name your main editing software, and tell me your internet speed



In the last line, answer this in one sentence:

What do you do first when files are messy and instructions are incomplete?



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Web Designer & Google Analytics Specialist
description:
Job Summary:



We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated Web Analytics and Web Development Specialist to join our dynamic team. This hybrid role involves both web analytics and web development responsibilities. The successful candidate will be responsible for setting up and maintaining web analytics platforms, as well as designing, developing, and maintaining websites. Expertise in Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, and strong experience with WordPress is essential. This role also requires problem-solving skills to ensure websites are functioning correctly, verifying functionality, and performing regular backups. This is a full time job during EST Timezone.



Key Responsibilities:



Install and Configure Google Analytics:



Implement Google Analytics on company websites and applications.

Ensure proper tracking of website traffic, user behavior, and key metrics.

Customize tracking codes to capture specific data and events.

Conversion Setup:



Define and set up conversion goals in Google Analytics.

Implement tracking for key actions such as purchases, form submissions, and other conversions.

Regularly monitor and report on conversion rates and suggest improvements.

Tag Manager:



Manage and deploy marketing tags using Google Tag Manager.

Ensure tags are correctly implemented and firing as expected.

Troubleshoot and resolve tag-related issues.

Integrate with Google Ads:



Link Google Analytics with Google Ads to track campaign performance.

Set up and manage conversion tracking for Google Ads campaigns.

Optimize ads based on performance data and insights.

Web Development and Design:



Design, develop, and maintain company websites, ensuring they are visually appealing, user-friendly, and optimized for performance.

Strong experience with WordPress, including theme customization and plugin management.

Troubleshoot and resolve website issues, ensuring all functionalities work correctly.

Perform regular website backups and ensure disaster recovery plans are in place.

Knowledge of WPEngine is a plus.

Qualifications:



Experience:



Minimum of 3-5 years of experience in web analytics and web development.

Proven experience with Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Google Ads.

Extensive experience with WordPress and web development technologies.

Technical Skills:



Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.

Preference given to exceptional JavaScript skills

Strong web design skills, including experience with responsive design.

Familiarity with web hosting platforms, preferably WPEngine.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimization.

Other Skills:



Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy.





Requirements:

•High English Proficiency (Written and Spoken)

•Dependable Computer - must be Windows 10 able to run Microsoft Teams and Office 365

•Dependable Internet Connection

•Quiet Working Space

•Able to work Monday thru Friday 8 am - 5 pm EST (8 pm - 5 am PHT)

description:

title: Financial Coach - USA
description:
Job Title: Financial Empowerment Coach

Are you passionate about helping others transform their relationship with money?

We are looking for a high-energy, empathetic, and results-driven Financial Coach to join our team. In this role, you won’t just be crunching numbers; you’ll be a mentor, a strategist, and a catalyst for life-changing financial habits.

The ideal candidate blends deep financial literacy with the "soft skills" of behavioral coaching and a natural ability to identify growth opportunities for our clients.

The Role & Responsibilities:

Curriculum Delivery: Facilitate 12 financial courses per year (one per month), per group, 

 guiding groups through core topics like budgeting, debt elimination, and wealth building.  you will have input on tweaking the course structure before the first cohort starts. 

Client Mentorship: Conduct 2 high-impact 1-on-1 interactions per month per client, providing personalized accountability and tailored action plans.

Behavioral Coaching: Help clients identify and overcome the emotional hurdles and "money scripts" that hold them back.

Growth Mindset : Identify clients who would benefit from deeper levels of support or advanced programs, comfortably navigating "upsell" conversations that align with the client’s long-term goals.

What We’re Looking For:

The Educator: You can take complex financial concepts and make them simple, engaging, and actionable for a diverse audience.

The Listener: You have a "coach first" mentality—asking powerful questions rather than just giving directives.

The Closer: You possess a subtle "sales" instinct. You understand that offering additional services isn't just a transaction; it's providing the client with more tools for success.

Financial Fluency: Solid understanding of personal finance fundamentals (credit, cash flow, debt reduction strategies, etc.).

Requirements:

Proven experience in financial coaching, counseling, or a related field (e.g., life coaching with a focus on finance) Accounting teachers can be a contender.

Exceptional communication and presentation skills (virtual and/or in-person).

Comfortable with sales targets or "value-add" performance metrics.



USA - graveyard shifts.

title: Payroll Specialist
description:
Position Overview



The Payroll Specialist is responsible for owning the full payroll function for multiple small business clients using QuickBooks Online Payroll. This is a fully remote role requiring strong technical expertise, independent execution, and a deep understanding of payroll compliance across multiple states. This individual will manage payroll onboarding, processing, tax filings, and ongoing compliance with minimal oversight, while communicating directly with clients and providing regular status and performance updates to the owner.



Core Responsibilities



Payroll Operations & Processing



Process payroll (bi-weekly, semi-monthly, monthly, and off-cycle) using QuickBooks Online Payroll

Maintain accurate employee records, compensation structures, and tax settings

Review and validate payroll data, including hours, bonuses, deductions, and reimbursements

Ensure timely and accurate payroll runs across all assigned clients



Payroll Tax & Compliance



Prepare and file federal, state, and local payroll tax returns (monthly, quarterly, annual)

Ensure timely tax payments and filings to avoid penalties

Stay current on federal, multi-state payroll regulations, and employment laws

Identify and resolve payroll discrepancies, notices, and compliance issues



Client Onboarding & Account Setup



Lead payroll onboarding for new clients from start to finish

Register employer accounts with federal and state agencies as required

Set up payroll systems, tax accounts, and employee profiles in QBO Payroll

Ensure proper configuration of tax settings, reporting requirements, and compliance structures



Client Communication & Reporting



Serve as the primary point of contact for payroll-related client matters

Communicate directly with clients to gather information, resolve issues, and provide updates

Provide clear guidance on payroll processes, compliance, and deadlines

Proactively communicate issues, risks, and recommendations

Report directly to the owner with regular updates on client status, deadlines, and overall payroll performance



Skills & Experience Required



2+ years of payroll experience, preferably with small business clients

Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online Payroll (required)

QuickBooks Payroll Certification (preferred)

Experience with multi-state payroll compliance and employer registrations

Working knowledge of federal and state employment and payroll tax laws

High attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple deadlines simultaneously

Strong written and verbal communication skills



What Success Looks Like



Payroll is processed accurately and on time—no surprises

Tax filings are completed correctly with zero penalties or late notices

New clients are onboarded smoothly and are fully compliant from day one

Issues are identified early and solved without escalation

Clients feel confident and clear about their payroll operations

The owner has full visibility into payroll status without needing to chase updates



Work Expectations



Fully remote role with reliable internet and a secure work environment

Ability to work independently and manage workload without daily oversight

Use internal systems to track tasks, deadlines, and client communication

Provide consistent reporting and updates to leadership on progress and performance

Participate in tea
etings, trainings, and performance check-ins

Maintain strict confidentiality and adhere to data security standards

Flexibility to handle increased workload during peak periods (quarter-end, year-end)

title: Creative Strategist – High Output Role
description:
We are looking for a creative strategist who can generate, write, and execute content at scale for our growing brands in the United States and Germany. The ideal candidate will be responsible for producing fifteen new content concepts per day, writing engaging UGC-style scripts, developing hooks and ad angles, and guiding editors with clear creative direction. You will also be expected to continuously iterate and improve content based on performance metrics.



The right person for this role is fast-thinking, highly self-motivated, and able to work under high volume and pressure. You should have the ability to research markets deeply, analyze competitors, and turn trends into winning content quickly. A strong understanding of TikTok and Meta ads, UGC storytelling, and direct-response marketing is essential. Candidates must demonstrate proven results or prior experience working with recognized brands. 



This is a full-time remote position with a base salary of $1,000 per month and the opportunity for an additional $500 to $1,000 in performance bonuses. Interested applicants should send their portfolio, the brands they have worked with, and a brief explanation of how they create successful content, or message my assistant on WhatsApp at 
.

title: Technical Writer
description:
A US-based consulting company is looking to hire a hard-working and self-motivated Filipino Technical Writer to create and document processes and procedures for our clients. Impeccable mastery of the English language (both written and verbal) is a must. 



This role is 100% work from home.



Your responsibilities will include but not be limited to:



• Map process flows based on a recording of the consultant interviewing the client. This includes creating flow charts and diagrams. 

• Write high-quality, clear, easy-to-understand step-by-step procedures based on a recording of an interview of a client or videos submitted directly by clients on how they perform certain tasks.

• Organize the material in a cloud-based process documentation software or Learning Management System software. 

• Use videos, screenshots, links, etc to provide a balance between written material and demonstration of the material and to ensure full understanding. 

• Identify points of improvement and communicate it clearly to the consultant you are working with 

• Use our internal systems to communicate about their work and report daily on progress. 





About You:



• 3+ years of experience in technical writing, creating instructions, creating flow charts, process mapping, and process improvement background. 

• Ability to translate highly technical information into easily understandable information

• Very good understanding of the business world and high familiarity with common terms 

• Experience in process documentation and process improvement 

• Ability to duplicate what is said and translate it into writing

• Excellent mastery of the English language including grammar, punctuation and spelling. 

• Good mastery of MS Products (Word, Excel and PowerPoint) and Google suite 

• Detail-oriented, efficient and concise

• Ability to critical thinking and problem-solving





Compensation: 



• Competitive salary

• Training and mentorship

• Awesome culture and work-from-home set-up

• SSS, Philhealth, and Pag-ibig

• Healthcare (HMO)

• 13th Month Pay

• Paid incentive leave 

• Yearly performance review





How to apply:



Please fill out this application form: 
. We will only respond to candidates that meet the above qualifications.

We are a United States based, nationwide Real Estate Investor and Wholesaler. We are seeking an experienced designer and robust scraper skilled at using automation systems such as, Python and/ or Beautiful Soup, Selenium, Octoparse etc.  Our objective is to derive new motivated seller leads as well as enhance existing leads from U.S.  County Property Appraiser sites, People Search programs and other information sites.  Part
 Full time.  Must have good English communication skills.  Send your Resume and Voice Recording to :

title: Home Health Insurance Credentialing
description:
. We are seeking a Credentialing Specialist who will be responsible for maintaining individual provider files, completing credentialing applications, and other associated duties that support the credentialing requirements through Availity and direct payer companies. 



Payer Contracting: Prepare and submit commercial and Medicaid organizational applications, manage MCO enrollment and revalidation processes, and maintain contracting trackers and renewal timelines.

title: Operational Team Lead-Home Healthcare
description:
The Operational Manager will oversee the day-to-day operations of the agency, ensuring compliance, staffing efficiency, client satisfaction, and administrative accountability. This role reports directly to the Director and is responsible for ensuring systems run smoothly with constant oversight. Must have at least 4 plus years in Homecare or Healthcare industry, 3 years Operational management experience. Having experience with Axiscare system would put you over the top.





Key Responsibilities:

Operations & Team Oversight



Supervise schedulers, HR/onboarding staff, and administrative personnel



Conduct daily morning check-ins and end-of-day recap meetings



Track census, new client intakes, and caregiver onboarding progress



Monitor client satisfaction and resolve operational concerns



Staffing & Scheduling



Oversee caregiver staffing and coverage



Assist with resolving call-outs and scheduling gaps



Ensure proper documentation is submitted and filed timely



Compliance & Documentation



Monitor medical records compliance



Ensure onboarding files are complete and audit-ready



Track i
 reports, grievances, and quality assurance measures



Reporting & Communication



Provide daily operational briefs to the Director



Maintain dashboards for census, staffing ratios, and new hires



Identify workflow inefficiencies and implement solutions



Qualifications



Create and manage new systems and solutions base of the needs of the business, social media and CRM knowledge.



Strong leadership and team management skills



Experience with caregiver scheduling systems



Knowledge of Medicaid/Private Pay home care processes preferred



Organized, detail-oriented, and solution-focused



Comfortable working independently in a fully remote environment



Preferred Skills



Experience with AXISCARE is a must!



HR and onboarding management experience





Strong communication and problem-solving skills

title: we are recruiting a Funnel Builder
description:
Hello, we are recruiting a Funnel Builder with knowledge of the Funnelish platform:

Responsibilities:



• Knowledge of the Funnelish platform



• Design skills

(Good understanding of layout, responsiveness, user experience, and visual organization.)



• Basic knowledge of copywriting and conversion

Understanding of offer structure, CTA, headline, social proof, and other elements that improve conversion rates.



• Basic HTML/CSS knowledge

Not always required, but very helpful for adjustments and customizations.



• Organization and execution

Ability to build complete funnels, fix errors quickly, and meet deadlines.



• Funnel creation and cloning using our base templates, mainly in Dutch, German, and French



• Copyright/content correction according to native-level language fluency



• Strong work ethic, commitment, and punctuality



We value honest attitudes and a consistent stance. We are expanding our business and you will have opportunities to grow with us.

title: Senior IT Engineer
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



If you feel this position aligns with your skills and experience, please fill out the application form here:


/bepartofourteam.





We’re looking for a hands-on senior IT professional who can support clients at all levels while also leading or assisting with IT projects and driving innovative solutions.

Our senior tea
mbers are critical to supporting our awesome clients and their users. They leverage industry-leading tools and expertise to resolve complex issues, prevent future problems, and improve client IT environments.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys solving challenging technical problems while also designing and implementing improvements that make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Support (All Levels)



Provide technical support to clients via phone,
, and remote access—handling everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced escalations.

Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues for multiple clients.

Perform O365 and Windows administration, user account management, and access provisioning.

Support and troubleshoot VOIP systems (e.g., 3CX).

Manage and maintain RMM and PSA tools (e.g., Datto, Halo).

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate routine tasks and streamline operations.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication



Log issues and resolutions accurately for future reference.

Communicate effectively with clients and vendors to ensure smooth resolutions and project delivery.



Requirements



Previous experience working in an MSP environment is a plus.

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Strong attention to detail and follow-through – “never let it go until it’s solved.”

Demonstrable experience working with Windows systems (client/server) and O365 administration.

Proficiency in advanced troubleshooting methodologies.

Scripting skills, particularly in PowerShell, to automate tasks and improve efficiency.

Experience with VOIP systems and a solid understanding of network infrastructure.

Familiarity with RMM and PSA platforms used in MSP environments (e.g., Datto, Halo).

We are heavy users of Office 365 and Azure, so you’ll need to have solid experience and know the fundamentals or demonstrate skills in something very similar..

Ability to handle difficult tasks, set proper expectations, and deliver solutions within a reasonable timeframe.

Out-of-the-box thinker – proactive, creative, and always looking to improve processes.

Willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

title: Ecommerce Operations Manager / Marketplace Manager
description:
We are seeking a results-driven E commerce Operations Manager / Marketplace Manager to oversee and optimize our online sales channels. This role is responsible for managing day-to-day eCommerce operations, marketplace performance, and ensuring a seamless customer experience across platforms.



Key Responsibilities



Ecommerce Operations



Manage daily operations of the ecommerce website(s), ensuring optimal performance, uptime, and user experience

Oversee product listings, pricing, promotions, and inventory accuracy

Coordinate with marketing, merchandising, and customer service teams

Monitor website analytics and KPIs (conversion rate, AOV, traffic, etc.)

Identify and implement improvements to enhance customer journey and sales



Marketplace Management



Manage third-party marketplaces (e.g., Amazon, eBay, B&Q, The Range, Marketplaces)

Optimise product listings (SEO, content, images, keywords)

Monitor marketplace performance, rankings, and competitor activity

Handle account health, compliance, and performance metrics

Manage promotions, advertising (PPC), and marketplace campaigns



Inventory & Order Management



Ensure accurate stock levels across all platforms

Coordinate with supply chain and warehouse teams

Oversee order processing, fulfilment, and returns management

Implement systems to prevent stockouts or overselling



Data Analysis & Reporting



Analyze sales data, customer behavior, and channel performance

Prepare regular reports and provide actionable insights

Use data to drive decision-making and growth strategies



Process Improvement



Identify operational inefficiencies and implement scalable solutions

Manage integrations between ecommerce platforms, ERP, and CRM systems

Stay updated on ecommerce trends, tools, and best practices

Requirements

Proven experience in ecommerce operations and/or marketplace management

Strong knowledge of platforms such as Shopify, Magento, Amazon Seller Central, or similar

Experience with digital marketing tools (SEO, PPC, analytics)

Analytical mindset with proficiency in data tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Excel)

Understanding of inventory and supply chain processes

Excellent organisational and project management skills

Strong communication and cross-functional collaboration abilities

Preferred Qualifications

Experience managing multi-channel ecommerce businesses

Familiarity with ERP systems and integrations

Experience with international marketplaces and cross-border ecommerce

Knowledge of UX/UI best practices

Key Skills

Data analysis & reporting

Marketplace optimisation

Inventory management

Problem-solving

Attention to detail

Leadership and team coordination

KPIs / Success Metrics

Revenue growth across ecommerce channels

Conversion rate improvement

Marketplace sales and ranking performance

Order fulfilment accuracy and speed

Customer satisfaction and return rates

title: Virtual Assistant – Guest Experience & WordPress Specialist
description:
Hiring: WordPress & Guest Experience Virtual Assistant (Long-Term)



We are a luxury short-term rental and hospitality brand based in the UK, known for exceptional guest service, high occupancy, and unforgettable stays. As our business grows, we’re looking for a world-class Virtual Assistant to join our team long-term – not just to complete tasks, but to be a trusted partner in delivering excellence.



What You’ll Do:



• Respond to guest enquiries for our short-term rental properties via
, WhatsApp, chat, and booking platforms 

• Handle check-ins, bookings, date changes, payments, and guest questions

• Address guest concerns professionally and with care, ensuring a positive experience

• Maintain a warm, professional, guest-focused tone at all times

• Update website content using WordPress, manage plug-ins, and troubleshoot simple issues

• Support general admin and booking coordination

• Follow processes accurately



Work Schedule:



• 4 PM – 1 AM GMT



What We’re Looking For:



• Strong background in the customer service industry

• Strong experience in hospitality or guest support

• Confident in WordPress content updates and plug-ins

• Outstanding written English – warm, clear, natural

• Highly organised, proactive, and reliable

• Stable internet and a quiet workspace

• Long-term commitment – we are not looking for someone juggling multiple clients



Compensation:



• Competitive salary, reflective of your experience, with long-term growth opportunities



If you’re passionate about luxury short-term rentals, guest satisfaction, and digital operations, please fill out the form below:





Thank you!

title: Copywriter [URGENT HIRE]
description:
We’re looking for someone who blends storytelling with strategy, and knows how to communicate luxury in a way that’s approachable, thoughtful, and human.



At Cabana, you’ll help shape a brand voice that’s modern, warm, and confident. From blog posts and digital ads to website copy and
s, your writing will define how people experience our brand.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us



- Work from anywhere that sparks your focus and creativity.

- Enjoy a flexible schedule  + few overlapping hours during US business time for smooth collaboration - A MUST (no productivity trackers)

- Take paid Philippine holidays! We value rest as much as results.

- Join a supportive team that prioritizes balance and growth.

- Be part of a brand where science meets style, because wellness should feel as good as it works.



How to Apply



- Use “Cabana Writer” as your
 subject line.

- Include a brief introduction about yourself, a link to your resume, your availability to start, and your desired starting rate ($/hour).

- Don’t forget a link to your portfolio or work samples.



Full Job Description



Key Responsibilities:



Craft and refine copy for marketing campaigns, website content, and product pages.

Develop engaging
 campaigns and ad copy that convert.

Maintain a consistent, on-brand voice across all channels.

Collaborate with design and marketing teams to deliver high-impact messaging.

Conceptualize and write copy for new product launches, landing pages, and paid ads.

Conduct research to ensure tone, claims, and messaging are accurate and credible.

Test, optimize, and improve messaging based on performance insights.



Qualifications:



2+ years of copywriting experience, preferably with e-commerce, wellness, or lifestyle brands.

Strong portfolio demonstrating versatility across ads,
, and web copy.

Excellent English skills with a natural sense of tone, rhythm, and flow.

Ability to balance creativity with strategic clarity and conversion goals.

Collaborative, detail-oriented, and passionate about creating copy that resonates.



Bonus: experience writing for luxury or health/wellness brands.



About Cabana



Cabana is where science meets style. We’re a luxury wellness brand helping people look and feel their best. Our treatment including GLP-1s and hormone therapies are science-backed, designed to boost energy, confidence, and everyday ease.



We combine clinical expertise with a high-end, lifestyle-driven experience, making wellness feel effortless, elegant, and undeniably chic. Our small, ambitious team is building something beautiful, where self-care is a luxury you can actually live in.
