title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:
Do you love video editing and want to grow your career in content creation?



We're looking for talented video editors who are ready to take on a bigger role as a Content Specialist.



In this role, you'll do more than just edit. You’ll be trained on our internal systems to create short-form captions using AI, schedule social media posts through our platform, and manage content workflows for your assigned client.



We are a content agency and we often repurpose longer-form videos for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, as well as audiograms and graphics for social media. We also edit their raw videos for YouTube and edit podcast episodes as well.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit short-form and long-form content (YouTube, Reels, TikTok, podcasts)

Use our AI captioning system to create short-form captions

Schedule content to automatically post inside our proprietary platform

Follow creative direction and provide consistent, high-quality execution

Participate in weekly training sessions to continually improve your skills



Who We’re Looking For:



Professional experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools

Strong eye for motion design and storytelling

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage your time independently

Positive attitude and willingness to receive feedback

Excellent communication skills and a self-starter mindset

Comfortable learning new tools and systems



What We Offer:



Guaranteed client placement upon successful training

Monthly salary of $700 to $1,000 USD paid directly by the client

Weekly training and ongoing support

100% remote work



If you're interested, please respond back with the subject line "It's Me You're Looking For" and include a link to your work. Tell me why we should hire you!

title: Trial Reel Account Manager (Instagram Posting & Analytics) – Female Only
description:
As a Trial Reel Account Manager at SimplexMedia, you will be responsible for high-volume scheduling and posting of content on Instagram, specifically for trial reel-only clients. This role requires someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working at speed while maintaining accuracy.



You will manage mass posting (up to 8 posts per client per day) and support the team by helping track and interpret basic performance analytics.



Please note: this role is execution and analytics-focused and does not involve content strategy or content creation.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Posting & Account Management (Instagram)



Schedule and publish high-volume Instagram content (up to 8 posts per client daily)



Ensure all posts are uploaded accurately, on time, and in the correct format



Follow Instagram optimisation processes when setting up and managing accounts



Monitor trial accounts daily to ensure posting consistency and performance



Quality Assurance



Conduct daily quality checks across all assigned client accounts:



Are Instagram accounts set up correctly?



Are posts scheduled and published properly?



Are all required settings and optimisations in place?



Troubleshoot posting issues quickly and escalate when needed



Analytics Support



Track and record basic Instagram performance data for trial reel clients



Help identify trends in engagement and reel performance



Assist in compiling simple analytics reports for internal review



Administration & Communication



Keep all tasks and account updates tracked in Notion daily



Maintain clear communication with the team via Slack and



Stay on top of assigned administrative tasks and deadlines



Support other operational tasks as required by the General Manager/CEO



Further details will be provided during onboarding.



RESULTS



Accurate, consistent Instagram posting with no major errors



All trial clients receive their full daily posting volume



Performance data is properly tracked and available for review



Issues are communicated early and resolved efficiently



All tasks are documented and updated daily in Notion

title: Virtual Assistant Needed to Produce AI-Generated Books (Long-Term Opportunity)
Real Estate Integrator (California Experience Required)
description:
I’m looking for a high-level Real Estate Integrator to step in as my right hand and take full ownership of operations inside a fast-moving, luxury real estate business.



This is not a task-based role. I don’t need a transaction coordinator—I need an operator who can think, lead, and execute at a high level.



If you’re someone who thrives on structure, speed, and accountability—and you know how to keep a real estate business running like a machine—keep reading.



What You’ll Own

Full operational program management (SOPs, workflows, checklists)

Oversight of 3–7 active deals/month through a coordinator

CRM hygiene & business tracking for real-time visibility

Acting as my main point of contact for all operations

Building and enforcing systems inside SkySlope and internal tools

Creating luxury-level marketing materials (presentations, brochures, listing decks)

Delivering fast-turn listing collateral (same-day/overnight when needed)

Maintaining brand voice and premium positioning

Implementing AI tools, automations, and growth experiments

Identifying inefficiencies and eliminating operational bottlenecks



What I’m Looking For

title: Insurance Verification Specialist
description:
Position: Insurance Biller 

Company: Christina Anderson RDN LLC / The Gymnast Nutritionist 

Hours: 30-40hrs per month. We need a minimum of 7hrs per week 

Contract Type: Independent Contractor 

Compensation: Between $10-$15 per hour depending on experience.  

Location:  Fully Remote. Must be available to work North American Hours such as 9-5 MST 

Start Date: ASAP 



About The Gymnast Nutritionist 

Christina Anderson RDN, LLC | The Gymnast Nutritionist is a 100% virtual sports nutrition and consulting practice that helps gymnasts learn to fuel for optimal performance. We work with high level gymnasts, parents, and coaches who are trying to find that “edge” or learn to use food as fuel (not something that is seen as the enemy). We’re known for not just teaching gymnasts about nutrition for performance, but how to fuel for life beyond sport and a healthy relationship with food + body.   



We primarily work with upper level gymnasts (optionals/elite/NCAA) but also serve our younger gymnast population and gymnastics clubs/organization through online education. These gymnasts, parents, and coaches “know” there is something to nutrition and want to do everything they can to give their gymnast the opportunity to reach their goals and dreams. 



Job Summary 

The Insurance Biller will be responsible for handling insurance claims, verifying patient coverage, resolving denials, and ensuring accurate billing for The Gymnast Nutritionist’s services. This role requires knowledge of medical billing for nutrition services, CPT codes, and insurance reimbursement processes. 



Key Responsibilities 

- Verify insurance benefits and eligibility for new clients in a timely manner to help us with enrolments

- Verify insurance benefits and eligibility for existing clients, ensuring coverage for nutrition services and being able to clearly communicate benefit details to the company and clients  

- Submit insurance claims accurately and in a timely manner for medical nutrition therapy (MNT) and related services. 

- Follow Up on Denied Claims to determine reasons and re-process the claim if applicable 

- Review claims to ensure proper coding, documentation, and compliance with insurance policies. 

- Follow up on outstanding claims to resolve denials, underpayments, and delays. 

- Manage appeals and resubmissions, working with insurance providers to secure reimbursements. 

- Bill clients for co-pays, deductibles 

- Post payments and reconcile accounts, ensuring accurate records in billing systems. 

- Communicate with team about insurance coverage, claim statuses, and any out-of-pocket costs. 

- Properly file all insurance related documents into client folders  

- Update client profiles in EHR with insurance coverage notes 

- Stay updated on insurance policies and CPT codes related to dietitian services and nutrition counseling. 

- Collaborate with the nutrition team to optimize billing processes and improve reimbursement success. 



Qualifications & Requirements 

- Proven experience in medical billing (preferably in nutrition, dietetics, or wellness services). 

- Familiarity with CPT codes for medical nutrition therapy (e.g., 97802, 97803, 99404), preventive vs medical benefits, how deductibles and cost-shares work, etc 

- Knowledge of insurance claim submission portals and EHR systems such as Practice Better and ClaimMD. 

- Strong understanding of insurance verification, prior authorization, and reimbursement processes. 

- Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills to track claims and payments. 

- Strong communication skills to interact with insurance providers and clients. 

- Ability to work independently in a remote setting while managing multiple claims. 



Preferred Qualifications 

- Experience working with nutrition practices, dietitians, or wellness providers. 

- Familiarity with practice management software like Practice Better 

- Knowledge of private insurance and Medicaid billing for nutrition services. 



HOW TO APPLY:

If you have experience in insurance billing for nutrition or wellness services and are passionate about ensuring seamless billing processes, we’d love to hear from you!  

Submit your application here:

title: B2B Sales Representative - Real Estate Appraisal Services Company (Philippines - Remote - Full Time)
description:
We are hiring one sharp, professional, and confident sales representative to join our growing real estate appraisal services company based in the United States. This is not a general real estate company. We provide professional appraisal services and the people we call on are decision makers at professional firms who have a direct and legitimate need for what we offer. This is a serious full-time remote position and we are only looking for serious applicants.



Position Details:



Full-time - Monday through Friday

Hours: 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM Central Time

Pay: $4.00/hour during your first week trial period - rises to $5.00/hour upon successful completion

Pay schedule: Biweekly



What You Will Be Doing:



You will be making outbound professional relationship building calls to decision makers at professional businesses in the United States on behalf of our real estate appraisal services company. This is consultative B2B outreach - you will be introducing our services to businesses that have a direct need for them and building professional relationships that lead to ongoing orders.

This is not cold calling to sell a product nobody asked for. This is not spam dialing. This is not retail sales. This is not reading from a script. You will be having real, professional, consultative conversations with decision makers, establishing rapport, and positioning our services as the solution to a need they already have.



Each day you will:



Make outbound professional relationship building calls to U.S. based professional businesses using a company provided phone number

Log every call in a Google Sheets form - who you spoke to, their contact information, what was said, and the outcome, etc.

All calls will be recorded.

Report your daily progress to your direct manager who will be monitoring your call logs, your notes, and your overall performance closely



Your First Week:



Your first week is a paid trial period at $4.00/hour. Your direct manager will review your call logs, your notes, and your overall performance every day during this period. Candidates who demonstrate professionalism, consistency, strong communication, and real sales ability will move to full status, and pay will increase to $5.00/hour at the beginning of week two. We are looking for someone who wants a long term role and a long term relationship with our company - not a side gig and not a temporary position.



You Must Meet Every Requirement Below - No Exceptions:



Clear, confident, and professional spoken English - you will be speaking directly with decision makers at professional U.S. businesses every single day

Proven B2B sales experience - you must have experience calling on professional businesses and having consultative conversations with decision makers - consumer sales, retail sales, and high volume spam dialing do not qualify

Comfortable and fully confident working in Google Sheets for daily call logging and detailed note taking - you must confirm this in your video

Internet speed of at least 25 Mbps download and 10 Mbps upload - you must state your actual speed in your video - do not simply say you have fast internet

A quiet, professional workspace with no background noise and no interruptions during your work hours

This must be your only job during the hours of 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM Central Time Monday through Friday - full and undivided commitment is required during those hours

Understanding what a real estate appraisal is, why it is ordered, and who typically orders one is a plus- general real estate knowledge from working with agents, brokers, or real estate companies is not sufficient and is not what we do



This Role Is Not For You If:



You have only done consumer sales, retail sales, or high volume call center dialing

You read from scripts and cannot hold a real professional conversation

You are looking for a side job, a part time role, or something to do alongside another position

Your spoken English is not clear, confident, and professional

You cannot fully commit to the hours listed Monday through Friday



How To Apply:



Record a 3-minute video of yourself speaking directly and professionally on camera. Your video must be 3 minutes or less. Begin your video by addressing Tay by name directly - if you do not address Tay by name at the start of your video your application will not be considered regardless of your qualifications.



In your video you must cover every single one of the following points or you will not receive a response:



Address Tay directly by name at the very start of your video

Describe your B2B sales background - what types of professional businesses you called on, what a typical sales conversation looked like for you, and whether you were making warm or cold calls

Tell Tay what you know about real estate appraisals - not real estate in general

Confirm that you are fully comfortable working in Google Sheets for daily logging and note taking

State your actual internet download and upload speed

Confirm that this will be your only job during the hours of 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM Central Time Monday through Friday



Do not use AI to write your application message or generate your responses. We will know. Express everything in your own words exactly as you would speak. Your application message should be short - simply paste your YouTube video link and confirm you meet every requirement listed. Nothing more.



Upload your video to YouTube as an unlisted video and
 the link directly to 
 with the subject line: 



B2B Sales Application - Your Name. Applications submitted without a video link will not be considered.

Candidates who pass the video review will be invited to a live 5-minute video interview on Tuesday, April 14th between 10:45 AM and 12:45 PM Central Time. You will be notified by 4/12 if accepted and assigned a specific time slot at that stage. A working camera is required for the interview - no camera means no interview.



Only serious, qualified candidates will receive a response.

title: QA Engineer (Typescript / Next.js)
description:
We're looking for a skilled full stack QA engineer to help us maintain and improve our startup's core platform. This role is heavily focused on detecting bugs and system issues, managing a support engineer, as well as larger ongoing feature development.



Must haves:

- Great communication skills to describe bugs or new features and how to work on larger projects

- Excellent experience with Typescript, Next.js, React.js, and PostgreSQL

- Experience using AI coding tools (like Cursor, ChatGPT, Claude Code, Copilot, etc.) to speed up debugging and development workflows

- Excellent debugging skills and the ability to quickly understand and navigate large codebases

- Confident building, testing, and deploying software locally

- Comfortable creating and iterating on pull requests on GitHub



Nice to haves:

- Good eye for design and good UI/UX design for businesses

- Habit of writing tests for your fixes and changes

- Previous startup experience



To apply:

- Message me on WhatsApp at +1 (908)
with your resume, GitHub, and any relevant projects or websites.

- In order to get selected, you MUST write "Social media agency" in your message along with the process below:



The process:



Step 1 — Async QA & Bug Review:

We want to see how you identify issues in real code. Please complete the following:

1. Review the git diff for a recent onboarding branch:



2. Test the live onboarding flow here:





Send us a write-up that includes:

- Any code-level issues you find in the diff (bugs, logic errors, missing edge cases, etc.)

- Any UX issues you find while testing the onboarding flow (broken interactions, confusing copy, layout problems, accessibility concerns, etc.)

Please send this along with your resume. If you do not send this, your application will NOT be considered.



Step 2 — Live Coding:

- A quick 30 min live coding test with me — a simple JavaScript question where you'll walk me through your approach.



Step 3 — Final Round:

- Async code review plus a short call with my colleague, where we'll discuss your experience and show you some sample code from our codebase.



If accepted, there is a paid trial where you work on features immediately.

title: Affiliate & Partnerships Coordinator
description:

Our content blends music, storytelling, and physical activity so that learning never feels like sitting still.



We are a small, passionate team on a mission to make every child — including those with ADHD, sensory processing differences, and other learning needs — feel like learning was made just for them.

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• A growing pipeline of potential partners with clear status tracking

• Early collaboration opportunities identified and initiated

• Affiliates feel actively supported, not just onboarded and left inactive



YOU'LL THRIVE HERE IF YOU



• Have experience in influencer outreach, affiliate coordination, or online marketing

• Write in excellent, natural English

• Are highly organized and follow through without being chased

• Are comfortable with Instagram, TikTok,
 Groups, and YouTube as marketing channels

• Have a reliable internet connection and your own device



NICE TO HAVE

• Background working with US-based or international clients



To apply, send a short cover letter that includes: which homeschool or parenting creators you follow, and why their audience would connect with our courses. This tells us more than a résumé. Applications without this will be skipped.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (GEO/AEO)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagyn70NlQQGtKUtK/form



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

- Build and execute an integrated SEO + GEO roadmap tied to revenue for priority categories (sheet sets, duvet covers, quilts, decorative pillows).

- Define and track a query set for SERPs and AI answers; report share-of-voice and citation/inclusion rate in AI Overviews/answer engines.



On-Site & Technical

- Audit and improve site architecture, internal linking, faceted navigation, canonicals, and crawl budget for Shopify.

- Elevate Core Web Vitals and image optimization for PDPs/PLPs.

- Implement and maintain JSON-LD schema (Product, Offer, Review, Breadcrumb, Organization, FAQ, ImageObject) to strengthen entity understanding.



Content & Entity Building

- Create entity-first, evidence-backed content answer engines trust: buyer’s guides, comparisons, FAQs, care/how-to, sizing explainers, collection hubs.

- Ensure product attribute completeness (materials, thread count, fill, sizes, care, style) so AI systems can recommend or cite our pages.

- Collaborate with brand/editorial to publish on-brand copy optimized for humans and LLMs.



GEO-Specific Initiatives

- Test AI Overview/answer inclusion tactics (structured data, Q&A blocks, citations, author/entity pages, first-party images).

- Monitor and improve brand citation rate in answers for commercial and informational intents.

- Manage AI crawler permissions and robots directives (GPTBot, Perplexity, CommonCrawl) with Engineering/IT.



Off-Site & Authority

- Build a white-hat digital PR/backlink program with home & design publications, blogs, and partner sites.

- Strengthen E-E-A-T signals (author bios, brand story, policies, reviews/UGC, press mentions).



Analytics & Experimentation

- Run experiments; measure impact in GA4 & GSC with dashboards (Looker Studio).

- Prepare periodic reports and present insights and next steps to stakeholders.



90-Day Success

- Baseline audits completed (technical, content, entities, AI answer presence) and a prioritized 6-month roadmap delivered.

- Quick wins shipped: schema fixes, internal linking improvements, attribute completeness for top SKUs/collections, and one entity-driven content hub launched.

- GEO scorecard established (priority queries, inclusion/citation rate, answer snippets captured, supporting pages).



6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Sustained inclusion/citation in AI answers for target queries across core categories.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- Proven SEO chops in eCommerce (preferably Shopify) with measurable revenue impact.

- Hands-on GEO experience (or a strong POV) optimizing for AI Overviews and answer engines: structuring content for direct answers, citations, and entity confidence.

- Proficiency with Ahrefs/Similar, Google Search Console, GA4, and Shopify; comfort with HTML/Liquid basics and JSON-LD.

- Ability to plan and execute on-brand digital PR/backlink programs.

- Strong analytical skills; can turn data into decisions and roadmaps.

- Excellent English writing/editing skills (you can own outreach and on-site copy).

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

- Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience).

- Belief in our company mission and embodiment of our values.



Nice to have

- Experience with product feeds (Google Merchant Center), reviews/UGC integration, and PDP/PLP template optimization.

- Familiarity with log-file analysis, bot identification, and AI crawler management.

- Comfort building dashboards in Looker Studio or similar.



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding, linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate customers' lives through beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we are committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping, and low order minimums, we have become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



More about us and our brands: 

Learn about our Philippines team: 
/hea-ph-team



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?



At HiEnd Accents, we are a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, a growth mindset, and a commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights. Recognition on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the US reflects our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions matter, we want to hear from you.



Working at HiEnd Accents means you can expect:

- Competitive Compensation - We offer a competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people to ensure opportunities to learn, grow, and develop careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We hire based on culture and values, so you work with a team that is fun, talented, and committed

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at [
](
).



Want to get to know us better and learn what it’s like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay



Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow, and develop their careers



Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Ecommerce Merchandiser
description:
eCommerce Merchandising Assistant (Amazon Focus) 



We are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated eCommerce Merchandising Assistant to join our growing team. This full-time, remote position is ideal for early-career professionals looking to build a long-term career in digital retail, with a strong focus on supporting and growing our business with Amazon. 



This role will support day-to-day merchandising execution, competitor identification,  promotional coordination, and performance reporting for about 2,000 products. The ideal candidate has experience working with Amazon portals, is analytical, highly organized, eager to learn, and comfortable working cross-functionally in a fast-paced retail environment.  



Shape 



Key Responsibilities 



Retailer Merchandising & Execution 



Support daily merchandising activities across Amazon, ensuring product listings are live and winning the BuyBox. 



Assist with maintaining and updating product content including titles, bullet points, descriptions, images, specifications, and enhanced content modules. 



Track market prices changes ensuring we are competitively priced.  



Analyze and execute promotional activity including retailer events, seasonal campaigns, Best Deals, coupons and tent pole events such as Prime Day. 



Help coordinate new product launches by partnering with internal Product, Marketing to ensure accurate data, imagery, and forecasting support. 



Analyze weekly sales, traffic, and conversion data from Amazon reporting tools to identify trends and performance opportunities. 



Partner with paid media and retail media teams to ensure content and keyword alignment supports discoverability and conversion. 



Shape 



Required Qualifications 



1–2 years of experience in eCommerce, digital merchandising with Amazon. 



Strong analytical skills with proficiency in Microsoft Excel (pivot tables, lookups, basic data analysis). 



High attention to detail with strong organizational and time management skills. 



Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced retail environment. 



Strong written and verbal communication skills and ability to collaborate cross-functionally. 



Must be able to work 8am-5pm EST hours.  



Shape 



Preferred Qualifications 



Familiarity with Product Information Management (PIM) systems such as Salsify or similar tools. 



Basic understanding of digital shelf optimization, keyword strategy, and retailer search functionality. 



Exposure to retailer promotional mechanics, site features, and seasonal merchandising calendars. 



 



Shape 



Why Join Us 

 



This position is well-suited for someone looking to grow their career in eCommerce merchandising within major omnichannel retailers. Through this role, you will gain hands-on experience in digital shelf optimization, retailer reporting, and cross-functional collaboration. 

 

• Opportunity to work with abroad and diverse ecommerce product portfolio. 

• Hands-on experience with leading retailers and product syndication technology. 

• Collaborative team environment with growth potential in ecommerce merchandising. 

• Play a key role in helping products go live across today’s top online retailers.

title: Client Acquisition Expert – Google Ads + SEO (Results-Driven Role)
description:
About GlowMD

GlowMD is a luxury medical spa based in Texas specializing in wellness, aesthetics, IV hydration, and medical weight loss treatments. Our focus is delivering exceptional patient experiences while growing through high-quality, targeted digital marketing.



We are looking for a results-driven Google Ads & Lead Generation Specialist who understands how to generate qualified leads that convert into paying clients.



Role Overview

This is a performance-driven role focused on revenue growth. The ideal candidate understands SEO, Google Ads, sales psychology, and lead generation strategies that bring in qualified leads and convert them into booked services.

You will be responsible for improving online visibility, generating traffic, and turning that traffic into real patients.



Primary Objective

• Generate qualified leads that convert into completed paid services for GlowMD.



Responsibilities

• Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns

• Develop and execute SEO strategies to increase organic traffic

• Perform keyword research and competitor analysis

• Optimize campaigns and pages for cost per lead and conversions

• Improve landing pages and website conversion rates

• Set up and monitor conversion tracking

• Implement retargeting campaigns

• Analyze marketing data and continuously improve performance

• Develop strategies to turn website traffic into booked services



Requirements

• Proven experience in SEO and Google Ads

• Strong understanding of lead generation and online sales funnels

• Experience increasing website traffic and conversions

• Ability to analyze data and optimize campaigns

• Knowledge of conversion optimization and landing pages

• Strong communication and strategic thinking

• Experience in healthcare, wellness, aesthetics, or local service marketing is a plus



Compensation

Base Pay:

• $7 per hour



Phase 1 Bonus:

• $15 per completed paid service generated from your campaigns

• Monthly bonus cap: $1,000



Upgrade Opportunity (After 3 Months of Hitting Cap):

•  $7/hour base

• $10 per completed service

• + 3% revenue after the first 50 services



KPIs

• Increased organic website traffic

• Decreasing cost per lead

• Increasing lead-to-client conversion rates

• Positive ROI from marketing campaigns

• Consistent qualified lead generation



How to Apply

Please send:

• Your SEO and Google Ads experience

• Examples of lead generation results

• Case studies or screenshots of campaign performance

• A short explanation of your strategy to generate leads for a medical spa



We are looking for someone who understands how to turn traffic into real paying clients.



Only applications within OLJ platform will be catered. Thanks!

title: VIDEO EDITOR (YOUTUBE CHANNEL NICHE)
description:
Hey,



We are looking for a video editor for a YouTube channel focused on Antiques Roadshow items. The editing style is light, clean, and informative.



What’s provided:



1.Full script

2. Voiceover

3. Links/references for the antique items

4. Official editing manual/guidelines



What you’ll do:



1. Edit videos by following the provided manual

2. Add relevant images, clips, and other external content that match the antique item being discussed

3. Use creativity where appropriate while still following the channel’s editing style



Rate:



$1.35 per minute

Each video is usually around 40 minutes, more or less



Requirements:



1. Must submit a portfolio/sample work

2. Good sense of pacing and informative editing

title: Content Researcher - TikTok & Reels Trend Spotter (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
We're P1 Agency - a growing social media marketing agency. We help brands and creators build their audience through trend-driven content strategies across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



We're looking for a Content Researcher who lives and breathes TikTok and Instagram Reels. Your job is simple but important: find the trends before they trend.



What you'll do every day:

- Scroll TikTok and Instagram Reels with purpose - spotting emerging trends, viral formats, and trending sounds before they peak

- Build a daily content research pool: collect video links, explain why each one works, and suggest how it could be adapted for our clients' content strategies

- Track trending sounds and identify which ones are about to blow up

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to speed up your research and organize findings

- Deliver a structured daily report with your top picks + reasoning



This role is for you if:

- You spend 2+ hours a day on TikTok or Reels anyway - and you're the person your friends go to for "have you seen this video?"

- You can explain WHY something goes viral, not just spot that it did

- You have strong English writing skills (you'll explain trends in writing daily)

- You're organized, self-motivated, and don't need someone checking on you every hour

- You're comfortable with AI tools and use them regularly



This role is NOT for you if:

- You think "content research" means copying trending hashtag lists from Google

- You can't tell the difference between a video that went viral by luck vs. one with a replicable format

- You need constant supervision to stay productive



Schedule: 5 hours/day, 5 days/week (Monday-Friday). Flexible hours - we care about output, not when you sit at your desk.



Compensation: $500/month starting. After a 1-month trial period, salary increases to $600/month based on performance. Additional growth opportunities as the team scales.



How to apply:

Do NOT send your resume here. Instead, complete our short application funnel - it takes about 10 minutes and includes a small task so we can see how you think:







Applications without completing the funnel will not be reviewed.

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The "Right Hand" to CEO)
description:
I am looking for a high-level Operations Manager / HR Partner in the Philippines to take full ownership of my business results. I am not looking for a Virtual Assistant who waits for instructions. I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.



Briefly describe a situation where you managed a team and solved a major problem without the owner’s help.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are an "A-Player" Manager, not just a VA.

title: E-commerce Content Strategist
description:
Job Title: Content Specialist / Senior Copywriter | Remote



Location: Asia or similar time zones (UTC +8)

Salary: $2,000-$2,500/month gross

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week



Only English CVs will be accepted.



Retalent Agency is a global remote recruitment agency that connects talented professionals like you with top companies in e-commerce, marketing, and tech. Since 2019, we’ve helped hundreds of candidates from Latin America, Eastern Europe, Asia, and South Africa land full-time remote roles with international teams.



When you apply through Retalent, you’re not just applying for a job; you’re stepping into a community of growing businesses and ambitious professionals.



Let us help you find the right opportunity to grow your career from anywhere in the world.



Our Client:



Founded by two sisters who grew up navigating eczema and fungal skin infections within their own family, this brand was built on a deeply personal mission. Drawing from heritage botanical wisdom and combining it with research-backed science, they create potent, plant-powered skin remedies that genuinely make a difference.



With over 1.5 million products delivered, 25,000+ five-star reviews, and a decade of customer trust, they have established themselves as a beloved name in natural skincare. Now, they are expanding into new channels and audiences to reach even more families who need their products.



They are a small, US-based, globally distributed team that believes great content is how great products find the people who need them. Everything they create lives by one standard: Ingredients Matter: Pure, Potent, Proven.



In This Role, You’ll:



Act as a sharp, detail-oriented content writer with a strong sense of brand voice and consumer appeal. This is a content-focused role built around your ability to research deeply, write compelling copy across multiple formats, and serve as the quality gate for all customer-facing content.



You'll work closely with our co-founders and Assistant Marketing Manager as part of a globally distributed team. AI tools are central to how we work, you'll use them to accelerate research, generate drafts, and iterate quickly. Your judgment, brand instinct, and editorial eye are what make the output great.



This is a full-time, remote position with working hours that substantially overlap UTC+8. How you communicate and collaborate matters as much as your talent and qualifications.



What You'll Be Doing



-Content Creation: Write scripts for TikTok branded videos, Amazon video ads, and future ad platforms. Create
 copy, website content, educational articles for AEO/ GEO visibility, and long-form content.

-Creative Testing & Messaging: Develop systematic messaging variations for messaging and creative testing, breaking down product angles, benefits, and hooks to identify what resonates through data.

-Content Review & Refinement: Serve as the brand voice quality gate. Review and refine output from AI tools and third-party platforms (such as Amazon listing optimization tools) for accuracy, consumer appeal, and brand alignment.

-Research & Consumer Insights: Conduct deep product, market, and competitive research. Mine customer reviews, forums, and social conversations to understand real customer language, pain points, and motivations. Use these insights to shape stronger messaging.

-Content Repurposing & Social Media: Adapt existing content (video scripts,
 copy, product messaging, articles) into social media posts across Instagram,
 
, and other platforms.

-Creative Briefing: Write clear, actionable briefs for graphic designers and TikTok content creators to keep visual and verbal messaging aligned and on-brand.

-Additional Marketing Support: Contribute to other marketing initiatives as needed, including Amazon customer Q&A, review engagement, and emerging projects that support the company’s growth objectives.



What You’ll Bring:



-2 to 4 years of experience in content writing, copywriting, or brand communications, ideally for U.S.-facing consumer brands.

-Strong written English with the ability to produce polished, consumer-facing copy that sounds natural to a U.S. audience. Fluent in spoken English.

-Demonstrated ability to write across formats: video scripts, product copy,
, social media, website, and long-form articles.

-Skilled at prompting AI writing and research tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) to produce high-quality output. AI is a core part of our content workflow, not an occasional aid.

-Strong research skills and instinct. You dig into products, competitors, reviews, social signals, and customer conversations before you start writing.

-A portfolio or writing samples that demonstrate brand voice adaptability and consumer-oriented messaging.

-Familiarity with Amazon e-commerce, health and wellness, or OTC skin products is a plus but not required.



Skill Sets



-Excellent writing and editing skills with a sharp editorial eye for both accuracy and consumer appeal.

-Research-driven mindset. You investigate before you write.

-Structured creative thinking. Able to break a single product into multiple testable angles, benefits, and hooks.

-You can internalize a brand's tone and execute it consistently across formats.

-Collaborative, low-ego, and self-directed. You take high-level direction and run with it.

-Intellectually honest with data. You let performance results guide the next iteration.

-Welcomes direct feedback and iterates quickly.

-Fast learner motivated to grow into new areas of marketing beyond content.



What’s In It for You:



-Competitive salary: $2,000 to $2,500 USD per month.

-Competitive raise based on performance.

-Paid vacation.

-Professional development opportunities.

-Opportunity to grow into a senior marketing role as the team and brand expand.

-Be part of a close-knit and supportive team that values your input and relies on your expertise.

-Collaboration without micromanagement.

-Work-life balance.

title: Senior Video Editor - Amazon Influencer
description:
We're hiring a Senior Video Editor to help produce Andrew's Reviews — a fast-growing Amazon Influencer brand that creates in-depth product review videos to help shoppers make confident buying decisions.



Our content includes long-form YouTube reviews, product demonstrations, side-by-side comparison tests, and unboxing — all designed to educate, entertain, and convert viewers into buyers.



Find us here:

• YouTube: 

• Amazon Storefront: 
/shop/modern.homes.kitchens

• TikTok: 



________________________________________

ABOUT ANDREW'S REVIEWS

________________________________________



We produce authentic, conversion-focused content showcasing everyday Amazon products — from kitchen tools to smart home gadgets. Your editing is a core reason why viewers trust us. We're building for the long term, and this role grows with you.



________________________________________

WHAT YOU'LL DO

________________________________________



As our Senior Video Editor, you'll own the post-production process end to end and help raise the standard for the wider editing team.



Responsibilities:

• Edit long-form YouTube review and comparison videos from rough footage to final export — cuts, color, audio, motion graphics, and captions

• Build and maintain branded templates, lower thirds, intros/outros, and transition kits

• Collaborate directly with Andrew and Team on pacing, structure, and creative direction for each video

• Work efficiently through 4K footage pipelines without sacrificing quality or turnaround time

• Use AI-assisted tools (ChatGPT, Canva, OpusClip, etc.) to accelerate rough cut and repurposing workflows

• Provide clear, constructive critique to junior editors and assist with their training and development as needed

• Review thumbnail concepts and provide editing-informed feedback on click-worthiness

• Manage file organization, project archives, and delivery timelines across multiple concurrent videos

• Track hours and productivity using Hubstaff (required upon hire)



________________________________________

QUALIFICATIONS

________________________________________



Required:

• 3+ years editing YouTube or creator content professionally

• Expert-level in at least ONE of following:  Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

• Motion graphics skills (e.g. After Effects or Fusion)

• Fast and efficient with 4K footage — you don't let a heavy timeline slow you down

• Strong sense of pacing — you know when a cut is 2 seconds too long

• Comfortable with AI editing tools (e.g. OpusClip)

• Ability to give clear, actionable feedback and mentor junior editors

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Reliable internet (100 Mbps+ upload and download) and a capable 4K editing workstation

• At least 1 hour overlap in EST for check-ins and training (7PM PHT)



Nice to Have:

• Experience with Amazon Influencer or affiliate-focused content

• Experience editing product demos, reviews, or comparison formats

• Short-form editing experience (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

• Understanding of YouTube retention analytics and thumbnail strategy

• Familiarity with 
 or similar review/delivery platforms

• Experience coordinating within a small content team

• Thumbnail and graphic design (e.g. Canva)



________________________________________

COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

________________________________________



• $900–$1,200 USD/month, depending on experience and skills

• 13th Month Pay

• Annual merit raise and performance-based bonuses

• 3 paid sick days, 2 PTO days, and paid Philippine holidays

• Full-time (40 hours/week), renewable contract

• Flexible working hours

• Long-term position with growth opportunities



________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY

________________________________________



Please submit the following (ALL REQUIRED):

1. Resume

2. Portfolio — YouTube channel or editing samples (links preferred)

3. Computer specs screenshot (system info clearly visible)

4. Internet speed screenshot: 

5. Personality Test result: 
/test/big-five-personality-test

6. IQ Test result: 
/tests/FSIQ/

________________________________________

title: Data Analyst / Data Scientist (SQL + Marketing Analytics | Amazon Focus)
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a highly analytical Data Analyst / Data Scientist to build the data intelligence layer for a fast-growing Amazon-focused marketing agency.

This role is not about reporting dashboards , it is about deriving insights that directly impact revenue, CAC, and profitability.

You will work closely with the founder and strategy team to analyze customer behavior, advertising performance, and product-level economics using Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC) and other datasets

 You do not need prior AMC experience,  but you must be able to learn fast, think independently, and solve ambiguous data problems.



**What You’ll Do

1. Data Analysis & Querying

- Write advanced SQL queries to analyze:

- Customer journeys (click ? purchase ? repeat)

- Cross-product (ASIN) behavior

- Cohort retention and repeat purchase rates

- Work with large, messy datasets (AMC + Amazon Ads + internal data)





2. Marketing & Business Insights

- Translate raw data into clear, actionable insights

- Answer questions like:

- Which products drive long-term LTV?

- What is the true CAC payback window?

- How do customers migrate between product sizes?

- Support decision-making on:

- Ad spend allocation

- Product strategy

- Pricing and promotions



3. Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC)

- Learn and work with AMC datasets (no prior experience required)

- Build and maintain queries for:

- New-to-brand analysis

- Repeat purchase behavior

- Time-to-conversion

- Cross-ASIN conversion patterns



4. Build Internal Data Systems

- Develop a reusable query library and analysis framework

- Help structure a scalable “data engine” for the company

- Collaborate on integrating insights into internal tools (Daybreak OS)





**Who You Are

Must-Have Skills:

Strong SQL skills (joins, window functions, aggregations, time-based analysis)

Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability

Ability to work with incomplete or ambiguous data

Clear communication — can explain insights in simple terms



**Nice-to-Have (Not Required)

Experience with marketing analytics / attribution

Experience with eCommerce or Amazon data

Python (Pandas, etc.)

Experience with cohort or LTV analysis





**What We Care About Most

We are NOT looking for someone who:

x Only builds dashboards

x Waits for instructions

x Executes without thinking

x We ARE looking for someone who:

x Asks the right questions

x Challenges assumptions



Thinks in terms of business impact, not just data

title: Accounts Payable Specialist for a national private lender
description:
Project Overview:



Dominion Financial Services (DFS) is a fast-growing real estate lender specializing in Short-Term Bridge Loans and Long-Term Rental Loans for real estate investors across the country. We are looking for a detail-oriented Accounts Payable Specialist to support our Accounting team and ensure accurate, timely processing of vendor invoices and payments. In this role, you will play a key part in managing full-cycle accounts payable, maintaining organized financial records, and supporting the overall efficiency of our accounting operations.



If you have accounts payable experience in a job cost environment, strong attention to detail, and experience with accounting systems like Sage Intacct, we would love to hear from you. Please share your background in Accounts Payable, relevant software experience, and your earliest availability.



As an Accounts Payable Specialist You Will:



Manage full-cycle accounts payable, including invoice receipt, entry, and payment processing while supporting weekly check runs and maintaining accurate financial records. You will process a high volume of invoices received through mail and
, resolve discrepancies with vendors and internal teams, and ensure documentation is properly sorted, logged, scanned, and filed. This role also supports the Accounting team with additional tasks and special projects as needed while maintaining strong communication across departments to keep processes accurate and efficient.



Required Skills & Qualifications:



Candidates should have at least two years of experience in Accounts Payable within a job cost environment and experience handling a high volume of invoices with strong attention to detail. Experience using Sage Intacct is preferred, and a background in accounting, bookkeeping, property management, or commercial real estate is a plus. The ideal candidate has strong written and verbal communication skills, can manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment, consistently meets deadlines with accuracy, and is comfortable working independently on documentation, correspondence, and reporting.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us:



• Long-term, steady work with a nationally recognized private lender.

• Structured and collaborative accounting team environment.

• Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing real estate lending company.



Timeline:



• Full time, long-term position

• Schedule: 9AM to 5PM Eastern Standard Time

• Start date: ASAP
