title: High-Paying Instagram DM Setter (Experienced Only | US Hours | Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a highly experienced Instagram DM Setter who knows how to turn conversations into qualified leads and booked calls. If you’re sharp, proactive, and results-driven, this role is for you.



As our DM Setter, you’ll be responsible for managing Instagram conversations, engaging leads, and qualifying prospects for our offers. You’ll play a key role in driving revenue by booking high-quality calls.  



Requirements:

- Native English speaker (clear, natural communication)

- Willing to work US hours

- At least 1 year of experience DM setting

- Strong understanding of sales psychology and objection handling

- Ability to manage high-volume conversations without losing quality

- Organized, reliable, and results-driven



Responsibilities

- Respond to inbound and outbound Instagra
ssages

- Build rapport and qualify leads effectively

- Guide prospects toward booking calls

- Maintain organized tracking of conversations and leads

- Collaborate with the team to improve scripts and performance



Perks:

*Well-paid position (above market for the right candidate)

*You can work as much as you want. I will pay you a salary, but if you work extra hours, you will get paid.

*Flexible Vacation, if you need time off, just let me know.

*Opportunity to advance/get bonuses. If you do a good job, I will give you a raise and bonuses.



About Me:

I own two companies B Dancewear and Effective Ecommerce and am a partner to multiple e-commerce businesses. I have been working with Virtual Assistants for over 6 years and all of my VAs have been very happy to work with me. You will be given a chance to talk with my current VA before you are hired.



To Apply for the job:

1. Change the subject line to “I Want to Work for You [Insert the name of my mom, who is the co-owner of 
 here]”

2. Write 2-3 sentences on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Do not write more than that, or else your application will be deleted.

3. Number of years as a DM setter



Make sure to follow all the steps above. This is a great job opportunity with the ability to get bonuses and raises, so I will only look at applicants who really want the job. If I interview you, there will be a short call between us, and a video will be required



Do not write more than what I have asked you above. If you write more than what is requested above, I will ignore your job post.



Thank you,  

Travis Marziani

title: Graphic Designer - Ads focused | E-commerce (Luxury Brand)
description:
Follow these instructions to stand out:

1. Use "Ads Designer" as your
 subject line.

2. In your message, include a short introduction about yourself, and your desired starting rate ($/hour)

3. Include a link to your portfolio (ads and social media work required). 



Show us how you think, not just how you design.



(Portfolio Requirements)

• Ads (paid social creatives)

• Social media posts

• Examples that show how well you follow branding or a consistent theme



JOB DESCRIPTION



Key Responsibilities:

• Design static and digital ads for paid campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google, etc.)

• Create branded social media posts aligned with Cabana’s aesthetic

• Develop visually cohesive ad creatives that follow brand guidelines

• Conceptualize design ideas for campaigns, not just execute instructions

• Maintain consistency in typography, color, layout, and overall visual tone

• Prepare production-ready assets for marketing use



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in ads design or production design

• Strong portfolio showcasing ads and social media creatives (REQUIRED)

• Ability to follow branding guidelines while adding creative direction

• Skilled in layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

• Experience working with lifestyle, luxury, or wellness brands (preferred)

• Strong attention to detail and ability to work with deadlines



NOTE: You must be comfortable using AI tools to generate or enhance visuals for sleeker, more elevated designs.



However, we are not looking for someone fully dependent on AI. You should know how to balance creativity, manual design skills, and AI tools to produce strong, polished outputs.



Bonus points if you have experience working with luxury, lifestyle, or wellness brands



Why Work with Cabana?

- Work from anywhere that sparks your creativity (No productivity tracker)

- Supportive, no-drama team

- Build a luxury wellness brand that blends science with style

title: Creative Producer (AI Mobile Apps UGC)
description:
Responsibilities:



Concept Development: Crafting visual stories and concepts designed to trigger strong emotional engagement.

AI Integration: Using cutting-edge AI tools to generate video content, including "seamless" loops and realistic avatars (utilizing GPT-4o, Gemini, Veo, Runway, Pika, etc.).

Hybrid Workflow: Combining generative AI assets with 2D graphics in After Effects.

Editing & Adaptation: Editing and tailoring content for social media formats while considering platform constraints and current trends; utilizing ElevenLabs for AI voiceovers.

Data-Driven Optimization: Analyzing performance metrics and test results to rapidly iterate on creatives and prompts.

Trendwatching: Monitoring industry shifts and implementing new creative approaches.

A/B Testing: Conducting light A/B tests to improve retention, CTR, and engagement.

Documentation: Creating clear, concise SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) for processes and prompts to share with the team.





Requirements:



Experience: 2+ years of experience creating short-form video content (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts).

AI Toolset Proficiency: Proven experience with Kling, Imagen 4, Veo3, NanoBanana, Runway, MidJourney, Pika, Magnific AI, and others.

Creative Vision: High level of visual taste ("nasmotrennost"), out-of-the-box thinking, and rapid problem-solving skills.

Technical Skills: Strong skills in video editing, color correction, and basic audio post-production.

Platform Expertise: Deep understanding of the nuances of publishing content on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

Storytelling: Ability to craft powerful hooks, maintain visual rhythm, and create emotionally compelling edits.

Motion Design: Strong background in motion design and visual storytelling (After Effects or similar tools).

Workflow Automation: Active use of AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, D-ID, ElevenLabs) to accelerate and automate production.

Information Management: Ability to research, analyze, and apply new information effectively.

Project Management: Ability to accurately estimate task timelines and meet deadlines.

Autonomy: Ready to work independently in a remote setting while staying closely synced with the team.





Bonus Points:

Experience in professional production (3D, motion design, or advertising).



Experience in projects related to mental health, education, or personal growth.

Background in creative A/B testing and working with product analytics.

English proficiency sufficient for reading technical documentation and tracking global trends.





What We Offer:



Competitive salary.

Flexible Format: Choice between office-based work or full remote for candidates in other cities.

Commitment: Available in both Full-time and Part-time capacities.

Flexibility: A flexible schedule and high level of trust in how you organize your workflow.

Impact: Work on projects at the intersection of AI, content, and real-world human value.

Culture: A small, values-driven team where your ideas directly influence the final product.

title: Growth, Outreach & TikTok Shop Manager
description:
Growth, Outreach & TikTok Shop Manager

Midnight Atlas — Remote, Philippines



About Midnight Atlas

Midnight Atlas is a US-incorporated consumer brand operator building category-defining brands in the wellness and sleep space. Our flagship sleep and recovery supplement brand launches in the US in June 2026. Fully remote, founder-led, and built for serious growth.



The Role

This is the growth engine of the brand. You will own every channel that brings people into our ecosystem — influencer seeding, creator relationships, affiliate management, TikTok Shop, press outreach, LinkedIn partnerships, and YouTube publishing.

You're building this from zero. No existing creator list. No affiliate programme already running. No media relationships established. You build all of it and own it completely.

This role rewards people who are organised, persistent, commercially sharp, and genuinely excited by building brand 
ntum from scratch.



What You'll Own

Influencer & Creator



Influencer seeding — list building, tiering, outreach, gifting coordination, tracking, follow-up

Creator relationship management — ongoing communication, content briefing, performance monitoring

UGC coordination — briefing creators, collecting assets, feeding into creative pipeline



Affiliate Programme



SocialSnowball — full programme management, affiliate onboarding, link and discount code management, commission tracking, performance reporting

Investor community management — responding to comments and questions from our crowdfunding community



TikTok Shop



Full TikTok Shop setup and management

Creator sourcing for TikTok Shop

Boosting coordination

Weekly TikTok Shop performance reporting



Outreach & Partnerships



LinkedIn outreach — drafting and sending from founder's account for seeding and brand partnerships

Clay — creator and prospect enrichment

HeyReach — LinkedIn outreach sequencing and management



Press & PR



Media list building — sleep, wellness, and biohacking publications and podcasts

Press kit management

Regular outreach cadence to journalists, editors, and podcast hosts

Tracking coverage and inbound press enquiries



Reporting



Weekly paid media performance summary — Meta, Google, TikTok into clean founder dashboard

Weekly growth dashboard — creator pipeline, affiliate performance, TikTok Shop metrics, press outreach status





You Are



A natural relationship builder — comfortable reaching out cold and following up without being pushy

Highly organised — dozens of creator relationships on the go and nothing falls through the cracks

Data literate — you track everything, report clearly, know what good looks like

Proactive — you bring creator ideas and partnership opportunities without being asked

A sharp written communicator — your outreach copy is personal, concise, and gets replies

Commercially minded — outreach exists to drive revenue, not vanity metrics





Must-Have Skills



Proven influencer or affiliate outreach experience — show us a campaign you ran with results

Strong written English

TikTok platform fluency — TikTok Shop experience strongly preferred

Data competency — pull from multiple sources, present reporting cleanly

Experience with Western DTC or lifestyle brands



Nice to Have



SocialSnowball or affiliate platform experience

Clay or prospect enrichment tool experience

HeyReach or LinkedIn sequencing experience

PR or media outreach experience

YouTube publishing experience





The Culture

We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with a brand from zero to something significant — and be rewarded for it.

This is a long-term role. We're thinking 5+ years, not 5 months. If you're the right person, you'll have more responsibility, higher pay, and genuine ownership over something that matters.

The founder is based in Bali and runs the business remotely. He visits the team in person. He's accessible, direct, and genuinely invested in the people he works with.

We operate with high trust and zero micromanagement. You'll be expected to take initiative, flag problems before they become crises, and bring ideas without being asked. If you need to be told what to do every day, this isn't the right fit.

We use AI tools across the entire team. Claude and role-specific tools are all provided. We expect you to embrace them, learn them fast, and use them to multiply your output.

Compensation includes a 6-monthly salary review tied to brand performance, an annual team bonus pool, and an annual team trip.



The Setup



Full time, exclusive — no other clients

Fully remote, Philippines-based

$
/month based on experience

6-monthly salary review

Annual performance bonus pool

Annual team trip

Tools provided: Claude Pro, SocialSnowball access, Clay seat, HeyReach seat, LinkedIn Sales Navigator





To Apply

Send us four things:



Your CV

An example of an influencer or affiliate campaign you managed — results, not just description

Your answer to this question in under 150 words: "You're launching a brand new sleep supplement with zero brand awareness. How do you build your first 50 micro-influencer targets and what does your opening outreach message look like?"

A 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself — tell us who you are, what you're best at, why this role interests you, and walk us through one piece of work you're proud of



Applications without a campaign example and a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Ai Video Creator
description:

You'll be working directly with the founder to produce AI-generated B-roll and talking-head style videos using tools like Google Veo (Flow). The content focuses on natural remedies, wellness tips, and health education — think grandma's secret remedies meets modern storytelling.

This is an ongoing, long-term role for the right person.



What You'll Be Doing:

Producing realistic talking-head animations with expressive characters, lip-sync, and natural gestures

Matching specific visual styles, moods, and energy levels across content pieces

Crafting and refining prompts to get the best possible output from AI video tools

Working efficiently with free credits — being resourceful and strategic with generations

Collaborating on creative direction and suggesting improvements





Who You Are:

title: Tech / AI Developer
description:
About the Role



We've built an internal AI-powered tool that connects to our case management system (Clio) and automates drafting, trust diagrams, and client data tasks. We need a developer to own its growth and keep our technology running reliably. This is a true ownership role — you identify what needs to be built next, solve problems independently, and deliver without hand-holding.



What You'll Do



•       Own the tool's ongoing development: maintain the Clio API integration, build new features, and proactively plan the next phase.



•       Fix problems cleanly and independently: diagnose root causes, verify fixes hold, and don't wait to be walked through it.



•       Use AI as a core development tool: collaborate with Claude Code and similar tools daily on architecture, UX, and problem-solving.



•       Document everything: write clear instructions so non-technical staff can use new features as they launch.



What We Need



•       This role is not for someone who needs guidance to get started. If you require significant support to build systems, troubleshoot issues, or figure out next steps, this is not the right fit.



•       Proven experience building and maintaining API integrations or web-based tools



•       AI is your daily driver — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar. You already use these tools instinctively, not occasionally.



•       Strong written English for documentation and team communication



•       Reliable setup: Windows, stable internet with backup, quiet workspace



Schedule



Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM–5:00 PM CST



Why Work With Us



You'll have real ownership over a tool the whole office depends on, with room to grow as we do. We're a small, communicative team doing meaningful work for real families.



How to Apply



Send your resume and a 3–5 minute Loom video confirming your availability and backup setup, describing a project where you owned an integration end-to-end, and showing how you use AI in your development work.

title: Executive / Virtual / Personal Assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant / Executive Assistant (Remote, Part-Time, Full-Time Growth)

 

We’re seeking a proactive, highly organized Virtual Assistant to support an entrepreneur with a dynamic lifestyle and multiple business interests. This role spans travel coordination, financial admin, personal projects, digital content support, and more. Ideal for someone resourceful, tech-savvy, and detail-oriented. 



This is a remote, part-time position (20 hours/week with growth to full-time, benefits and bonuses). Requiring 1-2 hours overlap with Pacific Time when it’s needed to reach out to businesses that may only be open 8-5 PST for example. Typically we’d have 1 video meeting per week on Mondays to discuss the priorities and other work is flexible to be completed on your own time with due dates in mind. 



 

Key Responsibilities

• Manage calendars, inboxes, scheduling, prioritization, and follow-through

• Coordinate travel including flights, hotels, transportation, itineraries

• Support property-related needs such as short term airbnb management, scheduling vendors, services, invoices, and monitoring recurring tasks.

• Track and organize expenses; maintain spreadsheet-based reports

• Conduct online research for vendors, pricing, products, market data, and personal projects

• Order essential items, track deliveries/returns, and coordinate gifts and services when needed

• Book personal appointments - health, wellness,, dining, etc.

• Administrative tasks including streamlining personal and business systems

• Learn new tools independently and proactively research solutions without needing step-by-step instruction



 

Requirements

• Excellent spoken and written English with clear, professional communication.

• Prior experience with customer service, spreadsheets, research, travel planning, or financial admin is strongly preferred.

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, consistent, and dependable with reliable internet and computer access.

• Strong Google Workspace proficiency—especially Sheets (formulas, formatting, data cleanup; bonus if pivot tables are familiar).

• Resourceful problem solver—able to complete tasks independently, including entirely new tasks by researching how to do them

• Comfortable using AI tools with the understanding that all outputs must be verified, fact-checked, and properly organized before delivery

• Enjoys learning new tools: Google Workspace, Asana, Claude, ChatGPT, Canva, financial and travel platforms.

• High integrity, ownership mindset, and commitment to delivering accurate, timely, polished work.

• Ability to work autonomously while being accessible for periodic check-ins (e.g., short AM/PM PST  windows).

 

Benefits

• Part-time start (20h first month) with plans to grow into a long-term, full-time role within 1-3 months

• Flexible remote work with weekly check-ins to align the agenda for the week

• Opportunity to learn new systems, take on higher-level projects, and grow with the businesses



Core Values

• Be open, authentic, and communicate with clarity and integrity.

• Take passionate ownership—deliver what you promise, learn from mistakes, and bring solutions.

• Be resourceful, proactive, and committed to customer success.

• Work well with others—show empathy, respect time, and maintain humility with confidence.

• Bloom where you are planted—embrace growth, creativity, and pride in your work.

• Have fun and bring positive energy while striving for excellence.

 



How to Apply

Please submit your application through the form below. Only candidates who complete the form will be considered along with up to date resumes, including months + year to show total duration in a role/company. There will be a loom video exercise to show communication and understanding.




 





Job description link 







Salary:
per month depending on total hours and experience

title: Marketing Strategist
description:
Position: Marketing Strategist 

Reports to: COO, ILX Travel



About ILX Travel 



ILX Travel is a premier luxury travel concierge company dedicated to designing bespoke travel experiences—resorts, private villas, yacht charters, cultural journeys, cruises, and wellness retreats. As a Virtuoso affiliate, ILX provides exclusive privileges, amenities, and insider access. 



Mission, Vision, Values & Brand Promise 



Mission: 

To design extraordinary, personalized travel experiences that enrich our clients’ lives through discovery, comfort, and authentic connection—delivered with exceptional service, expertise, and care. 



Vision: 

To become the most trusted luxury travel partner for discerning travelers seeking curated journeys, exclusive access, and seamless service. 



Values: 

Excellence • Integrity • Creativity • Client?Centered Service • Collaboration • Innovation • Continuous Improvement 



Brand Promise: 

Effortless luxury, thoughtfully curated. 



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Strategist leads the development, execution, and optimization of ILX Travel’s marketing strategy. This role blends strategic planning, creative brand development, and data?driven decision-making. Ideal candidates must have a deep understanding of the travel and luxury industries, strong marketing leadership, and the ability to guide execution across internal tea
mbers and external partners. 



Key Responsibilities: 

I. Marketing Strategy & Planning 

-Develop and maintain an annual marketing strategy aligned with ILX Travel’s business goals 

-Define target markets, luxury traveler personas, and positioning within the travel industry 

-Identify and prioritize high-impact marketing initiatives 



II. Brand, Messaging & Campaign Direction 

-Lead brand messaging, storytelling, and positioning for ILX Travel 

-Ensure consistent brand voice across website,
, social media, partnerships, and campaigns 

-Plan and oversee multi-channel marketing campaigns 



III. Performance, Data & Optimization 

-Define KPIs and success metrics for marketing initiatives 

-Monitor performance, analyze results, and optimize campaigns for ROI 

-Strengthen CRM workflows and marketing automation (Zoho CRM or similar) 



IV. Cross-Functional & Vendor Leadership 

-Partner with sales teams to convert MQLs. 

-Provide strategic direction to internal contributors, agencies, creators, and vendors 

-Manage marketing budgets and recommend resource allocation 



Required Qualifications: 

-Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or related field 

-5+ years of experience in marketing strategy, preferably within travel, hospitality, luxury services, or premium consumer brands 

-Experience in leading marketing strategy and decision-making  

-Strong understanding of digital marketing, SEO/SEM, paid media, and content strategy 

-Experience working with CRM and marketing automation platforms 

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills 



Preferred Qualifications: 

-Prior experience within the travel industry or luxury travel sector 

-Familiarity with Virtuoso or similar luxury travel networks 

-Experience managing agencies, partnerships, or influencer collaborations 



Interested applicants are encouraged to apply via the following link:


/4rYl61U



Please note that only applications submitted through this link will be entertained.

title: Medical Intake Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and compassionate Medical Intake Coordinator to manage patient intake processes for our Hospice and Home Health services in California. This role serves as the primary point of contact for new referrals, patients, families, and referral partners, while also supporting light marketing and relationship-building efforts with existing referral sources.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Receive and process new hospice and home health referrals via phone, fax,
, and EMR systems.

2. Verify patient demographics, insurance eligibility, and medical documentation in compliance with HIPAA, Medicare, and California state regulations.

3. Coordinate and schedule initial assessments, admissions, and start-of-care visits with clinical staff.

4. Communicate clearly and compassionately with patients, families, physicians, hospitals, and referral partners.

5. Maintain accurate, complete, and confidential patient records in accordance with HIPAA privacy and security standards.

6. Track referral status, follow-ups, and outcomes to ensure timely admission or appropriate disposition.

7. Collaborate with clinical, billing, and administrative teams to ensure smooth transitions from intake to care delivery.

8. Provide updates to existing referral sources regarding patient status and admission outcomes.

9. Support minimal marketing activities such as maintaining referral lists, sending updates or materials to existing referral partners, and assisting with referral relationship management.

10. Assist with intake and referral reports as needed.



Requirements:

Previous experience in medical intake, hospice, home health, or healthcare coordination preferred.

Working knowledge of HIPAA compliance, patient confidentiality, and proper handling of PHI.

Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.

Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.

Ability to handle sensitive situations with professionalism, discretion, and empathy.

Proficiency with EMR systems and Microsoft Office or similar platforms.

Ability to multitask and work effectively in a fast-paced healthcare environment.



Preferred Qualifications:

Experience working with California-based hospice or home health agencies.

Familiarity with insurance verification, authorizations, physician orders, and Medicare guidelines.

Formal training or hands-on experience in HIPAA compliance and healthcare documentation standards.

Background in intake coordination, customer service, or referral management.



Monthly Rate: ?20,000



Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST



Equipment Requirements:

Laptop or desktop computer

Stable internet connection

Backup internet connection and power supply

Webcam

Headset or earphones



How to Apply:

If you have a strong passion for providing quality hospice or home health care and want to make a positive impact on the lives of patients and their families, we encourage you to apply.



Please submit your resume with the subject title “INTAKE" to

title: Content Specialist / Senior Copywriter
description:
Job Title: Content Specialist / Senior Copywriter | Remote



Location: Asia or similar time zones (UTC +8)

Salary: $2,000-$2,500/month gross

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week 



Only English CVs will be accepted.



Retalent Agency is a global remote recruitment agency that connects talented professionals like you with top companies in e-commerce, marketing, and tech. Since 2019, we’ve helped hundreds of candidates from Latin America, Eastern Europe, Asia, and South Africa land full-time remote roles with international teams.



When you apply through Retalent, you’re not just applying for a job; you’re stepping into a community of growing businesses and ambitious professionals.



Let us help you find the right opportunity to grow your career from anywhere in the world.



Our Client:



Founded by two sisters who grew up navigating eczema and fungal skin infections within their own family, this brand was built on a deeply personal mission. Drawing from heritage botanical wisdom and combining it with research-backed science, they create potent, plant-powered skin remedies that genuinely make a difference.



With over 1.5 million products delivered, 25,000+ five-star reviews, and a decade of customer trust, they have established themselves as a beloved name in natural skincare. Now, they are expanding into new channels and audiences to reach even more families who need their products.



They are a small, US-based, globally distributed team that believes great content is how great products find the people who need them. Everything they create lives by one standard: Ingredients Matter: Pure, Potent, Proven.



In This Role, You’ll:



Act as a sharp, detail-oriented content writer with a strong sense of brand voice and consumer appeal. This is a content-focused role built around your ability to research deeply, write compelling copy across multiple formats, and serve as the quality gate for all customer-facing content.



You'll work closely with our co-founders and Assistant Marketing Manager as part of a globally distributed team. AI tools are central to how we work, you'll use them to accelerate research, generate drafts, and iterate quickly. Your judgment, brand instinct, and editorial eye are what make the output great.



This is a full-time, remote position with working hours that substantially overlap UTC+8. How you communicate and collaborate matters as much as your talent and qualifications.



What You'll Be Doing



-Content Creation: Write scripts for TikTok branded videos, Amazon video ads, and future ad platforms. Create
 copy, website content, educational articles for AEO/ GEO visibility, and long-form content.

-Creative Testing & Messaging: Develop systematic messaging variations for messaging and creative testing, breaking down product angles, benefits, and hooks to identify what resonates through data.

-Content Review & Refinement: Serve as the brand voice quality gate. Review and refine output from AI tools and third-party platforms (such as Amazon listing optimization tools) for accuracy, consumer appeal, and brand alignment.

-Research & Consumer Insights: Conduct deep product, market, and competitive research. Mine customer reviews, forums, and social conversations to understand real customer language, pain points, and motivations. Use these insights to shape stronger messaging.

-Content Repurposing & Social Media: Adapt existing content (video scripts,
 copy, product messaging, articles) into social media posts across Instagram,
 
, and other platforms.

-Creative Briefing: Write clear, actionable briefs for graphic designers and TikTok content creators to keep visual and verbal messaging aligned and on-brand.

-Additional Marketing Support: Contribute to other marketing initiatives as needed, including Amazon customer Q&A, review engagement, and emerging projects that support the company’s growth objectives.



What You’ll Bring:



-2 to 4 years of experience in content writing, copywriting, or brand communications, ideally for U.S.-facing consumer brands.

-Strong written English with the ability to produce polished, consumer-facing copy that sounds natural to a U.S. audience. Fluent in spoken English.

-Demonstrated ability to write across formats: video scripts, product copy,
, social media, website, and long-form articles.

-Skilled at prompting AI writing and research tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) to produce high-quality output. AI is a core part of our content workflow, not an occasional aid.

-Strong research skills and instinct. You dig into products, competitors, reviews, social signals, and customer conversations before you start writing.

-A portfolio or writing samples that demonstrate brand voice adaptability and consumer-oriented messaging.

-Familiarity with Amazon e-commerce, health and wellness, or OTC skin products is a plus but not required.



Skill Sets



-Excellent writing and editing skills with a sharp editorial eye for both accuracy and consumer appeal.

-Research-driven mindset. You investigate before you write.

-Structured creative thinking. Able to break a single product into multiple testable angles, benefits, and hooks.

-You can internalize a brand's tone and execute it consistently across formats.

-Collaborative, low-ego, and self-directed. You take high-level direction and run with it.

-Intellectually honest with data. You let performance results guide the next iteration.

-Welcomes direct feedback and iterates quickly.

-Fast learner motivated to grow into new areas of marketing beyond content.



What’s In It for You:



-Competitive salary: $2,000 to $2,500 USD per month.

-Competitive raise based on performance.

-Paid vacation.

-Professional development opportunities.

-Opportunity to grow into a senior marketing role as the team and brand expand.

-Be part of a close-knit and supportive team that values your input and relies on your expertise.

-Collaboration without micromanagement.

-Work-life balance.

title: Blueprint/Plan Take off Specialist
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Plan Takeoff Specialist to read blueprints and accurately measure distances between specific points on construction drawings. This role is focused on precision measurement, not estimating prices or managing projects.



The ideal candidate is comfortable working with scaled drawings, understands architectural and/or engineering plans, and can consistently deliver measurements within 1/8-inch accuracy using digital or manual tools.



Key Responsibilities

Blueprint Review & Measurement



Read and interpret architectural, civil, and/or trade-specific blueprints



Identify correct drawing scales and verify scale accuracy



Measure distances, lengths, and paths between designated points on plans



Document measurements clearly with references to sheet numbers and details



Ensure measurements meet required tolerance (within 1/8 inch where applicable)



Flag unclear, conflicting, or missing plan information



Maintain organized records of measurements and assumptions



Follow standardized measurement procedures and checklists



Communicate measurement results clearly to internal teams



Ask clarifying questions when plans are ambiguous



Meet deadlines while maintaining accuracy and consistency



Required Qualifications



Proven experience reading and measuring from blueprints or plan sets



Strong understanding of drawing scales and measurement calibration



High attention to detail and commitment to accuracy



Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision



Ability to document work clearly and consistently





Applicants may be asked to complete a short blueprint measurement test to demonstrate accuracy and familiarity with scaled drawings.

title: Web Developer
description:
We’re looking for a Website Designer/Developer to design, build, and maintain modern, high-performing websites that reflect our brand and converts visitors into leads/customers. You’ll own the site’s user experience, visual design, and implementation—collaborating with leadership to continuously improve performance, SEO, accessibility, and speed.



Responsibilities



Design and build responsive web pages and layouts (desktop/tablet/mobile)



Translate brand guidelines into clean, consistent UI components



Develop and maintain site features (navigation, forms, landing pages, blog, etc.)



Implement SEO best practices (metadata, schema basics, internal linking, redirects)



Optimize site performance (Core Web Vitals, image compression, caching)



Ensure accessibility standards (WCAG-friendly structure, contrast, keyboard nav)



Integrate third-party tools (analytics, CRM forms, chat widgets, scheduling, etc.)



Maintain and improve CMS workflows (e.g., WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, or headless CMS)



Monitor site health and fix bugs (cross-browser, responsive issues, broken links)



Collaborate with leadership to scope projects, estimate timelines, and deliver updates



Set up basic tracking and reporting (GA4, Tag Manager, conversion events)



Required Qualifications



2+ years experience designing and developing websites (or strong portfolio showing equivalent skill)



Strong front-end skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (and modern layout techniques)



Experience with at least one platform/CMS: WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, or similar



Familiarity with responsive design, component-based design, and UI best practices



Working knowledge of SEO fundamentals and performance optimization



Ability to interpret requirements and turn them into polished design + working pages



Strong communication and project organization skills



Preferred Qualifications (Nice to Have)



Back-end/CMS development: PHP (WordPress), Node, or headless CMS integrations



Experience with design tools



Conversion rate optimization (CRO) and A/B testing experience



/CRM integrations: HubSpot, Mailchimp, ServiceTitan, Salesforce, etc.



Copywriting or content strategy collaboration experience



Key Skills



UI/UX design, information architecture, and visual hierarchy



Front-end development and debugging



Performance, accessibility, and SEO-minded development



CMS administration and content publishing workflows



Attention to detail and quality control



Deliverables / Outcomes



A fast, modern website that is easy to update and maintain



Mobile-first pages that match brand standards



Measurable improvements in lead conversion, speed, and search visibility



Reliable site operations with minimal downtime and quick issue resolution



Work Style



Comfortable working independently with clear priorities



Proactive: identifies improvements and recommends solutions



Collaborative with marketing and leadership; able to explain technical choices simply

title: Accounting/Bookkeeping Rep
description:
1) Core Bookkeeping & General Ledger



Maintain the general ledger and chart of accounts (set up, mapping, cleanup, and ongoing accuracy).



Record and categorize all transactions: deposits, payments, transfers, journal entries, and adjustments.



Ensure consistent class/job/customer/vendor coding (as applicable).



Maintain supporting schedules (fixed assets, prepaid expenses, loans, etc.).



2) Accounts Payable (AP)



Receive, code, and enter vendor bills.



Manage approval workflows and ensure policies are followed.



Schedule and process payments (ACH/check/card), optimize payment timing, and avoid late fees.



Maintain vendor records, W-9s, and year-end 1099 support (as applicable).



Resolve vendor discrepancies and maintain positive vendor relationships.



3) Accounts Receivable (AR) & Collections



Create invoices, apply payments, and track outstanding balances.



Reconcile merchant deposits and payment processor activity.



Monitor AR aging; perform reminders/collections professionally.



Address billing disputes and correct invoicing errors quickly.



4) Bank, Credit Card & Loan Reconciliations



Perform timely bank and credit card reconciliations (weekly/monthly).



Reconcile loans/lines of credit; track interest, principal, and covenants (if any).



Investigate and resolve discrepancies and unusual activity.



5) Payroll & Benefits Coordination



Process payroll or coordinate with an outside payroll provider (hours, deductions, reimbursements).



Maintain payroll documentation and ensure proper job/class allocation.



Support benefits and retirement contributions reconciliation (as applicable).



Ensure compliance with payroll tax filings via provider or CPA.



6) Month-End Close & Financial Reporting



Lead the monthly close process: accruals, deferred revenue, prepaid expenses, inventory (if any), fixed assets, and adjustments.



Produce monthly financial statements:



Profit & Loss (Income Statement)



Balance Sheet



Cash Flow summary (or cash forecasting view)



Provide variance analysis vs budget/prior periods and explain drivers to leadership.



Maintain a clear month-end close checklist and documentation trail.



7) Cash Flow Management



Maintain short-term and rolling cash forecasts.



Track upcoming payables, expected receipts, payroll, and tax obligations.



Highlight cash risks early, propose timing strategies, and monitor reserves.



8) Sales Tax / Use Tax (If Applicable)



Track taxable vs non-taxable sales and required exemptions/resale certificates.



Prepare sales tax reports and coordinate filings/remittance.



9) Budgeting & Management Support



Assist with annual budgeting and reforecasting.



Track KPIs (gross margin, labor %, overhead %, AR days, etc. depending on the business).



Build and maintain simple financial models and dashboards as needed.



10) Tax & CPA Support



Maintain audit-ready documentation and organized backups.



Coordinate with CPAs for:



Year-end close



Business tax filings



1099s (if applicable)



Prepare workpapers, schedules, and reconciliations to reduce CPA
.



11) Systems, Controls & Process Improvement



Maintain bookkeeping SOPs and enforce internal controls (segregation of duties where possible).



Improve workflows, automate recurring tasks, and reduce errors.



Support accounting software and app integrations (POS, CRM, payroll, expense tools).



Ensure data integrity, security, and proper retention of financial records.



12) Administrative/Compliance (As Needed)



Maintain business licenses/registrations tracking (if assigned).



Support insurance audit requests (workers comp/general liability).



Support lender reporting requirements.



Required Qualifications



3–7+ years of hands-on bookkeeping experience, including full-charge responsibilities.



Strong knowledge of accounting fundamentals (debits/credits, accrual concepts, reconciliations).



Experience with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks Online/Desktop, Xero) and Excel/Google Sheets.



Proven ability to manage deadlines and handle sensitive/confidential information.



High attention to detail and strong documentation habits.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience in the company’s industry (construction, trades, professional services, retail, etc.).



Payroll experience (multi-state or prevailing wage a plus, if relevant).



Experience with job costing, inventory, or project-based accounting (if relevant).



Bookkeeping certification (AIPB, NACPB) or accounting coursework.



Experience managing integrations and workflow tools (
, Gusto, ADP, Stripe, Square, etc.).



Skills & Competencies



Accuracy & integrity: consistently clean books and clear audit trails.



Ownership mindset: anticipates issues, solves them, and communicates early.



Communication: translates financials into plain-English insights for non-finance leaders.



Process discipline: uses checklists, controls, and repeatable routines.



Tech-savvy: comfortable with systems, exports, and data cleanup.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Month-end close completed by 5 business days after month end.



Reconciliations completed accurately and on time (banks/CCs/loans).



AR aging targets met (e.g., % current, DSO).



Clean vendor records and on-time payments with minimal exceptions.



Minimal rework from CPA; consistent classification and documentation.



Working Relationships



Reports to: CFO



Partners with: Operations, Sales/Customer Service, HR/Payroll provider, CPA/tax firm, and vendors/customers as needed.

 Key Responsibilities

s professionally

 Job Details

Monday to Friday (flexible hours)

Friendly and supportive team environment

title: Creative & Content Manager
description:
Creative & Content Manager

Midnight Atlas — Remote, Philippines



About Midnight Atlas

Midnight Atlas is a US-incorporated consumer brand operator building category-defining brands in the wellness and sleep space. Our flagship brand — a premium sleep and recovery supplement — launches in the US in June 2026. We're founder-led, fully remote, and built to scale.

We don't operate like a typical company. There's no bureaucracy, no pointless meetings, and no micromanagement. You own your lane completely and are expected to run with it.



The Role

This is the most visible role in the business. You will be the creative force behind everything the world sees — the founder's personal brand across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and LinkedIn, and our flagship supplement brand across every channel and asset type.

This is not a VA role. You're not executing a brief someone else wrote. You're building and running the entire creative output of a founder-led brand from scratch — and you'll have full ownership of it.

The founder films and records regularly. Your job is to take that raw material and multiply it into a full multi-platform content machine using AI tools, sharp editing, and strong creative instinct.



What You'll Own

Founder Personal Brand



YouTube channel end-to-end — editing, titles, thumbnails, descriptions, chapters, SEO optimisation, posting, community tab management, analytics reporting

TikTok — editing, posting, trend awareness, native content optimisation

Instagram — Reels editing, feed management, Stories, scheduling

LinkedIn — drafting posts in founder's voice, scheduling, comment monitoring

/X — thread creation from pillar content, scheduling



Brand Creative



Full content calendar ownership across all brand channels

Brand visual identity maintenance — Canva and Figma template library

Ad creative assembly — static and video for Meta and Google (creative production, not media buying)

 headers and campaign visual assets

Landing page visual assets

Brand pack and retailer/wholesale deck design

Investor-facing design assets — pitch deck visuals, one-pagers

Quote graphics, story templates, UGC repurposing



Content Repurposing System



AI-assisted repurposing pipeline — one pillar piece becomes 20–30 assets per week

Briefing process ownership — creative brief templates for any freelance or external creative work





You Are



Obsessed with content that performs, not just looks good

Fast — you produce at volume without sacrificing quality

Proactive — you bring creative ideas without being asked

Data literate — you understand watch time, saves, shares, and engagement rate and report on them weekly

Opinionated — you'll push back if you think something won't land

An AI-first operator — you use tools to multiply your output





Must-Have Skills



Proven video editing portfolio — Reels, TikTok, YouTube. No portfolio, no consideration.

Strong working knowledge of Canva Pro

Experience with AI repurposing tools — Opus Clip, Descript, CapCut, or similar

Figma experience preferred

Social scheduling tools — Buffer, Later, or similar

Excellent written English — you'll write in a founder's voice

Proven experience working with Western DTC or lifestyle brands





The Culture

We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with a brand from zero to something significant — and be rewarded for it.

This is a long-term role. We're thinking 5+ years, not 5 months. If you're the right person, you'll have more responsibility, higher pay, and genuine ownership over something that matters.

The founder is based in Bali and runs the business remotely. He visits the team in person. He's accessible, direct, and genuinely invested in the people he works with.

We operate with high trust and zero micromanagement. You'll be expected to take initiative, flag problems before they become crises, and bring ideas without being asked. If you need to be told what to do every day, this isn't the right fit.

We use AI tools across the entire team. Claude and role-specific tools are all provided. We expect you to embrace them, learn them fast, and use them to multiply your output.

Compensation includes a 6-monthly salary review tied to brand performance, an annual team bonus pool, and an annual team trip.



The Setup



Full time, exclusive — no other clients

Fully remote, Philippines-based

$800–$1,000/month based on experience

6-monthly salary review

Annual performance bonus pool

Annual team trip

Tools provided: Claude Pro, Canva Pro, Opus Clip, Descript, CapCut, Figma, Buffer





To Apply

Send us four things:



Your CV

A portfolio of video content you've edited — YouTube, Reels, or TikTok

Your answer to this question in under 150 words: "A founder films a 12-minute YouTube video about why most sleep supplements don't work. Walk me through exactly what you do with it."

A 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself — tell us who you are, what you're best at, why this role interests you, and walk us through one piece of work you're proud of



Applications without both a portfolio and a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Email, CX & Operations Manager
description:
Email, CX & Operations Manager

Midnight Atlas — Remote, Philippines



About Midnight Atlas

Midnight Atlas is a US-incorporated consumer brand operator building category-defining brands in the wellness and sleep space. Our flagship sleep and recovery supplement brand launches in the US in June 2026. Fully remote, founder-led, and built to scale fast.



The Role

This is the operational backbone of the business. You will own the full customer lifecycle — from the 
nt someone joins the
 list through to repeat purchase, subscription retention, and every support interaction in between.

You need to be genuinely excellent at Klaviyo. Not "I've used it." Flows, segmentation, deliverability, revenue attribution, A/B testing. If that describes you, read on.

You'll also own the full CX operation via Gorgias and the entire Shopify and Skio backend. At launch this role becomes the most business-critical position in the company. Customers are paying. Things go wrong. You handle it.



What You'll Own

 & SMS



Klaviyo — all flows, campaigns, SMS, segmentation, deliverability, A/B testing, revenue reporting

Weekly
 performance dashboard — open rates, click rates, revenue per recipient, list health

Investor
 nurture sequences — execution and list management



Customer Experience



Gorgias — full CX inbox, SOP library, escalation process

Refunds, disputes, returns coordination

Reviews and reputation management

HSA/FSA customer query handling

Brand voice consistency across all customer communications



Operations



Shopify — order management, day-to-day admin

Skio — full subscription management, churn monitoring, MRR reporting

Weekly subscription health dashboard — active subscribers, churn rate, MRR

Inventory tracking support

Supplier liaison on operational matters

CX SOP library ownership and maintenance





You Are



Analytically minded — you look at data before making decisions

A systems builder — you create SOPs so nothing relies on memory

Proactive — you flag problems before they become fires

Calm under pressure — launch periods get messy, you stay steady

Warm and clear in customer communication — on-brand always

Commercially aware — retention directly drives revenue and you know it





Must-Have Skills



Proven Klaviyo experience — show us flows you've built and results they drove. No evidence, no consideration.

Shopify back-end competency

Gorgias or equivalent CX platform experience

Strong written English

Data competency — you build dashboards, interpret metrics, report clearly

Experience with Western DTC brands



Nice to Have



Skio or subscription management experience


 or Okendo experience

Basic HTML for
 template editing





The Culture

We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with a brand from zero to something significant — and be rewarded for it.

This is a long-term role. We're thinking 5+ years, not 5 months. If you're the right person, you'll have more responsibility, higher pay, and genuine ownership over something that matters.

The founder is based in Bali and runs the business remotely. He visits the team in person. He's accessible, direct, and genuinely invested in the people he works with.

We operate with high trust and zero micromanagement. You'll be expected to take initiative, flag problems before they become crises, and bring ideas without being asked. If you need to be told what to do every day, this isn't the right fit.

We use AI tools across the entire team. Claude and role-specific tools are all provided. We expect you to embrace them, learn them fast, and use them to multiply your output.

Compensation includes a 6-monthly salary review tied to brand performance, an annual team bonus pool, and an annual team trip.



The Setup



Full time, exclusive — no other clients

Fully remote, Philippines-based

$900–$1,100/month based on experience

6-monthly salary review

Annual performance bonus pool

Annual team trip

Tools provided: Claude Pro, Klaviyo seat, Gorgias seat, Shopify access, Skio access





To Apply

Send us four things:



Your CV

Evidence of a Klaviyo flow you built — results, open rates, revenue impact. Screenshot or Loom walkthrough both accepted.

Your answer to this question in under 150 words: "Our welcome flow has a 42% open rate on
 1 but drops to 11% by
 3. What are the first three things you investigate?"

A 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself — tell us who you are, what you're best at, why this role interests you, and walk us through one piece of work you're proud of



Applications without Klaviyo evidence and a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Experienced Funnelish Funnel Builder (Health/Beauty/Gadgets) - Advertorial & Shopify Checkout Expert

checkout integration), with a short explanation of what you built

Applications without proof of Funnelish work and Shopify checkout

integration will be ignored.

If you cannot show previous Funnelish work with Shopify checkout integration

and complete a test task, please do not apply.

"I have real experience building Funnelish advertorial funnels with Shopify

checkout integration."

Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be reviewed.

AVAILABILITY REQUIREMENTS:

- This is a long-term role for the right candidate

APPLY NOW:

If you meet all the requirements above, please submit your application with:

1. Proof of previous Funnelish work (links or screenshots - especially showing

Shopify checkout)

2. Your application starting with the required phrase

3. Brief explanation of your experience in health/beauty/gadgets niches

title: AI Video Creator (Veo / Google Flow) – Short-Form Health & Wellness Content
description:
We're a growing health & wellness brand producing scroll-stopping short-form video content for social media (TikTok, Instagram Reels,
). We use AI-generated visuals to create engaging, high-quality videos — and we need someone talented to join our team.

You'll be working directly with the founder to produce AI-generated B-roll and talking-head style videos using tools like Google Veo (Flow). The content focuses on natural remedies, wellness tips, and health education — think grandma's secret remedies meets modern storytelling.

This is an ongoing, long-term role for the right person.



What You'll Be Doing:



Creating AI-generated videos using Veo (Google Flow) based on provided scripts and creative direction

Producing realistic talking-head animations with expressive characters, lip-sync, and natural gestures

Matching specific visual styles, moods, and energy levels across content pieces

Crafting and refining prompts to get the best possible output from AI video tools

Working efficiently with free credits — being resourceful and strategic with generations

Collaborating on creative direction and suggesting improvements





Who You Are:

You have hands-on experience with AI video generation tools (Veo, Runway, Pika, Kling, or similar)

You have a sharp eye for detail — you notice when something looks "off"

You understand what makes short-form video content feel authentic and engaging

You're resourceful, self-driven, and can work independently

You communicate clearly and take feedback well

Bonus: experience with health/wellness content or social media marketing





Job Details:

Type: Part-time to start, potential full-time for the right fit

Schedule: Flexible — we care about output, not hours

Compensation: Competitive, discussed with successful candidates

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)



HOW TO APPLY — REQUIRED TEST TASK

To be considered, you MUST complete the test task below. Applications without a completed test will not be reviewed.

Your Task:

Recreate the video linked below as closely as possible using Veo (Google Flow).



Original Video to Replicate:





The Goal:

Match the original video's style, feeling, shot composition, and overall quality — but use your own character/person image. The character should look different but the energy, expressiveness, and vibe should be the same.

Here is the script the character is saying:

"Do you feel unbearable pain in your back that doesn't allow you to stand, bend, or climb stairs? This homemade trick from my grandmother was the best solution. After trying everything, just apply salt with Vicks Vapor Rub, making circular movement. Since then, I no longer suffer from inflammation, pain, or swelling. Comment, book, and I'll send you my complete healing guide. But don't forget to follow me."



Tool to Use:

Use Veo (Google Flow) only ? 

You can use free credits — please be smart and efficient with your generations.



Animation Prompt Tip:

Here's a prompt style that works well (adapt it to the script above):

"Animate her, she is super high energy, expressive and confident. She is easy to love and dynamic when talking. She is doing hand gestures and head gestures. She is saying with a [natural/warm] accent, perfect lip-sync and expressiveness: [INSERT SCRIPT HERE]"

What I'm Evaluating:



- Attention to detail

- Ability to match style and energy while using a different character

- Realistic and clean visuals

- Effort and creativity

- Overall quality of the final result



How to Submit:



Upload your final video to a Google Drive folder

Make sure the link is set to "Anyone with the link can view"

Paste the Google Drive link in your application







Take your time to do it properly — I'm not looking for speed, I'm looking for quality.

If you have any questions, feel free to message me here.

Looking forward to seeing your work

title: Trust Funding Coordinator
description:
About the Role



A trust isn't complete until it's funded. You'll coordinate deed preparation, financial institution outreach, and beneficiary designation updates to make sure every asset gets where it belongs. This role is part legal work, part relationship management — you'll be a regular point of contact with banks, Edward Jones advisors, and county recorders, and how you represent the firm matters.



What You'll Do



•       Prepare and record deeds: draft quitclaim/warranty deeds with accurate legal descriptions and coordinate recording with county offices.



•       Reach out to financial institutions: contact banks, investment firms, and insurance companies to retitle accounts and update beneficiary designations.



•       Draft funding instruction letters to advisors and institutions with clear retitling instructions.



•       Track funding status: maintain internal records so the office can confirm at binder pickup what's complete and what's outstanding.



What We Need



•       2+ years in legal, real estate, financial services, or a coordination-heavy role



•       Warm, professional communicator — you build relationships, not friction. Financial advisors refer clients to us; how you treat them directly affects the firm.



•       Organized and proactive: you track your own open items and follow up without being asked



•       Strong written English for external letters and
s



•       Reliable setup: Windows, stable internet with backup, quiet workspace



Deed preparation or Missouri real property experience is a strong plus. We'll train the right person.



Schedule



Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM–5:00 PM CST



Why Work With Us



You'll be the person who makes a family's estate plan actually work — not just on paper. We're a small team that values warmth and professionalism equally, and we invest in people who take ownership.



How to Apply



Send your resume and a 3–5 minute Loom video confirming your availability and backup setup, describing experience coordinating with external parties (institutions, advisors, or offices), and explaining how you handle follow-up and tracking.

title: Content & Creative Strategist
description:
Job Title: Content Specialist / Senior Copywriter | Remote



Location: Asia or similar time zones (UTC +8)

Salary: $2,000-$2,500/month gross

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week 



Only English CVs will be accepted.



Retalent Agency is a global remote recruitment agency that connects talented professionals like you with top companies in e-commerce, marketing, and tech. Since 2019, we’ve helped hundreds of candidates from Latin America, Eastern Europe, Asia, and South Africa land full-time remote roles with international teams.



When you apply through Retalent, you’re not just applying for a job; you’re stepping into a community of growing businesses and ambitious professionals.



Let us help you find the right opportunity to grow your career from anywhere in the world.



Our Client:



Founded by two sisters who grew up navigating eczema and fungal skin infections within their own family, this brand was built on a deeply personal mission. Drawing from heritage botanical wisdom and combining it with research-backed science, they create potent, plant-powered skin remedies that genuinely make a difference.



With over 1.5 million products delivered, 25,000+ five-star reviews, and a decade of customer trust, they have established themselves as a beloved name in natural skincare. Now, they are expanding into new channels and audiences to reach even more families who need their products.



They are a small, US-based, globally distributed team that believes great content is how great products find the people who need them. Everything they create lives by one standard: Ingredients Matter: Pure, Potent, Proven.



In This Role, You’ll:



Act as a sharp, detail-oriented content writer with a strong sense of brand voice and consumer appeal. This is a content-focused role built around your ability to research deeply, write compelling copy across multiple formats, and serve as the quality gate for all customer-facing content.



You'll work closely with our co-founders and Assistant Marketing Manager as part of a globally distributed team. AI tools are central to how we work, you'll use them to accelerate research, generate drafts, and iterate quickly. Your judgment, brand instinct, and editorial eye are what make the output great.



This is a full-time, remote position with working hours that substantially overlap UTC+8. How you communicate and collaborate matters as much as your talent and qualifications.



What You'll Be Doing



-Content Creation: Write scripts for TikTok branded videos, Amazon video ads, and future ad platforms. Create
 copy, website content, educational articles for AEO/ GEO visibility, and long-form content.

-Creative Testing & Messaging: Develop systematic messaging variations for messaging and creative testing, breaking down product angles, benefits, and hooks to identify what resonates through data.

-Content Review & Refinement: Serve as the brand voice quality gate. Review and refine output from AI tools and third-party platforms (such as Amazon listing optimization tools) for accuracy, consumer appeal, and brand alignment.

-Research & Consumer Insights: Conduct deep product, market, and competitive research. Mine customer reviews, forums, and social conversations to understand real customer language, pain points, and motivations. Use these insights to shape stronger messaging.

-Content Repurposing & Social Media: Adapt existing content (video scripts,
 copy, product messaging, articles) into social media posts across Instagram,
 
, and other platforms.

-Creative Briefing: Write clear, actionable briefs for graphic designers and TikTok content creators to keep visual and verbal messaging aligned and on-brand.

-Additional Marketing Support: Contribute to other marketing initiatives as needed, including Amazon customer Q&A, review engagement, and emerging projects that support the company’s growth objectives.



What You’ll Bring:



-2 to 4 years of experience in content writing, copywriting, or brand communications, ideally for U.S.-facing consumer brands.

-Strong written English with the ability to produce polished, consumer-facing copy that sounds natural to a U.S. audience. Fluent in spoken English.

-Demonstrated ability to write across formats: video scripts, product copy,
, social media, website, and long-form articles.

-Skilled at prompting AI writing and research tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) to produce high-quality output. AI is a core part of our content workflow, not an occasional aid.

-Strong research skills and instinct. You dig into products, competitors, reviews, social signals, and customer conversations before you start writing.

-A portfolio or writing samples that demonstrate brand voice adaptability and consumer-oriented messaging.

-Familiarity with Amazon e-commerce, health and wellness, or OTC skin products is a plus but not required.



Skill Sets



-Excellent writing and editing skills with a sharp editorial eye for both accuracy and consumer appeal.

-Research-driven mindset. You investigate before you write.

-Structured creative thinking. Able to break a single product into multiple testable angles, benefits, and hooks.

-You can internalize a brand's tone and execute it consistently across formats.

-Collaborative, low-ego, and self-directed. You take high-level direction and run with it.

-Intellectually honest with data. You let performance results guide the next iteration.

-Welcomes direct feedback and iterates quickly.

-Fast learner motivated to grow into new areas of marketing beyond content.



What’s In It for You:



-Competitive salary: $2,000 to $2,500 USD per month.

-Competitive raise based on performance.

-Paid vacation.

-Professional development opportunities.

-Opportunity to grow into a senior marketing role as the team and brand expand.

-Be part of a close-knit and supportive team that values your input and relies on your expertise.

-Collaboration without micromanagement.

-Work-life balance.

title: Video Editor – DTC Supplement Brand
description:
We sell health supplements direct to consumer and we need a cracked editor who understands human psychology and retention. Not just the hook. The whole creative.

If you care more about cool transitions than why people keep watching, this isn't for you.

———

???? WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU



$1,000/month base + ad spend share on winning creatives. The better your ads perform, the more you earn. No cap.

Zero micromanagement. Get the work done on time and at a high level. I don't care how or where you do it.

Career growth. Prove you understand why things go viral and move into a Creative Strategist role.

Stability. Full-time income with a team that knows what they're doing.



———

? REQUIREMENTS



You've worked with ecom or DTC brands. Health and supplements preferred.

Experience editing VSLs is a must.

You've spent 1,000+ hours doomscrolling TikTok and IG. You know the trends before they're trends.

Pacing and storytelling above everything. I don't care about your fancy animations.

You can source your own b-roll from TikTok, Instagram, and stock platforms like Envato.

You know how to use AI tools to generate UGC assets, animations, and graphics.

You speak good English. You need to get the nuances of ad copy and the vibe.

You want full-time work. You are all in on this.



———

???? HOW TO APPLY

Send me:



Your best work.

Why it worked. Break down the hook and the retention triggers.

Why you're the best person for this role.

title: Video Editor (FOR META ADS) - SKILLED ONLY $7 hour
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and independent video editor for our fast growing Ecommerce brand Cookware.



You must be able to create Meta ad creatives independently based on competitor videos, creative references, and our briefings. We are not looking for someone who needs step by step guidance. We want someone who can think creatively, work fast, and deliver performance driven ads with minimal input.



This is a long term opportunity with strong potential to grow into a full time role if the work is good.



What you will do

You should be able to handle the full creative process:

* Source relevant video footage

* Generate video footage using AI when needed

* Edit complete video ads for Meta

* Create strong hooks, pacing, ad structure, and overall flow

* Turn briefings and competitor inspiration into original, high converting creatives

* Work independently and make good creative decisions



What we are looking for

* Strong experience with video editing for Meta ads

* Good understanding of direct response advertising

* Experience with ecommerce creatives

* Experience using AI tools for video generation, enhancement, or support

* Strong English communication skills

* Fast, reliable, and easy to work with

* Someone who can take ownership and move quickly without constant back and forth



Communication

Good communication is very important to us.

* We communicate mainly through Slack

* For urgent things, we may also use WhatsApp

* You should be responsive, clear in communication, and comfortable in a fast paced workflow



Delivery time

Fast turnaround is a hard requirement.

* Every task must be delivered within 24 hours

If you cannot consistently deliver within 24 hours, this role is probably not the right fit.



Trial assignment

To apply, shortlisted candidates will be asked to create one video ad for our Cookware brand based on our briefing and competitor references.

The best candidate will be hired.



Salary

$7 per hour



Long term potential

If your work is strong, this can become a full time position with ongoing work and a lot of growth potential.



To apply, please send

* A short introduction in English

* Your best examples of Meta or ecommerce video ads

* Examples of ads you edited yourself

* The AI tools you use

* Your average turnaround time

* Confirmation that you can deliver within 24 hours

* Confirmation that you are comfortable communicating via Slack and WhatsApp when needed

title: Supply Chain & Fulfillment Specialist – Ecommerce Dropshipping (Remote)
description:
SUPPLY CHAIN & FULFILLMENT SPECIALIST – ECOMMERCE DROPSHIPPING (REMOTE)

Remote | Part-Time | 4–6 Hours Per Day | 7 Days a Week

$4.00–$6.00/hour | Growth opportunities for long-term contributors

-------------------------



ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing ecommerce business operating in the dropshipping space. Behind every customer order is a supply chain that needs to run without errors. We are looking for someone who takes full ownership of that process.



This is not a passive role. You will be working directly with suppliers, managing open order issues across multiple stores, and making sure every order reaches its customer — or gets resolved cleanly if it does not.



You will be supported with SOPs, structured sheets,
 templates, and Loom walkthroughs from day one.

-------------------------



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

- Monitor and manage open orders across multiple Shopify stores daily

- Communicate with suppliers to resolve fulfillment issues (out of stock, delays, address errors, returns)

- Handle customer communication for order issues following a structured
 cycle

- Process and verify refunds accurately and on time

- Track stock availability with suppliers and coordinate when items need to be relisted

- Request price deductions and quality checks for high-performing products

- Maintain daily logs and tracking sheets for all open issues

- Send a clear End of Day report covering open issues, actions taken, and refunds processed

-------------------------



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- Proven experience in supply chain or order management in a dropshipping business

- Able to manage multiple concurrent issues across multiple stores without losing track

- Takes initiative and resolves issues without waiting to be told what to do

- Comfortable working with Google Sheets and following detailed SOPs

- Clear written English for supplier and customer communication

- Available for occasional alignment calls during working hours

-------------------------



MUST-HAVES

- At least 1 year of direct dropshipping supply chain or order management experience

- Experience handling supplier communication and fulfillment tracking

- Strong written English

- Reliable computer and internet connection

- Ability to work independently without micromanagement

-------------------------



NICE-TO-HAVES



- Experience with Shopify order management

- Familiarity with parcel tracking tools

- Understanding of refund processes and chargeback prevention

- Experience coordinating with CS or dispute teams

-------------------------



HOW TO APPLY



To show us you read this carefully and pay attention to detail, please record a short Loom video (2–4 minutes) introducing yourself and your experience.



Step 1 — Use this exact subject line in your application:

Supply Chain – Ecommerce (Dropshipping) Application – [Your Full Name]



Step 2 — In your Loom video, cover the following:

- Your background in ecommerce dropshipping supply chain or order management

- How you have handled fulfillment issues and supplier communication in past roles

- Why you believe you would be a good fit for our team



Step 3 — If available, also include evidence of your experience such as:

- Screenshots of order management dashboards or supplier communication

- Examples of processes or metrics you have managed or improved



IMPORTANT: Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be considered.

-------------------------



If you thrive in ecommerce operations, can keep fulfillment running cleanly across multiple stores, and take full ownership without needing micromanagement — this is the role for you.

We look forward to your application.
