title: Video Editor VA
description:
***Professional video editing experience is required.



***Portfolio showing your video editing is required (ideally Canva site, or personal site showcasing work, etc.). If you don't have a portfolio, your application will not reviewed.









About the Role

We're looking for a talented, hardworking, and creative Video Editor who loves bringing ideas to life through motion and storytelling. This role will focus on editing candidate videos, explainers, and talking head content that communicates clearly and keeps viewers engaged.



The ideal candidate has a strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual polish — and can take raw footage and turn it into something people actually want to watch. If you take pride in your craft, sweat the details, and enjoy making clean, engaging videos — we want to hear from you.



This is a full-time remote role working U.S. business hours.



What You'll Be Doing



- Editing candidate videos, interviews, and talking head content

- Creating engaging explainer videos that simplify complex topics

- Adding motion graphics, animations, and visual elements to enhance storytelling

- Cutting content for social media (short-form and long-form)

- Collaborating with the team to bring creative concepts to life

- Maintaining consistency in style, pacing, and brand across videos



What We're Looking For:



- A strong portfolio showcasing video editing work (talking heads, explainers, or similar content preferred)

- Proficiency in tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut, or similar

- Basic to intermediate motion graphics / animation skills

- A good eye for design, composition, and visual flow

- Strong attention to detail (clean cuts, audio, timing, etc.)

- Ability to take feedback and iterate quickly

- A self-starter who can manage their own time and hit deadlines

- Ability to work U.S. business hours













Details:

-Work from home

-$5/hour

-Mon-Fri 40 hours

-9am-5pm Mountain time (11pm-7am Philippines time)









HOW TO APPLY:

1. Please send an
 with your resume attached, YOUR PORTFOLIO, and a brief overview of your relevant experience in the body of the
 to 
 with the subject line “N Video Editor VA”.



2. If you have video editing experience with international clients (outside of Philippines), please write “intl video editing exp” at top of
 (if you don’t, don’t write it).





3. At the bottom of the
, write the USD hourly rate (or salary, but specify hourly, monthly, etc and currency) of your last two roles listed on resume. For example:

-Most recent role: $7/hour (USD-full time)

-2nd most recent role: $4/hour (USD-part time)



**Please note, you earning less or more at previous roles DOES NOT negatively or positively affect your chances of getting this role whatsoever. This is simply information needed for us internally as we try to understand your career path. PLEASE BE HONEST, as this may be officially verified later on in the hiring process.





*Please be very specific in the
, explaining your relevant experience. If you don't follow the above 3-step instructions in how to apply, your application will not be reviewed.







DO NOT APPLY IF:

-If you’re not comfortable with a screen tracker that takes screenshots of your work shift (Time Doctor or similar)

-If you have a conflicting job that interferes with this schedule

-if you DON'T have a portfolio

title: Full-time Google Ads role GA4/GTM Tracking Experience
description:
Full-Time | $7.50/hour | Weekdays | UK Timezone (9am–5pm)



I’m hiring a Google Ads Campaign Builder who has experience building Search, PMax and Shopping campaigns. 



Most of our work comes from Fiverr setup projects, so campaign setup is the core deliverable. Ongoing management/optimisation exists, but it’s secondary.



Work hours: Mon–Fri, 9:00–5:00 UK time



**The mission**



Ship high-quality Google Ads campaign builds and tracking setups, with zero sloppy tracking and clean, well-thought-out campaign strucutre.



**Your core responsibilities (80% setup)**

1) Google Ads campaign builds (primary)



Build campaigns (Search, PMax, Shopping)



Keyword research and campaign architecture (tight themes, clear intent mapping)



Ad groups, ads, assets/extensions, audiences, locations, schedules



Correct bidding + budget setup based on goal (leads/eCom) and conversion signal readiness



Pre-launch QA checklist (settings, brand exclusions where needed, geo intent, networks, conversions, URLs, tracking templates)



2) Tracking implementation & validation (primary)



Set up and troubleshoot GTM + GA4



Configure conversion tracking (forms, calls, purchases, lead events)



Validate conversions end-to-end (test submissions, deduping, attribution sanity checks)



Fix common issues: missing params, duplicates, incorrect event firing, consent mode issues where relevant



**Secondary responsibilities (20% management)**



Light optimisation after launch (search terms + negatives, basic asset improvements, quick wins)



Performance notes for handoff / next steps



Support troubleshooting on active accounts as needed



**Requirements**



You’ve built many Google Ads campaigns from scratch (not just “managed” pre-existing campaigns)



Strong GA4 + GTM setup/debugging



You can produce clean, documented builds that another person could easily understand



You work fast without sacrificing QA



You communicate blockers early



Nice to have: Shopify/Woo tracking, Wordpress, CallRail, Looker Studio, Google Merchant Centre experience



**How to apply (mandatory)**



Add "Value Ad" to your message subject 



30-sec intro video

title: Full PPC Manager
description:
PPC Manager

Full-Time | Remote/Hybrid | Ireland





Important: Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

Record a short Loom video (5 minutes max) introducing yourself and walking us through a paid ads campaign you're proud of. Include what the goal was, what you tested, and what results you drove. Paste the link in your application. No video, no review.





The Role

We're looking for a PPC manager who genuinely loves running paid ads. Not someone who set up a few Google campaigns and learned the lingo. Someone who obsesses over performance data, builds efficient account structures from scratch, and knows the difference between a campaign that looks healthy and one that actually is.

You'll own paid media strategy and execution across a portfolio of client accounts spanning Google Ads, Meta, and potentially Microsoft Ads. You'll work closely with SEO and web teams and report directly to senior leadership.

This is a full ownership role. You'll build campaigns, write ad copy, run tests, manage budgets, analyse results, and communicate clearly with clients. There's no one to hide behind here.



What You'll Be Doing

You'll manage and optimise Google Search, Shopping, Display, and Performance Max campaigns across multiple client accounts. You'll build and run Meta Ads campaigns, including lead gen, retargeting, and awareness funnels. You'll conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and audience research to inform campaign strategy.

Writing ad copy is part of the job, and you'll need to be good at it. You'll create and test headlines, descriptions, and landing page recommendations that actually move the needle. You'll set up proper conversion tracking, verify that data is accurate, and refuse to make decisions from broken attribution.

Each month you'll produce clear, honest client reports that focus on business outcomes, not vanity metrics. When performance dips, you'll diagnose it before the client notices. When you spot an opportunity to scale, you'll make the case with data.

You'll stay current on platform changes, algorithm updates, and emerging tactics. Google and Meta move constantly. You'll need to move with them.



What We're Looking For

You have at least 2 to 3 years of hands-on experience managing paid ads accounts, ideally in an agency environment. You've managed monthly budgets of €5k or more, and you know how to allocate spend intelligently across a portfolio.

You're comfortable across Google Ads at a deep level. Smart bidding strategies, match type logic, auction insights, quality score, ad rank, and impression share. You understand why these things matter, and you act on them.

You know Meta Ads well enough to build a full-funnel campaign from cold to conversion. You understand pixel events, custom audiences, lookalikes, and the quirks of the current delivery algorithm.

You use data to make decisions. You know how to read a report, spot an anomaly, and trace it back to its cause. You don't assume.

You communicate well. With clients, with colleagues, in writing, and in conversation. You're not the kind of person who goes quiet when results aren't great. You surface problems early and come with a plan.

Google Ads certification is a plus, but it won't get you the job on its own. What gets you the job is demonstrating that you actually know what you're doing.



Nice to Have

Experience with Microsoft/Bing Ads, GA4 and GTM setup, landing page testing, or e-commerce campaigns (Google Shopping and Meta catalogue ads) would all be an advantage. Familiarity with tools like SEMrush, Looker Studio, or HubSpot is useful.



What You'll Get

A competitive salary based on experience. A real say in how campaigns are run, not just execution of someone else's strategy. Flexible working arrangements with a hybrid or remote-first setup for the right candidate.

A growing agency environment where your work gets noticed and your thinking is respected.



How to Apply

Submit your CV along with your Loom video link. No Loom video means your application won't be reviewed. That's not a filter for the sake of it. It tells us a lot about how you think and communicate before we've spoken a word.

title: Website Graphic Designer & Content Creator
description:

About Us



Haus Of Tre Li is a contemporary and luxury furniture brand with a strong influence from the worlds of fashion and design. We create curated collections that bring together exceptional craftsmanship, modern aesthetics, and timeless elegance. As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a talented Graphic Designer to elevate our visual identity across all platforms.



?

We’re seeking an experienced and creative Graphic Designer with an eye for sophisticated, high-end design. The ideal candidate will understand the nuances of luxury furniture branding and fashion-inspired design, bringing fresh and cohesive visuals to our website, e-commerce platforms, newsletters, social media, and marketing campaigns.



?

?

?

?

title: AI Animation Specialist — Image-to-Video & Lipsync
description:
AI Animation Specialist — Image-to-Video & Lipsync

Performance Marketing | Global E-Commerce Brand | Full-Time





The Role



We're hiring a full-time AI Animation Specialist to own one focused workflow: taking AI-generated images and bringing them to life as video ads — complete with lipsync and natural movement — ready for live paid campaigns.



This role is 100% Kling. No traditional video editing, no filming, no graphic design. Just deep, daily mastery of the AI pipeline that turns static images into high-converting video creatives.





What You'll Do



You'll receive AI-generated character images from the team and use Kling to animate them into short video ad segments with accurate lipsync, natural movement, and realistic camera style. You'll work with provided scripts and voice audio, break content into 3–8 second clips, and generate each segment with clean, precise prompts that produce consistent, natural-looking results.



Before anything leaves your hands, you review it. Natural gestures, clean lipsync, no glitches, no unwanted zoom, smooth flow between clips. If something isn't right, you fix it. You don't ship work you're not confident in.



Your entire focus is Kling. Every part of the workflow — character building, animation, lipsync, voiceover sync — happens inside that one tool. We want someone who is committed to mastering it completely and making the pipeline faster and better every single day.





The Environment



You'll work inside a dedicated AI content team alongside 8+ creatives and a broader marketing department of 17+. The team ships and tests daily. Feedback loops are short. Iteration is constant.



Honest expectations: this role requires around 50 hours per week with regular availability 7 days a week. Only apply if you're genuinely ready for that output level.





Who We're Looking For



Experience with Kling or AI tools is a plus but not required. What matters far more is who you are and how you work.



We're looking for someone extremely proactive — someone who figures things out without being told, takes full ownership of their output, and shows up consistently at a high level. You're detail-obsessed, hard working, and fast to learn. You treat this as your main focus, not a side job.



We're not looking for someone with all the answers. We're looking for someone hungry, coachable, and ready to put in the work.





What You'll Gain



The reality is that AI is replacing traditional video editing and graphic design faster than most people expect. This role is a direct entry point into the skillset that is taking over.



If you're a video editor or designer who sees the shift happening and wants to get ahead of it rather than be replaced by it, this is how you do it. You will spend every working day inside the tools and workflows that are becoming the new standard for creative production.



By the time most people in your field figure out they need to learn this, you'll already have hundreds of hours of real production experience behind you — working on live campaigns for a global brand, not just experimenting on your own.



This is not a course. This is not practice. This is the real thing, and it will put you years ahead.





How to Apply



Apply directly through OnlineJobs and send us a message introducing yourself.



If you have a portfolio or any examples of AI animation, lipsync, or image-to-video work — polished or experimental — please include a link or attach them to your message. It's not required, but it will significantly strengthen your application.

title: YouTube Strategist
description:
YouTube Strategist



Company: Raffiti Media

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time, standard 40 hour week (MUST BE ABLE TO WORK Mon-Fri 8am-5pm CST)



About Us



Raffiti Media is a fast-growing done-for-you agency focused on helping brands and creators win on YouTube through smart strategy, strong packaging, and content that actually performs. We work with a variety of clients to develop YouTube channels that grow audience, build authority, and drive business results.



We are looking for a YouTube Strategist who understands what makes content work on YouTube and knows how to turn ideas into a clear, actionable content plan.



Position Overview:



The YouTube Strategist is responsible for developing content strategies with detailed frameworks that help clients grow their YouTube channels. This person will research trends, analyze channels, create video topic ideas, develop title and thumbnail direction, and help guide each client’s content toward stronger performance.



This role requires someone who understands YouTube deeply, thinks both creatively and strategically, and can balance analytics, audience psychology, and practical execution.



Key Responsibilities:

- Develop custom YouTube content strategies for clients based on their goals, audience, niche, and positioning

- Research client industries, competitors, and trending topics to identify content opportunities

- Generate video ideas that align with audience interest and business objectives

- Create title and thumbnail direction designed to improve click-through rate and performance

- Build and maintain content calendars and strategic plans for assigned clients

- Review channel performance and use data to refine recommendations over time

- Conduct channel audits and identify opportunities for improvement in content, packaging, positioning, and consistency

- Collaborate with project managers, editors, designers, and clients to ensure strategy is executed properly

- Stay ahead of YouTube trends, platform changes, and shifts in viewer behavior

- Communicate clearly with tea
mbers and clients regarding strategy, priorities, and next steps



Qualifications:

- Strong understanding of YouTube content strategy, audience growth, and platform best practices

- Experience developing content ideas, titles, and thumbnail concepts for YouTube

- Ability to analyze channel performance and translate data into strategic decisions

- Strong research skills and ability to identify trends, angles, and content gaps

- Excellent English written and verbal communication skills

- Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple clients or projects at once

- Ability to think proactively and anticipate challenges before they become problems

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote team environment



Preferred Qualifications:

- Previous experience working for a YouTube agency, media company, or creator brand

- Familiarity with YouTube analytics and performance metrics

- Experience with content ideation across multiple niches

- Understanding of audience psychology, packaging, retention, and YouTube viewer behavior

- Experience using tools such as Google Drive, Asana, Slack, 
, or similar project management systems



What Success in This Role Looks Like:

- Clients consistently receive thoughtful, high-quality content ideas and strategy direction - to include frameworks and scripting

- Titles and thumbnail concepts are clear, compelling, and aligned with channel goals

- Strategy is delivered on time and supports the production pipeline effectively

- Clients and internal tea
mbers feel confident in the direction of the channel

- Opportunities and issues are identified early rather than reactively



How to Apply



Please submit the following:

- Your resume

- A brief cover letter explaining your experience with YouTube strategy

- Examples of channels you’ve worked on or content strategies you’ve helped develop

- Any relevant examples of video ideas, titles, thumbnail concepts, or channel audits you’ve created



If you want, I can also turn this into one of these:

a more polished corporate version, a cooler creator-style version, or a version specifically for your agency.

title: AI Virtual Assistant
description:
AI Virtual Assistant — Image-to-Video & Lipsync

Performance Marketing | Global E-Commerce Brand | Full-Time





The Role



We're hiring a full-time Virtual Assistant to own one focused workflow: taking AI-generated images and bringing them to life as video ads — complete with lipsync and natural movement — ready for live paid campaigns.



This role is 100% Kling. No traditional video editing, no filming, no graphic design. Just deep, daily mastery of the AI pipeline that turns static images into high-converting video creatives.





What You'll Do



You'll receive AI-generated character images from the team and use Kling to animate them into short video ad segments with accurate lipsync, natural movement, and realistic camera style. You'll work with provided scripts and voice audio, break content into 3–8 second clips, and generate each segment with clean, precise prompts that produce consistent, natural-looking results.



Before anything leaves your hands, you review it. Natural gestures, clean lipsync, no glitches, no unwanted zoom, smooth flow between clips. If something isn't right, you fix it. You don't ship work you're not confident in.



Your entire focus is Kling. Every part of the workflow — character building, animation, lipsync, voiceover sync — happens inside that one tool. We want someone who is committed to mastering it completely and making the pipeline faster and better every single day.





The Environment



You'll work inside a dedicated AI content team alongside 8+ creatives and a broader marketing department of 17+. The team ships and tests daily. Feedback loops are short. Iteration is constant.



Honest expectations: this role requires around 50 hours per week with regular availability 7 days a week. Only apply if you're genuinely ready for that output level.





Who We're Looking For



Experience with Kling or AI tools is a plus but not required. This is a general VA role and we will train the right person from the ground up. What matters far more is who you are and how you work.



We're looking for someone extremely proactive — someone who figures things out without being told, takes full ownership of their output, and shows up consistently at a high level. You're detail-obsessed, hard working, and fast to learn. You treat this as your main focus, not a side job.



We're not looking for someone with all the answers. We're looking for someone hungry, coachable, and ready to put in the work.





What You'll Gain



The reality is that AI is replacing traditional video editing and graphic design faster than most people expect. This role is a direct entry point into the skillset that is taking over.



If you're a video editor, designer, or general VA who sees the shift happening and wants to get ahead of it rather than be left behind by it, this is how you do it. You will spend every working day inside the tools and workflows that are becoming the new standard for creative production.



By the time most people in your field figure out they need to learn this, you'll already have hundreds of hours of real production experience behind you — working on live campaigns for a global brand, not just experimenting on your own.



This is not a course. This is not practice. This is the real thing, and it will put you years ahead.





How to Apply



Apply directly through OnlineJobs and send us a message introducing yourself.



If you have a portfolio or any examples of AI animation, lipsync, or image-to-video work — polished or experimental — please include a link or attach them to your message. It's not required, but it will significantly strengthen your application.

title: END-TO-END ACCOUNTANT/BOOKKEEPER
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training, generous Christmas bonus

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive

- Competitive Advantages (Preferred)

- Industry background in HVAC, solar, generators, roofing, foundations, or electrical

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

- Experience using any of the following: Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Sera, Jobber, Service Trade, Acculynx, etc

- Experience using Keeper.app



Who Should Apply

- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply

- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?



Apply Here: 
reers/bookkeeping-role

Pivotl - Where exceptional professionals build exceptional careers.

title: Creative Designer – Meta Advertisements
description:
About us:

Acoustia is a Dutch DTC brand selling affordable and discreet hearing aids to people aged 55 and above. We are growing rapidly through Meta advertising and are looking for a creative designer to help us produce high-quality ad creatives.



What will you be doing? You will be creating ad creatives for our Meta campaigns on a daily basis. We work with two types of creatives:



Native ads — advertisements that look like organic content. No promotional-feeling design, but authentic and relatable for our target audience.

Product image ads — advertisements where the product takes center stage, with a clear visual message aimed at driving conversions.



You will be producing around 10–15 creatives per day to start, increasing over time as we scale.



How we work:

We move fast. We will provide you with the strategy behind each creative, and ad copy when needed. We will also share references from competitors so you always have clear direction. In return, we expect you to meet deadlines without being reminded — we advertise at high speed and timing matters.

We provide you with ready-made briefs containing the exact angle, target persona, problem and message for each creative. You focus on the execution.



What do we expect from you?

Proven experience creating Meta ad creatives

A strong feel for what works with an older target audience (55–75 years old)

Sharp eye for detail and consistency in brand identity

Experience with tools such as Canva, Photoshop or similar

Good communication skills in English

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines without being reminded

Available for at least 2 hours per day



What do we offer?

Flexible freelance position working from home

Clear briefs provided — you only need to execute

Starting assignment of 10–15 creatives per day with direct growth opportunities

Expansion of hours and assignments based on strong performance

Long-term collaboration with the potential to grow into a full-time role upon proven success



How to apply? Send us your portfolio with at least 3 examples of Meta ad creatives you have previously made. Tell us briefly why you are the right person for this role.

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

Who Should Apply

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

Who Should NOT Apply

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?

title: Virtual Assistant & Video Editor (Construction & Real Estate Content)
description:
We are a growing construction and real estate company based in Texas looking for a reliable and creative Virtual Assistant who can also edit engaging short-form videos.



This role combines video editing, social media management, and basic admin support. You will be helping us stay organized while also creating content that attracts new clients.

title: Virtual Assistant, Media Management
description:
We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant to support our media team across podcasts and YouTube content. This role works closely with the Media Manager and our Quality Analyst to keep content production, uploads, scheduling, and publishing organized and running smoothly across multiple clients and platforms.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing timelines while following established workflows. You’ll be handling recurring publishing tasks, so consistency and accuracy are key.

This is a behind-the-scenes role where you’ll help ensure each episode or video is properly uploaded, scheduled, and published on time. If you enjoy structured work, staying on top of details, and keeping things moving without constant oversight, this will be a great fit.

This is a part-time role starting at ten hours per week (M-TR), with potential for growth as the workload increases.



Key Responsibilities

Ensure all final assets are completed and ready at least one week before the scheduled release date

Work with Media Manager and confirm all required assets are approved and ready for scheduling at least two days before release

Schedule audio episodes and long-form videos across podcast platforms and YouTube, following established publishing standards and guidelines

Perform quality checks before publishing (titles, descriptions, links, thumbnails, audio/video files)

Maintain organized tracking of content status, deadlines, and approvals

Flag delays, missing assets, or issues early to the Media Manager



Preferred Skills & Experience

Experience managing YouTube uploads and scheduling.

Familiarity with podcast hosting platforms (e.g., Libsyn, Spotify for Creators, Podbean)

Understanding of podcast and YouTube publishing workflows and best practices

High attention to detail and content accuracy across platforms

Ability to manage multiple scheduling tasks and communicate proactively with the Media Manager



Attention to detail is essential for this role. Only applicants who follow the link below and complete the entire form, including all prompts, will be considered.



Please find the form here:

title: Senior Developer and workflow builder (GHL / Claude Code / n8n Expert)
description:
Med Matrix is a fast-growing functional medicine and longevity company focused on helping patients optimize their health through advanced diagnostics, hormones, peptides, and regenerative medicine. We are building a highly automated, scalable infrastructure across marketing, sales, and operations, and we are looking for a systems expert to help lead that evolution.



This role is for someone with 6+ years of experience who has already built multiple complex workflows and understands how to think in systems, not just tasks. You will be responsible for designing and implementing advanced automations using GoHighLevel, n8n, and AI tools like Claude Code to improve patient acquisition, conversion, retention, and internal operations.



This is a high-impact role with significant growth potential. You will work directly with leadership, help shape the backbone of the company’s systems, and continuously expand your skillset in automation, AI-driven development, and scalable infrastructure. As Med Matrix grows, there is strong opportunity to evolve into a leadership or head of systems position while working on increasingly complex and innovative projects.



We are looking for someone who is driven, resourceful, and excited to build. If you have a track record of creating advanced workflows and want to be part of scaling a company with a massive vision, this is the role for you.





HOW TO APPLY: 

please submit a loom video answering these questions: 



1. How long have you been a developer?

2. what projects have you worked on in the past?

3. What is a workflow that you have built which you are proud of? Please explain any learning curves or challenges you faced.

4. When you don't know how to do something what is your process for figuring it out?

5. Do you have experience with N8N, Claude code, and GHL?

title: Part-Time Full-Stack Developer (Supabase + Lovable.dev + TypeScript)
description:

SiteIntel™ Feasibility is an AI + GIS SaaS platform transforming how commercial real-estate developers evaluate property sites.



Role Overview

v stack.

 You’ll help automate GIS data pipelines, improve report-generation reliability, and push new UI components to production.

Enhance 
v workflows and data-validation logic.

Collaborate asynchronously with the Founder and GIS Analyst to improve data flows and automation.



Monitor and document code changes via GitHub, Notion, and Loom updates.



Contribute ideas for better architecture, performance, and security as the product evolves.

3 + years of experience with TypeScript / JavaScript (full-stack).

Familiarity with React / Next.js or modern component-based frameworks.



Understanding of RESTful APIs, JSON Schema validation, and OData.



Ability to work autonomously and communicate clearly in async settings (Notion, Slack, Loom).

Experience with AI prompt workflows / LLM integrations.



Exposure to Vercel, GitHub Actions, or similar CI/CD tools.



Previous work on low-code / 
v automation projects.

Shape a real product — your code ships to production every week.



Work with modern tools: Supabase, 
v, TypeScript, Vercel.



Be part of an early-stage startup redefining commercial real-estate feasibility.

title: GIS / Data Analyst (API Integration & QA)
description:
About SiteIntel™ Feasibility

SiteIntel™ Feasibility is an AI + GIS SaaS platform transforming how commercial real-estate developers evaluate property sites.

Our mission is simple: make professional-grade feasibility accessible, auditable, and instant.

 We’re an early-stage, pre-revenue startup built on Supabase, 
v, and TypeScript, serving the next generation of builders and investors.



Role Overview

We’re seeking a GIS / Data Analyst (API Integration & QA) to help build and maintain SiteIntel’s data backbone.

 You’ll work directly with our founder and developer to integrate geospatial APIs, normalize public datasets, and ensure report data is accurate, current, and consistent.

 If you enjoy working with real-world mapping data, APIs, and automation in a fast-moving startup, this role offers real ownership and visible impact.



Key Responsibilities

Retrieve and normalize geospatial datasets via APIs (ArcGIS, FEMA NFHL, TxDOT, USFWS, Census).



Join and clean parcel, zoning, flood, and infrastructure layers for site analyses.



Perform data QA on AI-generated JSON reports — flagging missing or inconsistent records.



Maintain dataset refresh logs (metadata, timestamps, and API endpoints).



Convert and format spatial data (GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV) for ingestion into Supabase.



Test API endpoints and record response quality or rate-limit issues.



Collaborate with the developer to refine Supabase schema and storage.



Generate quick QA overlays or maps in QGIS / ArcGIS Pro to validate results.



Document workflows in Notion and maintain reproducible processes for scaling.







Required Skills & Experience

2 + years’ experience with ArcGIS / QGIS or other GIS platforms.



Familiarity with ArcGIS REST APIs or similar spatial-data endpoints.



Proficiency in data cleaning and joins (Excel, CSV, GeoJSON).



Basic SQL or Postgres queries for attribute filtering and spatial validation.



Understanding of spatial relationships (buffer, intersect, overlay).



Strong analytical mindset and eye for detail — you notice when data doesn’t line up.



Excellent communication skills (English 4 + stars) and documentation discipline.







Nice-to-Have Skills

Experience with Supabase, Python / Node.js data scripts, or REST automation.



Familiarity with open datasets such as FEMA NFHL, TxDOT Traffic, USFWS Wetlands, or Census TIGER.



Exposure to AI / LLM data QA pipelines.



Comfortable using Notion, ClickUp, or GitHub for workflow management.









Why Join SiteIntel™

Work with real GIS and open data powering a live SaaS product.



See your datasets feed directly into AI-generated commercial-feasibility reports.



Learn how AI, GIS, and automation intersect in a modern data workflow.



Contribute to a product that makes professional feasibility accessible worldwide.



Enjoy flexible remote hours, direct collaboration with the founder, and startup growth potential.







How to Apply

Please visit this link: 

Fill out the form and we will get back to you shortly after reviewing your application. 



Applications without sample work or API experience will not be considered.



Thank you.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Sales Manager (Remote – Philippines)



Company: Buzz Digital Agency



Remote Work Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Please review carefully before applying.

This is a full-time, remote position requiring:

- Work Hours: Availability from 9 AM – 6 PM US CST, Monday through Friday.

- Reliable Technology: Stable high-speed internet connection and a functional computer/laptop.

- Hubstaff Usage: You will be required to use Hubstaff for time tracking, productivity monitoring, and reporting.

- Video Meetings: Cameras must be on during all team and client video meetings.

- Full-Time Focus: This is a full-time role; no side jobs or multiple employments are allowed.



About Us

Buzz Digital Agency is a dynamic, results-driven digital marketing company focused on delivering innovative and impactful solutions. We specialize in helping businesses grow through SEO, PPC, social media, and digital strategy.

We’re seeking an experienced and motivated Sales Manager to lead our growing sales team and drive business growth. If you have a passion for sales, leadership, and digital marketing—and thrive in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment—this opportunity is for you.



Role Overview

As our Sales Manager, you’ll lead and inspire a small but ambitious sales team, strategize to expand our client base, and ensure we exceed revenue goals. You’ll work directly with the Managing Partner and collaborate with marketing and operations to ensure seamless execution and client satisfaction.



Key Responsibilities

- Lead & Motivate: Mentor the sales team to achieve individual and team goals, providing training and performance feedback.

- Sales Strategy & Execution: Develop and execute sales strategies to acquire new business, expand existing accounts, and drive revenue growth.

- Client Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers, deliver tailored digital solutions, and ensure client satisfaction.

- CRM & Pipeline Management: Oversee the sales pipeline, ensuring leads are tracked and followed through in the CRM (GoHighLevel.).

- Collaboration: Work closely with marketing to align lead generation campaigns with sales efforts and optimize conversion.

- Performance Metrics & Reporting: Track key sales metrics, generate performance reports, and recommend improvements to leadership.

- Process Optimization: Continuously refine sales processes and workflows for better efficiency and conversion.



Required Qualifications & Skills

- 3–5 years of proven B2B sales experience (preferably in digital marketing, SaaS, or advertising services).

- Demonstrated leadership or team management experience.

- Excellent English communication and presentation skills.

- Strong understanding of digital marketing services (SEO, PPC, social media, etc.).

- Proficient with CRM systems and Hubstaff (or similar time-tracking tools).

- High level of accountability, organization, and self-motivation in a remote setup.



Why Join Buzz Digital Agency?

- Work directly with senior leadership and make a measurable impact on company growth.

- Be part of a creative, results-oriented, and collaborative remote team.

- Uncapped earning potential through commissions and bonuses.

- Long-term career growth opportunities in a rapidly expanding digital agency.





To apply, please fill out this application form:

title: Special Project Coordinator
description:
Hours: 40 hours per week, Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST (Central Time, US) — non-negotiable

Time tracking requirement: Use of Hubstaff is mandatory for time and activity tracking.



About Us

We are Payment Studio — a payment-services organisation with a main company and a growing portfolio of sub-brands/ventures. We regularly create new brands and will rely on you to help launch, onboard and promote them. We also engage in trade shows and industry events related to payments and other special projects as needed. You will play a central role in these brand launches and event efforts.



Role Summary

As our Special Project Coordinator, you will:



- Lead the onboarding and launch of new sub-companies/brands: setting up processes, coordinating stakeholders, executing timelines and ensuring a smooth start-up for each new entity.

- Research, organise and coordinate visits to trade shows, conferences and other events relevant to payments / fintech / commerce—handling logistics, scheduling, vendor/vendor-exhibitor relations, and follow-up.

- Maintain project documentation, status updates, trackers, tasks, reminders and dependencies across all special projects.

- Work closely with cross-functional teams (marketing, operations, finance, partnerships) to ensure all necessary steps are completed for each brand launch and event.

- Proactively identify project risks, issues or delays and escalate / remediate them.

- Handle “other special projects as they come” — since our business moves quickly and new initiatives will arise, you’ll need flexibility, adaptability and ownership.



Key Requirements



- Able to work full-time during US CST business hours (9 AM–6 PM CST) Monday–Friday.

- Strong project coordination/management experience, preferably with brand launches, onboarding of companies or event/trade-show coordination.

- Excellent English communication (written and verbal) — you will be interacting with global stakeholders.

- Excellent organisational skills, ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously, set priorities, follow timelines and deliver on schedule.

- Familiarity with project-tracking tools, spreadsheets, task trackers, status reports. Experience with
-tracking tools is a plus.

- Must be able to use Hubstaff for
 tracking.

- Comfortable working remotely and self-driving your work, with clear communication of status and blockers.

- Proactive, detail-oriented, adaptable, and ready for the fast-paced nature of launching new brands and supporting event logistics.



How to Apply

Please apply via the link below:

Additional best-practice responsibilities:

* Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to align automations with campaign objectives

 for workflow automation

* Solid understanding of domain DNS, SSL, and SMS/A2P registration processes

* Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving, clear written and verbal English communication, and strong documentation practices

* Tools: Comfortable using Hubstaff (or equivalent), Slack/Teams, and project-management platforms

title: Social Media Campaign Manager
description:
Job Title: Social Media Campaign Manager

Location: Remote



About Us

Buzz Digital is a dynamic and results-driven digital marketing agency specializing in social media strategy, content marketing, and paid advertising. Our mission is to help brands enhance their online presence, generate leads, and drive revenue growth through innovative and data-driven campaigns.



Role Overview

We are seeking a Social Media Campaign Manager to join our team. This role is essential in developing and executing social media strategies that boost brand awareness, engagement, and conversions. The ideal candidate will have expertise in social media advertising, content marketing, and performance tracking to optimize results.



Key Responsibilities

-Plan, develop, and execute data-driven social media campaigns tailored to client goals.

-Manage paid and organic social media efforts on platforms such as
, Instagram, LinkedIn,
, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Create and oversee content strategies, ensuring high engagement and brand consistency.

-Optimize ad campaigns using A/B testing, audience targeting, and performance tracking.

-Collaborate with content creators, designers, and marketing strategists to develop compelling content.

-Analyze and report on key performance metrics, adjusting strategies to maximize ROI.

-Stay updated on social media trends, platform updates, and emerging technologies.

-Engage with audiences through community management, responding to comments and messages.

-Identify influencer and partnership opportunities to expand brand reach.



Qualifications & Skills

-3+ years of experience in social media marketing, campaign management, or a related role.

-Excellent copywriting and storytelling skills for social media content.

-Experience in influencer collaborations and partnership marketing is a plus.

-Strong analytical skills to interpret data and drive decision-making.

-Ability to manage multiple campaigns and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



How to Apply

title: Client Success Manager - Real Estate Media
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

We are seeking a personable, high-energy, detail-oriented Client Success Manager to join our team. This dynamic hybrid role will require a blend of client communication & operational oversight to ensure the smooth functioning of their fast-growing real estate media business. The ideal candidate will excel in written & verbal communication, internal project management, and client relations, with a keen eye for detail and a passion for helping a business run smoothly. 



ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES

- Manage all client communications via
, text, and phone while ensuring responsiveness.

- Make daily customer care calls in order to check in with and ensure clients’ satisfaction.

- Schedule photo/video shoots and manage calendars across multiple markets.

- Assist clients with service questions and light technical support, as necessary. 

- Implement quality control measures to ensure product and service excellence.

- Collaborate across teams to align on client projects and operational goals.

- Provide insights and consultations on service upgrades and packages to enhance client value.

- Maintain the organization’s CRM to ensure the accuracy of client data, while offering suggestions for improvement. 

- Contribute to a positive team culture through engagement, professional development, and retention initiatives.



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS

- You have 1-2 years of experience in an operations and/or administrative role within fast-paced service industries.

- You are proficient in utilizing and maintaining CRM tools & project management software.

- You are professional and showcase etiquette, a positive attitude, and excellent customer service skills.

- You are great with clients and understand the importance of relationship building.

- You are analytical and possess strong creative, problem-solving, critical-thinking, and decision-making skills.

- You can function under pressure in a fast-paced environment.

- You are detail obsessive and understand the importance of attention to detail.

- You take feedback well and constantly look for ways to improve your craft and the craft of the team at large.



BONUS POINTS

- Real estate industry, marketing/sales, and/or client management experience.

- Familiarity with media/real estate media equipment and photo shoots.

title: Client Care Specialist
description:
TYPICAL HOURS

- Start time between 8:30 and 9:00 AM

- End time 5:00 PM



MISSION

The Client Care Specialist is an operational admin role and is the relationship hub— this role ensures agents feel taken care of, the calendar is protected, and opportunities for growth are identified daily. You manage client communication, control scheduling, support light sales, and strengthen long-term relationships. When active clients are fully supported, you shift into outreach and revenue-building mode.



DAILY SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Agents feel supported and confident

- Calendar is clean, optimized, and protected

- Sales opportunities are identified and surfaced

- Relationships are actively maintained

- No client is left wondering what is going on



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Client Communication and Care

- Monitor and respond to
, text, Slack, and CR
ssages

- Maintain a friendly, fast, concierge-level tone

- Confidently answer questions about pricing, packages, and services

- Recommend upgrades and add-ons when appropriate

- Resolve small issues independently

- Prioritize long-term and OG clients

- Log notes and important details in the CRM

- Agents should feel like they have a personal point of contact, not a ticket system.



2. Scheduling and Calendar Control

- Fully manage the calendar inside Tonomo

- Confirm appointments and resolve scheduling questions

- Optimize routes and timing for efficiency

- Push back on unreasonable requests using solution-first language

- Avoid saying no when possible by presenting options

- Decline same-day requests if they hurt operations

- Escalate truly critical situations to Tyler

- Protect weekday scheduling and limit weekends unless approved

- The calendar exists to support quality, not chaos.



3. Light Sales Support and Opportunity Spotting

- This role supports growth without pressure selling.

- Upsell add-ons when agents ask questions

- Suggest listing campaigns, Zillow Showcase, video, or premium services when relevant

- Identify high-intent or hot agents

- Flag those agents for Manager to personally follow up

- Support value-based conversations, not discounts



4. Client Outreach and Relationship Building

- Once active tasks are complete, shift into outreach mode.

- Reach out to agents who have not ordered recently

- Send friendly check-in texts,
s, or calls

- Reconnect with past clients to stay top of mind

- Perform care calls after projects are delivered

- Ensure clients are happy and heard

- Ask for reviews when expectations are met

- Log outreach and results in the CRM



5. Care Call Guidelines

- Phone calls are preferred when possible

- Text is acceptable and encouraged when appropriate

- If an agent has multiple jobs in a short time, one phone call per week is sufficient

- Follow-up texts can be used to check in and confirm satisfaction

- Dealer’s choice, based on context and relationship

- Goal is connection, not interruption



6. Review Requests

- Review asks typically happen during care calls

- Text follow-ups are also acceptable

- If satisfaction is confirmed, politely ask for a Google review

- Track reviews received

- Thank agents for their time and support

- Reviews are a growth lever. Treat them with intention.



7. Project Awareness and Support

- While evening ops owns most delivery and QC:

- Monitor Tonomo for overnight deliveries

- Handle morning video deliveries if they come in

- Assist with follow-ups tied to completed jobs

- Coordinate with evening ops when questions arise



TOOLS USED DAILY

- Tonomo for scheduling, orders, delivery, and invoicing

- Slack for internal communication

-
 and text for client communication

- GoHighLevel CRM for notes, outreach, and tracking

- Social media is not part of this role

title: Creative Quality Manager
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

We are looking for a highly perceptive, creatively sharp Creative Quality Manager to help strengthen the quality, consistency, and scalability of our photo and video delivery pipeline. This person will serve as a high-level internal creative checkpoint — reviewing deliverables, identifying recurring quality issues, spotting patterns across shooters and editors, and helping our team improve creative consistency without adding more burden to already-stretched internal leaders. This is not a basic admin or upload role. We are looking for someone with a strong creative eye first, especially in video, who can also think operationally, document issues clearly, and help improve backend workflows over time.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

- Review video deliverables before final delivery to ensure quality and consistency

- Catch technical and creative misses before they reach the client

- Identify patterns across shooters and editors, including recurring strengths, misses, and coaching opportunities

- Flag issues related to coverage, pacing, framing, shot variety, detail shots, creative direction, music choice, captions, and overall polish

- Organize observations and feedback clearly for internal leadership

- Help create stronger quality control standards and backend review processes

- Support delivery readiness by ensuring projects are complete, clean, and aligned with internal expectations

- Help reduce the amount of proofing, review, and repetitive delivery work sitting on senior internal tea
mbers

- Contribute to SOPs, workflow improvements, and quality documentation as the team grows

- Writing feedback briefs to photographers and videographers regarding review and delivery

- Ensuring brand standards for photos and videos (correct logos, fonts, colors, etc.)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Fewer quality issues slipping through to clients

- Better visibility into shooter/editor performance trends

- Stronger internal feedback loops for creative coaching

- More consistency across delivered video content

- Less manual review burden on the internal team

- Cleaner backend systems and a more scalable delivery process



IDEAL BACKGROUND

- Strong video editing or post-production background

- Excellent creative judgment and attention to detail

- Ability to spot both technical and aesthetic issues quickly

- Experience reviewing work for quality, not just producing it

- Organized, process-aware, and able to document findings clearly

- Real estate media experience

- Comfortable working behind the scenes in a support and oversight capacity

- Strong AI skillsets such as Higgsfield, Nano Banana Pro, Eleven Labs, Claude, and others



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience working in a fast-paced, high-volume creative environment

- Familiarity with distributed editing teams or offshore creative support

- Operational or workflow improvement experience

- Experience helping train, guide, or support photographers/editors



THIS ROLE IS NOT

- A client-facing phone support role

- A purely admin or upload-only VA role

- A replacement for creative leadership

- A basic checklist-only QC seat



This role is for someone who can combine creative discernment, consistency, and backend support to help level up our internal quality control and creative execution.



WHO YOU ARE

You have a strong eye, high standards, and good taste. You notice what others miss. You care about the difference between “technically complete” and “actually good.” You can bring structure to creative work without draining the humanity out of it. You help teams get better, not just busier.

title: Senior UI/UX Web Designer (Figma) – 2 Premium E-Commerce Brands
description:
**IF YOU ARE COPYING AND PASTING AN AI RESPONSE, YOUR APPLICATION WILL BE DELETED**



We are a growing e-commerce company currently in the pre-launch/product testing phase for two brand-new, high-end Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) physical product brands:

1. Stubble Suede: A premiu
n's grooming and skincare line.

2. Rivrstone: A highly visual, premium diatomaceous earth bath stone loofah.



Before our development team writes a single line of code, we need an "Architect." We are looking for an elite-level UI/UX Designer to build the complete visual blueprints for our Shopify stores using Figma. 



To be clear: This is strictly a design role. We are already hiring a dedicated Shopify developer. Your job is to focus 100% on designing stunning, mobile-first, high-converting aesthetics that our developer will later bring to life. 



Our Visual Standard:

We are aiming for an agency-level, premium, modern design. Our benchmark for clean layout, premium typography, whitespace, and visual flow can be seen here: 



If your portfolio consists of generic, clunky, or outdated templates, this will not be a good fit. We need someone with a brilliant eye for visual hierarchy and mobile-first e-commerce conversion psychology.



What You Will Do:

- Design completely custom, high-fidelity Figma wireframes and prototypes for the Homepage, Product Detail Pages (PDP), Cart slide-out, and Checkout flows.

- Design with a strict "Mobile-First" obsession. Since most of our traffic will come from social media ads, the mobile layout must be flawless and optimized for "one-thumb" navigation.

- Take our raw brand assets and weave them into a cohesive, premium digital storefront.

- Organize your Figma files perfectly (using auto-layout, global styles, and clear components) so our developers know exactly how to build what you designed.



What We Are Looking For:

- Master-level proficiency in Figma.

- A strong portfolio demonstrating modern, clean, and premium eCommerce web design (specifically for physical DTC products).

- A deep understanding of Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) from a visual standpoint.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

We ignore automated, copy-pasted AI cover letters. To prove you read this entire post and have an eye for detail, please start your application with the exact word "Blueprint".



In your application, you MUST include the following 4 items:



1. Your Portfolio: Links to your 2-3 best eCommerce designs. (Direct Figma presentation links or live websites where YOU were the primary UI/UX designer).

2. Your Profiles: A link to your Upwork and/or LinkedIn profile so we can verify your past work history.

3. A Loom Video Walkthrough (Required): Record a brief 2-minute Loom video of your screen. Open up a past eCommerce Figma file you designed and walk us through your workspace. Show us how you organize your layers/components for developer handoff, and explain why you laid out the mobile product page the way you did. (Applications without a Loom video of a Figma file will be instantly deleted).

4. Screening Question: When designing a mobile e-commerce Product Detail Page (PDP), what is the biggest visual mistake designers make "above the fold" (before the user scrolls), and what critical elements absolutely MUST be visible in that space to ensure a high conversion rate?



We are looking for a true design partner to help us build these brands from the ground up. If you have the talent to rival top-tier digital agencies, we'd love to hear from you!
